# OrchidUI — Full LLM Reference

OrchidUI is a Vue 3 component library with Tailwind CSS and OrchidUI design tokens (`oc-*` prefix).

## Packages

- `@orchidui/core` — 131 components (UI primitives, forms, layout, navigation)
- `@orchidui/dashboard` — 13 components (charts, editors, specialized widgets)

---

# @orchidui/core

## Table

Display tabular data with sorting, selection, and custom cell slots.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-table-octable--docs

kind: composite · tags: table, data, list

**Use for:**
- standalone table with custom header and body control
- table with sorting and row selection
- simple data table without filter toolbar

**Understand with:** DataTable, NewTable, TableCell, TableHeader, Chip

**Related:** Chip, ExpandingTable, Icon, TableCell, TableCellContent, Toggle

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| options | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| isBorderless | boolean | no |  |  |
| loadingRows | number | no | 10 |  |
| rowKey | string | Function | no | id |  |
| isSticky | boolean | no | false |  |
| isResponsive | boolean | no | false |  |
| sortBy | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| selected | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| rowClass | string | Function | no |  |  |
| rowLink | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| before |  |
| table-header |  |
| table-body |  |
| extra |  |
| empty |  |
| after |  |

### Rules

- Required props: options

### Examples

#### Basic

Minimal table with headers and row data. Custom cell slots override the default renderer per column key.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Table, Chip } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref([])

const options = {
  isSelectable:    true,
  isCursorPointer: true,
  headers: [
    { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[35%]' },
    { key: 'email',  label: 'Email',  class: 'w-[40%]' },
    { key: 'status', label: 'Status', class: 'w-[25%]' }
  ],
  fields: [
    { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com',   status: 'Active' },
    { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com',     status: 'Inactive' },
    { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com', status: 'Active' }
  ]
}

function onRowClick({ field }) {
  console.log('clicked:', field.name)
}
</script>

<template>
  <Table
    v-model:selected="selected"
    :options="options"
    @click:row="onRowClick"
  >
    <template #status="{ data }">
      <Chip
        :label="data"
        :variant="data === 'Active' ? 'success' : 'error'"
      />
    </template>
  </Table>
</template>
```

#### Cell Variants

Built-in cell renderers via the header variant field. No slot needed — the table renders the right component automatically.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Table } from '@orchidui/core'

const options = {
  headers: [
    { key: 'name',    label: 'Name',    class: 'w-[25%]' },
    {
      key: 'status', label: 'Status',  class: 'w-[20%]',
      variant: 'chip',
      chipOptions: {
        active:   { label: 'Active',   variant: 'success' },
        inactive: { label: 'Inactive', variant: 'error' },
        pending:  { label: 'Pending',  variant: 'warning' }
      }
    },
    { key: 'created', label: 'Created', class: 'w-[25%]', variant: 'datetime' },
    { key: 'avatar',  label: 'Avatar',  class: 'w-[20%]', variant: 'image' },
    { key: 'actions', label: '',        class: 'w-[10%]', variant: 'icon' }
  ],
  fields: [
    { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   status: 'active',   created: '2024-01-10T09:00:00Z', avatar: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/40?img=1' },
    { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     status: 'inactive', created: '2024-02-15T14:30:00Z', avatar: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/40?img=2' },
    { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', status: 'pending',  created: '2024-03-20T11:00:00Z', avatar: 'https://i.pravatar.cc/40?img=3' }
  ]
}
</script>

<template>
  <Table :options="options" />
</template>
```

#### Expanding Table Story

ExpandingTable renders nested grouped data with parent/child headers. Use when a single cell contains sub-values (e.g. gross sales broken into quick sale + products).

```vue
<script setup>
import { ExpandingTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const headers = [
  {
    key: 'gross_sales',
    label: 'Gross Sales',
    important: true,
    children: [
      { label: 'Quick Sale', key: 'quick_sale' },
      { label: 'Products',   key: 'products' }
    ]
  },
  {
    key: 'surcharges',
    label: 'Surcharges',
    infoText: 'Additional charges'
  }
]

const fields = {
  gross_sales: { quick_sale: 100, products: 200 },
  surcharges: 50
}
</script>

<template>
  <ExpandingTable :headers="headers" :fields="fields">
    <!-- Aggregate child values in the parent cell -->
    <template #gross_sales="{ value }">
      {{ value.quick_sale + value.products }}
    </template>
  </ExpandingTable>
</template>
```

#### Loading

Pass is-loading to render skeleton rows. loadingRows sets how many skeletons appear.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Table } from '@orchidui/core'

const options = {
  headers: [
    { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[40%]' },
    { key: 'email',  label: 'Email',  class: 'w-[40%]' },
    { key: 'status', label: 'Status', class: 'w-[20%]' }
  ],
  fields: []
}
</script>

<template>
  <Table :options="options" is-loading :loading-rows="5" />
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Table, Toggle, Icon } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref([])
</script>

<template>
<Table
          v-model:selected="selected"
          :options="{ ...options, isSelectable: true }"
          :is-loading="false"
          :is-sticky="false"
          :is-borderless="false"
          :loading-rows="5"
        >
          <template #enabled="{ data }">
            <Toggle size="small" :model-value="data" />
          </template>
          <template #actions>
            <Icon class="w-5 h-5 cursor-pointer mx-auto text-oc-text-400 group-hover/row:opacity-100 opacity-0" name="dots-vertical" />
          </template>
        </Table>
</template>
```

#### Sortable Columns

Set isSortable: true on headers to show sort indicators. Bind sortBy and listen to update:sort-by to handle server-side sorting.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Table } from '@orchidui/core'

const sortBy = ref({ key: 'name', direction: 'asc' })

const options = {
  isCursorPointer: true,
  headers: [
    { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[40%]', isSortable: true },
    { key: 'amount', label: 'Amount', class: 'w-[30%]', isSortable: true },
    { key: 'date',   label: 'Date',   class: 'w-[30%]', isSortable: true }
  ],
  fields: [
    { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   amount: 'SGD 130.00', date: '2024-01-10' },
    { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     amount: 'SGD 50.00',  date: '2024-02-15' },
    { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', amount: 'SGD 200.00', date: '2024-03-20' }
  ]
}

function onSortChange(newSort) {
  sortBy.value = newSort
  // fetch sorted data from server with newSort
  console.log('sort by:', newSort)
}
</script>

<template>
  <Table
    :options="options"
    :sort-by="sortBy"
    @update:sort-by="onSortChange"
  />
</template>
```

#### Sticky Columns

Horizontal scrolling table with pinned columns. Set isSticky on the Table and stickyLeft/stickyRight on individual headers.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Table } from '@orchidui/core'

const options = {
  isSticky: true,
  headers: [
    { key: 'name',    label: 'Name',    class: 'w-[160px]', stickyLeft: true },
    { key: 'email',   label: 'Email',   class: 'w-[220px]' },
    { key: 'country', label: 'Country', class: 'w-[150px]' },
    { key: 'plan',    label: 'Plan',    class: 'w-[150px]' },
    { key: 'created', label: 'Created', class: 'w-[150px]' },
    { key: 'actions', label: '',        class: 'w-[80px]',  stickyRight: true, variant: 'icon' }
  ],
  fields: [
    { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com',   country: 'SG', plan: 'Pro',   created: '2024-01-10' },
    { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com',     country: 'MY', plan: 'Basic', created: '2024-02-15' },
    { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com', country: 'ID', plan: 'Pro',   created: '2024-03-20' }
  ]
}
</script>

<template>
  <Table :options="options" is-sticky />
</template>
```

## TableHeader

Header cell for Table, supports text or checkbox variant.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-table-octableheader--docs

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| isSticky | boolean | no |  |  |
| variant | string | no | text |  |
| isPartial | boolean | no |  |  |
| isChecked | boolean | no |  |  |
| isSortable | boolean | no | false |  |
| sortBy | string | no | null |  |
| text | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## TableCell

Body cell for Table, supports content/chip/datetime/icon/image variants.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-table-octablecell--docs

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| variant | enum | no | default | content, checkbox, chip, datetime, icon, image, empty |
| isSimple | boolean | no |  |  |
| isLast | boolean | no |  |  |
| isCopy | boolean | no |  |  |
| addDescriptionToCopyClipboard | boolean | no |  |  |
| isSelected | boolean | no |  |  |
| content | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| imageClass | string | no | h-full |  |
| link | string | no |  |  |
| data | string | number | boolean | Record<string, any> | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| chipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| datetime | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: content, checkbox, chip, datetime, icon, image, empty

### Examples

#### Default

Row description

```vue
<script setup>
import { TableCell } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex group/row">
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="content" :content="{ title: 'Table Cell', description: 'Row description' }" />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="datetime" :data="new Date()" />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="content" :content="{ title: 'Copyable', description: 'Click to copy' }" isCopy />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full">Default slot</TableCell>
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" isLoading />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="icon" data="x" />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="image" />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="chip" data="label" :chipOptions="{ label: 'primary' }" />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="checkbox" />
          <TableCell class="flex-1"
  variant="content"
  :is-selected="false"
  :is-simple="true"
  :is-last="false"
  :is-copy="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :chip-options="{  }"
  :content="{ title: '', description: '' }"
  image-class="h-full" variant="empty" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## TableCellContent

Two-line cell content with title and description.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-table-octablecellcontent--docs

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| important | boolean | no |  |  |
| link | string | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| href | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| description |  |

Wraps table cell content as a link.

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| link | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## ExpandingTable

Table with collapsible/expandable nested rows.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-table-expandingtable-ocexpandingtable--docs

kind: leaf · tags: table, data, tree

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no | false |  |
| loadingRows | number | no | 5 |  |
| isSticky | boolean | no | false |  |
| fields | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |
| headers | unknown[] | yes |  |  |
| total | number | no | 0 |  |
| isAlternative | boolean | no | false |  |
| gridTemplateColumns | string | no | 32px 200px repeat(${headers.length - 1}, minmax(150px, auto)) 32px |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| total |  |

### Rules

- Required props: fields, headers

## ExpandingTableRow

Single row inside ExpandingTable.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-table-expandingtable-ocexpandingtablerow--docs

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| value | string | number | Record<string, any> | Date | no | 0 |  |
| isLoading | boolean | no | false |  |
| isSticky | boolean | no | false |  |
| headers | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| important | boolean | no | false |  |
| isAlternative | boolean | no | false |  |
| gridTemplateColumns | string | no | 32px 200px repeat(${headers.length - 1}, minmax(150px, auto)) 32px |  |
| depth | number | no | 0 |  |
| isTotal | boolean | no | false |  |
| row | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

## ExpandingHeaderRow

Header row for ExpandingTable.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-table-expandingtable-ocexpandingheaderrow--docs

kind: leaf · tags: table, data

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isSticky | boolean | no | false |  |
| headers | unknown[] | yes |  |  |
| gridTemplateColumns | string | no | 32px 200px repeat(${headers.length - 1}, minmax(150px, auto)) 32px |  |

### Rules

- Required props: headers

## Pagination

Page navigation with prev/next and numbered buttons.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-pagination-ocpagination--docs

kind: leaf · tags: pagination, navigation

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Pagination } from '@orchidui/core'

const currentPage = ref(1)
</script>

<template>
<Pagination
          class="justify-center"
  :total-visible="5"
  size="default"
  :max-page="10"
  :is-rounded="false"
  strategy="default"
          v-model="currentPage"
        />
</template>
```

## PrevNext

Previous or next button used inside Pagination.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-pagination-ocprevnext--docs

kind: leaf · tags: pagination, navigation

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| size | string | no | default |  |
| disabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isNext | boolean | no |  |  |

## PaginationNumber

Numbered page button used inside Pagination.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-pagination-ocpaginationnumber--docs

kind: leaf · tags: pagination, navigation

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isRounded | boolean | no |  |  |
| size | string | no | default |  |
| active | boolean | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## Overview

Group of metric cards showing key stats with icons.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-overview-ocoverview--docs

kind: leaf · tags: stats, dashboard, metrics

**Related:** Button, OverviewItem

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| containerClass | string | no |  |  |
| items | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OverviewItem, Button } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OverviewItem
  icon="circle"
  content="SGD 11,170.00"
  title="Total Revenue"
  :info="true"
  :percent-value="10"
  :is-loading="false"
  percent-tooltip="Compared to last month"
  tooltip="Total revenue this period"
  :icon-props="{ class: 'text-oc-warning-500' }">
          <template #footer>
            <div class="flex flex-col px-4 pb-4">
              <div class="mb-4 bg-oc-warning-50-tr p-2 text-sm text-oc-text-400 text-center rounded-sm">Minimum payout is SGD 1</div>
              <Button size="small" left-icon="circle">Payout funds</Button>
            </div>
          </template>
        </OverviewItem>
</template>
```

#### Overview Group

```vue
<script setup>
import { Overview } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<Overview
  :items="[{ title: 'Total revenue', content: 'SGD 11,170.00', icon: 'coins', variant: 'blue' }, { title: 'This month', content: 'SGD 1,870.00', icon: 'coin', variant: 'accent' }, { title: 'Completed', content: '20', icon: 'check', variant: 'green' }, { title: 'Refunded', content: '3', icon: 'backward', variant: 'red' }]" />
</template>
```

## OverviewIcon

Colored icon badge inside OverviewItem.

kind: leaf · tags: icon, stats

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | string | no | blue |  |
| width | string | no | 22 |  |
| height | string | no | 22 |  |
| icon | string | no | circle |  |

## OverviewItem

Single metric card with title, value, and trend indicator.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-overview-ocoverviewitem--docs

kind: leaf · tags: stats, dashboard, metrics

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| info | boolean | no |  |  |
| isFooter | boolean | no |  |  |
| isTransparent | boolean | no |  |  |
| content | string | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| tooltip | string | no |  |  |
| percentTooltip | string | no |  |  |
| percentValue | number | no |  |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| iconProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| title |  |
| content |  |
| footer |  |

## CustomerCard

Display customer or beneficiary details.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-customercard-occustomercard--docs

kind: leaf · tags: customer, card, profile

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | enum | no | small | small, big, float |
| isHover | boolean | no | false |  |
| isEdit | boolean | no | false |  |
| isClosable | boolean | no |  |  |
| isBeneficiary | boolean | no |  |  |
| customer | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| bottom |  |
| leading |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: small, big, float

### Examples

#### Beneficiary

Bank beneficiary mode — shows currency, bank name, and account number.

```vue
<script setup>
import { CustomerCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<CustomerCard variant="small" :is-beneficiary="true" :customer="customer" />
        <CustomerCard variant="big"   :is-beneficiary="true" :customer="customer" />
</template>
```

#### Big Beneficiary

```vue
<script setup>
import { CustomerCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<CustomerCard />
</template>
```

#### Big Variant

Expanded card with address and phone details. Used in transaction detail pages.

```vue
<script setup>
import { CustomerCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<CustomerCard variant="big" :customer="customer" />
        <CustomerCard variant="float" :customer="customer" />
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { CustomerCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<CustomerCard />
</template>
```

#### Empty State

When no customer is attached — shows an 

```vue
<script setup>
import { CustomerCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<CustomerCard variant="big" @add-customer="() => console.log('add customer')" />
</template>
```

#### Small Variant

Compact card showing name and email/phone only. Used in sidebar panels.

```vue
<script setup>
import { CustomerCard } from '@orchidui/core'

const customer = {
  name: 'Alice Smith',
  email: 'alice@example.com',
  phone_number: '9123 4567',
  phone_number_country_code: '65'
}
</script>

<template>
  <CustomerCard variant="small" :customer="customer" />
</template>
```

#### With Actions

Edit and close actions. isEdit shows a pencil button; isClosable shows an × icon.

```vue
<script setup>
import { CustomerCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<CustomerCard variant="small" :customer="customer" :is-edit="true" :is-hover="true" @edit-customer="(c) => console.log('edit', c)" />
        <CustomerCard variant="small" :customer="customer" :is-closable="true" @close-customer="() => console.log('close')" />
</template>
```

## TransferSummary

Show money transfer summary with amount, fee, and FX rate.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-transfersummary-octransfersummary--docs

kind: leaf · tags: transfer, finance, summary

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| transfer | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |
| hasFxData | boolean | no |  |  |

### Rules

- Required props: transfer

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { TransferSummary } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<TransferSummary
  :has-fx-data="false"
  :transfer="{ source_amount: '134.20', source_currency: 'sgd', fee: '3.50', fee_currency: 'SGD', transfer_method: 'Local' }" />
</template>
```

#### With Fx Data

```vue
<script setup>
import { TransferSummary } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<TransferSummary
  :has-fx-data="true"
  :transfer="{ exchange_rate: '0.73774386', source_amount: '1,355.48', source_currency: 'sgd', payment_currency: 'usd', fee: '3.50', fee_currency: 'SGD', transfer_method: 'Local' }" />
</template>
```

## ListItem

Versatile list row for timeline, webhook, payment, and accordion layouts.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-listitem-oclistitem--docs

kind: leaf · tags: list, timeline, item

**Use for:**
- timeline event row
- webhook endpoint list item
- payment integration list item
- settings row with accordion expand
- general list item with chips and actions

**Understand with:** DropdownItem, Button

**Related:** Button, DropdownItem

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | enum | no | timeLine | timeLine, webhook, payment, general, accordion |
| modelValue | boolean | no |  |  |
| isTransparent | boolean | no |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | no |  |  |
| urls | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| paymentMethods | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| chips | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| details | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDraggable | boolean | no |  |  |
| isOpenDefault | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| descriptionIcon | string | no |  |  |
| iconClass | string | no |  |  |
| iconText | string | no |  |  |
| date | string | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "type" must be one of: timeLine, webhook, payment, general, accordion

### Examples

#### Accordion

Collapsible row. v-model controls open/closed state. Use #content slot for the expanded body. isDraggable shows a drag handle for reorderable lists.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { ListItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
  <ListItem
    v-model="isOpen"
    type="accordion"
    title="Extra Toppings"
    description="Strawberry, Chocolate, Cheese"
    :chips="[{ label: 'Required' }]"
    is-draggable
  >
    <template #content>
      <div class="p-4 flex flex-col gap-2 text-sm text-oc-text-400">
        <label><input type="checkbox" /> Strawberry (+$1.00)</label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" /> Chocolate (+$1.50)</label>
        <label><input type="checkbox" /> Cheese (+$2.00)</label>
      </div>
    </template>
  </ListItem>
</template>
```

#### General

Versatile row for any list item. Supports chips, detail badges, custom logo, and action menu. Use #append instead of #menu when no dropdown is needed.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListItem, DropdownItem, Button } from '@orchidui/core'

const chips = [
  { label: 'Default' },
  { label: 'Premium', variant: 'accent-1' }
]

const details = [
  { label: 'SGD 28.00', icon: 'dollar-coin' },
  { label: 'Singapore', country: 'sg' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
    <!-- With dropdown menu -->
    <ListItem
      type="general"
      title="Standard shipping"
      description="Flat rate"
      :chips="chips"
      :details="details"
    >
      <template #menu>
        <div class="p-2 border-b border-gray-200">
          <DropdownItem text="Edit" icon="pencil" />
        </div>
        <div class="p-2">
          <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
        </div>
      </template>
    </ListItem>

    <!-- With custom logo + append button, no dropdown -->
    <ListItem
      type="general"
      title="PayNow"
      :chips="[{ label: 'Primary' }]"
      :is-dropdown-actions-visible="false"
    >
      <template #logo>
        <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded bg-oc-accent-1-50 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-sm">PN</div>
      </template>
      <template #append>
        <Button label="Disconnect" variant="secondary" size="small" />
      </template>
    </ListItem>

    <!-- Disabled state -->
    <ListItem
      type="general"
      title="Disabled integration"
      description="Cannot be modified"
      is-disabled
      :chips="[{ label: 'Inactive', variant: 'error' }]"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Payment

Payment method integration row. Uses #logo slot for provider image and paymentMethods for method icons.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const paymentMethods = [
  { method: 'visa',   md: 'https://cdn.example.com/icons/visa.png' },
  { method: 'master', md: 'https://cdn.example.com/icons/mastercard.png' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <ListItem
    type="payment"
    title="Shopify"
    description="Connected payment store"
    :payment-methods="paymentMethods"
  >
    <template #logo>
      <div class="rounded-sm p-2 bg-oc-accent-1-50">
        <img src="https://cdn.example.com/icons/shopify.png" class="w-8 h-8" alt="Shopify" />
      </div>
    </template>
  </ListItem>
</template>
```

#### Playground

Flat rate · 3–5 business days

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListItem, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<ListItem
  type="general"
  :is-active="true"
  :is-draggable="false"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-transparent="false"
  title="Standard shipping"
  description="Flat rate · 3–5 business days"
  icon-text="SGD 5.00"
  date="Oct 20, 2024" :chips="chips" :details="details">
          <template #menu>
            <div class="p-2 border-b border-gray-200">
              <DropdownItem text="Edit" icon="pencil" />
            </div>
            <div class="p-2">
              <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
            </div>
          </template>
        </ListItem>
</template>
```

#### Time Line

Timeline event row. Shows icon, title, amount text, and description. isActive controls the filled/empty dot.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListItem } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
    <ListItem
      type="timeLine"
      title="Sep 1, 2024 at 5:01 PM"
      description="#9a2804fc-74df-4304-a7d7-79d11f9e1db8"
      icon="backward"
      icon-class="text-oc-error"
      icon-text="SGD 130.11"
      :is-active="true"
    />
    <ListItem
      type="timeLine"
      title="Aug 15, 2024 at 10:00 AM"
      description="#abc123"
      icon="check"
      icon-text="SGD 50.00"
      :is-active="false"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Webhook

Webhook endpoint row with title, date, URL list, and a context menu via #menu slot.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListItem, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <ListItem
    type="webhook"
    title="Order Notifications"
    date="Oct 20, 2024"
    :urls="[{ url: 'https://myapp.com/webhooks/orders', title: 'Endpoint' }]"
  >
    <template #menu>
      <div class="p-2 border-b border-gray-200">
        <DropdownItem text="Edit"   icon="pencil" />
        <DropdownItem text="Resend" icon="telegram" />
      </div>
      <div class="p-2">
        <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
      </div>
    </template>
  </ListItem>
</template>
```

## ListUrl

Display a labelled URL with copy button.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-listitem-components-oclisturl--docs

kind: leaf · tags: list, url, copy

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isCopy | boolean | no | true |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| url | string | no |  |  |

## ListDetail

Label-value row in horizontal or vertical layout.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-listdetail-oclistdetail--docs

kind: leaf · tags: list, detail, label

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | enum | no | small | small, big |
| content | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| alignment | enum | no | horizontal | vertical, horizontal |
| showCopyTooltip | boolean | no | true |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| content |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: small, big
- "alignment" must be one of: vertical, horizontal

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListDetail } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<ListDetail
  variant="small"
  label="Email"
  content="alex@arcticmonkey.io"
  alignment="horizontal" />
</template>
```

#### Using Slot

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListDetail } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<ListDetail
  variant="big"
  label="Alex Turner"
  alignment="vertical">
          <template #content><span>alex@arcticmonkey.io</span></template>
        </ListDetail>
</template>
```

#### Vertical

```vue
<script setup>
import { ListDetail } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<ListDetail
  variant="big"
  label="Alex Turner"
  content="alex@arcticmonkey.io"
  alignment="vertical" />
</template>
```

## InfoCard

Content card with title, loading state, and header/footer slots.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-infocard-ocinfocard--docs

kind: leaf · tags: card, content

**Related:** Button, OverviewItem

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| hover | boolean | no |  |  |
| transparent | boolean | no |  |  |
| shadow | boolean | no |  |  |
| noData | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| titleIcon | string | no |  |  |
| titleIconTooltip | string | no |  |  |
| titleClass | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| noDataDescription | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| header |  |
| default |  |
| footer |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { InfoCard, OverviewItem, Button } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<InfoCard
  title="Payment Overview"
  title-icon="information"
  title-icon-tooltip="Summary of recent payment activity"
  :is-loading="false"
  :transparent="false"
  :hover="true"
  :shadow="false"
  :no-data="false"
  no-data-description="No items on the site yet">
          <div class="my-7">
            <OverviewItem v-for="o in 4" :key="o" :title="'Item ' + o" icon="circle" class="mb-4" />
          </div>
          <template #footer>
            <Button>View All</Button>
          </template>
        </InfoCard>
</template>
```

## ProgressBar

Step-based linear progress bar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-progressbar-ocprogressbar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: progress, steps

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| steps | number | yes |  |  |
| currentStep | number | no | 1 |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Rules

- Required props: steps

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ProgressBar } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-8">
          <ProgressBar
            label="2 step progress bar"
            :steps="2"
            :currentStep="1"
          />
          <ProgressBar
  label="5 step progress bar"
  :steps="5"
  :current-step="3" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## FloatContent

Floating side panel with title, description, and actions.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-floatcontent-ocfloatcontent--docs

kind: composite · tags: panel, overlay, sidebar

**Use for:**
- side panel
- detail drawer
- edit panel
- sliding panel overlay
- customer detail side view

**Understand with:** FormBuilder, Button, ListDetail, Modal

**Related:** Button

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| position | enum | no | right | left, right |
| modelValue | boolean | no | false |  |
| isClose | boolean | no | true |  |
| dropdownProps | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| dropdownOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:model-value | (event: "update:model-value", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| header |  |
| title |  |
| description |  |
| bottom |  |

### Rules

- "position" must be one of: left, right

### Examples

#### Default

#9a2804fc-74df-4304-a7d7-79d11f9e1db8

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Button, FloatContent } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Button @click="isOpen = !isOpen">Open</Button>
        <FloatContent
          v-model="isOpen"
  position="right"
  title="Transaction detail"
  description="#9a2804fc-74df-4304-a7d7-79d11f9e1db8"
  :dropdown-options="{ top: [{ icon: 'pencil', text: 'Edit', onClick: () => console.log('edit clicked') }, { icon: 'eye-open', text: 'View details', onClick: () => console.log('view details clicked') }], bottom: [{ text: 'Delete', icon: 'bin', iconClasses: '!text-oc-error', onClick: () => console.log('delete clicked') }] }"
        />
</template>
```

## HorizontalProgressbar

Horizontal bar showing current vs max value.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-horizontalprogressbar-ochorizontalprogressbar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: progress, bar

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| label | string | no |  |  |
| max | number | no | 0 |  |
| current | number | no | 0 |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { HorizontalProgressbar } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<HorizontalProgressbar
  :max="5"
  :current="3" :label="\`\${3} / \${5} completed\`" />
</template>
```

## OcOnboardingListItem

Onboarding checklist row with number badge and action button.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-onboardinglistitem-oconboardinglistitem--docs

kind: leaf · tags: onboarding, checklist

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| number | number | no | 1 |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| buttonOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| status | string | no |  |  |
| isButtonVisible | boolean | no | true |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |
| action |  |

### Examples

#### Default

We need to verify your business to get started

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcOnboardingListItem } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcOnboardingListItem
  title="Business verification"
  description="We need to verify your business to get started"
  :button-options="{ variant: 'secondary', label: 'Verify', status: '', number: 1 }" />
        <OcOnboardingListItem
  title="Business verification"
  description="We need to verify your business to get started"
  :button-options="{ variant: 'secondary', label: 'Verify', status: '', number: 1 }" status="pending" />
        <OcOnboardingListItem
  title="Business verification"
  description="We need to verify your business to get started"
  :button-options="{ variant: 'secondary', label: 'Verify', status: '', number: 1 }" status="completed" />
</template>
```

## OcOnboardingRecap

Collapsible recap card for onboarding sections.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-onboardingrecap-oconboardingrecap--docs

kind: leaf · tags: onboarding, recap, summary

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| flat | boolean | no |  |  |
| noHeader | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| items | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| subtitle | string | no |  |  |
| state | string | no |  |  |
| headerButton | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| contentClasses | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcOnboardingRecap } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcOnboardingRecap
  title="Business Information"
  subtitle="Your business details"
  state="completed"
  :header-button="{ leftIcon: 'pencil', label: 'Edit' }"
  :items="[{ label: 'Business Type', value: 'Sole-proprietorship' }, { label: 'Documents', value: ['business-registration-certificate.pdf', 'electricity-bill.jpg', 'alex-id.jpg'] }]" />
</template>
```

#### No Header

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcOnboardingRecap } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcOnboardingRecap
  title="Business Information"
  subtitle="Your business details"
  state="completed"
  :no-header="true"
  :header-button="{ leftIcon: 'pencil', label: 'Edit' }"
  :items="[{ label: 'Business Type', value: 'Sole-proprietorship' }, { label: 'Documents', value: ['business-registration-certificate.pdf', 'electricity-bill.jpg', 'alex-id.jpg'] }]" />
</template>
```

## OcAccountVerificationContent

Container for account verification steps.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-accountverificationcontent-ocaccountverificationcontent--docs

kind: leaf · tags: verification, onboarding

**Related:** OcOnboardingRecap

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| hasFooter | boolean | no | true |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| subtitle | string | no |  |  |
| headerButton | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| buttons | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| footerClasses | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |
| footer |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcAccountVerificationContent, OcOnboardingRecap } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcAccountVerificationContent
  title="Review & submit"
  subtitle="Review all information before submitting your verification"
  footer-classes="justify-between"
  :buttons="[{ label: 'Cancel', variant: 'secondary' }, { label: 'Submit', variant: 'primary' }]">
          <OcOnboardingRecap
            title="Business Information"
            state="completed"
            :header-button="{ leftIcon: 'pencil', label: 'Edit' }"
            :items="[
              { label: 'Business Name', value: 'Acme Corporation' },
              { label: 'Registration Number', value: 'REG-123456789' },
              { label: 'Business Type', value: 'Private Limited Company' },
              { label: 'Documents', value: ['business-registration.pdf', 'tax-certificate.pdf'] }
            ]"
          />
        </OcAccountVerificationContent>
</template>
```

#### Preview

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcAccountVerificationContent, OcOnboardingRecap } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcAccountVerificationContent
  title="Review & submit"
  :has-footer="true"
  :header-button="{ label: 'Edit', leftIcon: 'pencil', size: 'small' }"
  footer-classes="justify-end"
  :buttons="[{ label: 'Save', variant: 'primary' }]">
          <OcOnboardingRecap
            title="Business Information"
            state="completed"
            flat
            no-header
            :header-button="{ leftIcon: 'pencil', label: 'Edit' }"
            :items="[
              { label: 'Business Name', value: 'Acme Corporation' },
              { label: 'Registration Number', value: 'REG-123456789' },
              { label: 'Business Type', value: 'Private Limited Company' },
              { label: 'Documents', value: ['business-registration.pdf', 'tax-certificate.pdf'] }
            ]"
          />
        </OcAccountVerificationContent>
</template>
```

## OcAccountVerificationBox

Selectable verification option card.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-accountverificationcontent-ocaccountverificationbox--docs

kind: leaf · tags: verification, onboarding, option

**Related:** Chip

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| active | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| chips | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| title |  |

### Examples

#### Default

Manually upload your business registration and identity documents.

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcAccountVerificationBox } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcAccountVerificationBox
  title="Upload documents"
  icon="upload"
  description="Manually upload your business registration and identity documents."
  :chips="[{ label: '3 documents required', type: 'transparent', variant: 'gray', icon: 'document' }]" />
</template>
```

#### Header Slot

For Singapore users. Instant verification with auto-filled information.

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcAccountVerificationBox, Chip } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcAccountVerificationBox
  description="For Singapore users. Instant verification with auto-filled information."
  :active="true"
  :chips="[{ label: 'Instant verification', type: 'transparent', variant: 'success', icon: 'document' }, { label: 'Secure', type: 'transparent', variant: 'success', icon: 'information' }]">
          <template #title>
            <img src="/images/singpass.png" alt="singpass" />
            <Chip class="ml-auto" variant="dark-blue" label="Recommended" />
          </template>
        </OcAccountVerificationBox>
</template>
```

## NewTable

Table with row expansion, selection, and named column slots.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-newtable-ocnewtable--docs

kind: composite · tags: table, data, list

**Use for:**
- table rendering inside DataTable
- standalone table with expandable rows
- table with column tooltips and copy buttons

**Understand with:** DataTable, Chip, Pagination

**Related:** Chip

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| options | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |
| isLoading | boolean | no | false |  |
| selected | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| rowKey | string | Function | no | id |  |
| selectedIndex | number | no | -1 |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| before |  |
| after-rows |  |
| empty |  |
| after |  |

### Rules

- Required props: options

### Examples

#### Default

Full-featured NewTable with expandable rows, tooltip column, copy button, and custom cell slots.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { NewTable, Chip } from '@orchidui/core'

const selectedRows = ref([])
</script>

<template>
<NewTable v-model:selected="selectedRows" :options="options" :loading-rows="10" :is-loading="false">
          <template #date="{ item }">
            <div class="truncate">
              {{ dayjs(item.date).format('YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss') }}
            </div>
          </template>
          <template #amount="{ item }">
            {{ item.currency }} {{ item.amount }}
          </template>
          <template #method="{ item }">
            {{ item.payment_method }} •••• {{ item.last4Digits }}
          </template>
          <template #status="{ item }">
            <Chip :variant="item.status" label="Some label" class="truncate" />
          </template>
          <template #actions="{ item }">
            Actions
          </template>
          <template #header-email-tooltip>
            <div class="text-oc-text-400 text-sm normal-case font-medium px-3 py-2">
              This is a tooltip for the email column
            </div>
          </template>
        </NewTable>
</template>
```

## OcRowItemData

List of labelled data items with optional chip and copy button.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datadisplay-rowitemdata-ocrowitemdata--docs

kind: leaf · tags: list, data, detail

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| items | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| copy | (event: "copy", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcRowItemData } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcRowItemData
  :items="[{ label: 'Order ID', text: 'ORD-123456', isCopyButton: true }, { label: 'Status', chip: { label: 'Completed', variant: 'success' } }]" />
</template>
```

#### Single Item

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcRowItemData } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcRowItemData
  :items="[{ label: 'Reference Number', text: 'REF-456789', isCopyButton: true }]" />
</template>
```

#### With Chip

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcRowItemData } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcRowItemData
  :items="[{ label: 'Invoice', text: 'INV-2024-001' }, { label: 'Payment Status', chip: { label: 'Pending', variant: 'warning' } }, { label: 'Due Date', text: '2024-02-15' }]" />
</template>
```

#### With Icon

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcRowItemData } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcRowItemData
  :items="[{ label: 'Transaction ID', text: 'TXN-789012', icon: { name: 'eye', width: 14, height: 14 }, tooltipContent: 'View details' }, { label: 'Payment Method', text: 'Credit Card' }]" />
</template>
```

## Accordion

Collapsible section with header and body.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-accordion-ocaccordion--docs

kind: leaf · tags: accordion, collapse, disclosure

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| icon | enum | no | chevron-down | chevron-down, x, plus |
| isDisabled | boolean | no | false |  |
| header | string | no |  |  |
| headerStyle | string | no |  |  |
| body | string | no |  |  |
| bodyStyle | string | no |  |  |
| showIcon | boolean | no | true |  |
| isAnimated | boolean | no | true |  |
| isExpandable | boolean | no | false |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| header |  |
| body |  |

### Rules

- "icon" must be one of: chevron-down, x, plus

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Accordion } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Accordion v-model:isExpandable="isOpen"
  header="Additional Information"
  body="Accordion content"
  icon="chevron-down"
  :show-icon="true"
  :is-animated="true"
  :is-disabled="false">
          <template #body>
            <p class="text-oc-text-400 text-sm">
              This is the accordion body content. You can place any content here, such as text, forms, or other components.
            </p>
          </template>
        </Accordion>
</template>
```

## OnboardingAccordion

Accordion with onboarding status variant.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-onboardingaccordion-onboardingaccordion--docs

kind: leaf · tags: accordion, onboarding

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | enum | no | current | completed, not_completed, current, partially_completed, pending, error |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| isBorder | boolean | no | false |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| button-group |  |
| default |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: completed, not_completed, current, partially_completed, pending, error

### Examples

#### Default

Tell us what type of products you are selling

```vue
<script setup>
import { OnboardingAccordion } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full flex flex-col gap-y-4">
          <OnboardingAccordion
  title="Choose product type"
  description="Tell us what type of products you are selling"
  :is-border="false"
  variant="completed">
            <div class="p-10">Accordion body content</div>
          </OnboardingAccordion>
        </div>
</template>
```

## OnboardingProductOption

Selectable product option card with image.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-onboardingproduct-onboardingproductoption--docs

kind: leaf · tags: onboarding, option, card

**Related:** Checklist

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| size | enum | no | small | medium, small |
| productImageUrl | string | yes |  |  |
| selectable | boolean | no | false |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Rules

- Required props: productImageUrl
- "size" must be one of: medium, small

### Examples

#### Default

Complete your personal information and business

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { OnboardingProductOption, Checklist } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref([])
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full flex flex-col gap-y-4">
          <OnboardingProductOption
  product-image-url="/images/onboarding/product-images/invoice.svg"
  title="Account Setup"
  description="Complete your personal information and business"
  size="medium">
            <div class="flex flex-col">
              <Checklist label="Account verification" completed :index="1" :action-button="{ label: 'Completed' }" />
              <Checklist label="Add bank account" active :index="2" :action-button="{ label: 'Continue' }" />
              <Checklist label="Configure payout" :index="3" :action-button="{ label: 'Setup' }" />
            </div>
          </OnboardingProductOption>

          <div class="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <OnboardingProductOption
              :model-value="selected.includes('invoice')"
              product-image-url="/images/onboarding/product-images/invoice.svg"
              title="Invoicing"
              selectable
              description="Send professional invoices and get paid online."
              @update:model-value="(checked) => toggle('invoice', checked)"
            />
            <OnboardingProductOption
              :model-value="selected.includes('shopify')"
              product-image-url="/images/onboarding/product-images/shopify.svg"
              title="Shopify"
              selectable
              description="Connect your Shopify store and accept payments seamlessly."
              @update:model-value="(checked) => toggle('shopify', checked)"
            />
          </div>
        </div>
</template>
```

## Tabs

Tab bar for switching between views.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-tabs-octabs--docs

kind: composite · tags: tabs, navigation

**Use for:**
- tabbed navigation
- content switching
- multi-section view
- settings tabs

**Understand with:** SwitchTabs, PaymentTab

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | enum | no | default | default, pills |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isArrows | boolean | no |  |  |
| direction | string | no | horizontal |  |
| isFullWidth | boolean | no |  |  |
| isBig | boolean | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| tabs | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| maxCount | number | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: default, pills

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Tabs } from '@orchidui/core'

const activeTab = ref('overview')
</script>

<template>
<Tabs v-model="activeTab"
  variant="default"
  :tabs="[{ label: 'Overview', value: 'overview' }, { label: 'Transactions', value: 'transactions' }, { label: 'Settings', value: 'settings' }, { label: 'Reports', value: 'reports' }]" />
</template>
```

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|

| tab | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:modelValue | (event: "update:modelValue", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| logo |  |

### Rules

- Required props: modelValue, tab

## Steps

Step indicator for multi-step flows.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-steps-ocsteps--docs

kind: leaf · tags: steps, wizard, progress

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | number | no | 0 |  |
| steps | unknown[] | no | [] |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:model-value | (event: "update:model-value", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Steps } from '@orchidui/core'

const currentStep = ref(0)
</script>

<template>
<Steps v-model="currentStep"
  :steps="[{ title: 'Personal Info' }, { title: 'Business Details' }, { title: 'Verification' }]" />
</template>
```

kind: leaf · tags: steps, wizard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| value | string | number | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| isCurrent | boolean | no | false |  |
| isCompleted | boolean | no | false |  |

## Variants

Group of selectable option cards.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-variants-ocvariants--docs

kind: leaf · tags: variants, option, select

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | string | number | no |  |  |
| variants | unknown[] | no | [] |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:modelValue | (event: "update:modelValue", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Variants } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref('business')
</script>

<template>
<Variants v-model="value"
  :variants="[{ label: 'Business', value: 'business', icon: 'user' }, { label: 'Sole Proprietor', value: 'sole', icon: 'user' }, { label: 'Individual', value: 'individual', icon: 'user', isDisabled: true }]">
          <template #business-description>
            <span class="text-oc-text-400 text-sm">Single-owner businesses without a legal distinction between the owner and the business</span>
          </template>
        </Variants>
</template>
```

## Variant

Single selectable option card with icon and label.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-variants-ocvariant--docs

kind: leaf · tags: variants, option

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| value | string | number | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | no | false |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no | false |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| iconOptions | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |

## SwitchTabs

Segmented control for switching between a few options.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/disclosure-switchtabs-ocswitchtabs--docs

kind: leaf · tags: tabs, toggle, switch

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| options | unknown[] | yes |  |  |
| activeOption | string | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| select | (event: "select", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Rules

- Required props: options

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SwitchTabs } from '@orchidui/core'

const activeOption = ref('weekly')
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex items-center justify-center">
          <SwitchTabs
  :options="[{ label: 'Weekly', value: 'weekly' }, { label: 'Monthly', value: 'monthly' }, { label: 'Yearly', value: 'annually' }]" :active-option="activeOption" @select="activeOption = $event" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Header

Top-level application header shell.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-header-ocheader--docs

kind: leaf · tags: header, layout, navigation

**Related:** Button, Dropdown, DropdownItem, HeaderCenter, HeaderLeft, HeaderRight, Icon, SubHeader, TabToSelect

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Header, Icon, HeaderLeft, HeaderCenter, TabToSelect, HeaderRight } from '@orchidui/core'

const activeMenuValue = ref('online_store')
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[400px]">
          <Header class="mb-3">
            <button aria-label="Menu Button" class="p-3 md:hidden">
              <Icon name="menu" width="24" height="24"/>
            </button>
            <HeaderLeft class="md:w-[260px]">
              <SampleHeaderLeft/>
            </HeaderLeft>
            <HeaderCenter class="flex-1 md:flex-none">
              <TabToSelect v-model="activeMenuValue" :menus="[{ label: 'Payments', value: 'payments', sidebarClass: 'layout-payment', path: 'payments', icon: 'online-payment' }, { label: 'Point of Sale', value: 'point_of_sale', sidebarClass: 'layout-pos', path: 'point_of_sale', icon: 'pos' }, { label: 'Online Store', value: 'online_store', sidebarClass: 'layout-online-store', path: 'online_store', icon: 'online-store' }]"/>
            </HeaderCenter>
            <HeaderRight>
              <SampleHeaderRight/>
            </HeaderRight>
          </Header>
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Sub Header Dropdown Element

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SubHeader, HeaderLeft, HeaderCenter, HeaderRight, Dropdown, Button, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const isDropdownOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<SubHeader class="mb-3">
          <HeaderLeft class="hidden md:flex">
            <SampleHeaderLeft is-sub-header/>
          </HeaderLeft>
          <HeaderCenter class="flex-1" :is-saved="true" />
          <HeaderRight :is-saved="true" :primary-props="{ label: 'Create' }">
            <template #primary-button>
              <Dropdown v-model="isDropdownOpen" placement="bottom-end">
                <Button
                  class="min-w-[100px]"
                  label="Save"
                  v-bind="{ label: 'Create' }"
                  is-additional-area
                  additional-area-icon="chevron-down"
                  @click="$emit('save')"
                  @addition-click="isDropdownOpen = true"
                />
                <template #menu>
                  <div class="flex flex-col">
                    <div class="p-2 border-b border-gray-200">
                      <DropdownItem
                        v-for="(option, index) in [{ label: 'Save as Draft', icon: 'floppy', action: 'save-as-draft' }]"
                        :key="index"
                        :text="option.label"
                        :icon="option.icon ?? null"
                        @click="onDropdownItemClick(option.action)"
                      />
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </template>
              </Dropdown>
            </template>
          </HeaderRight>
        </SubHeader>
</template>
```

#### Sub Header Element

```vue
<script setup>
import { SubHeader, HeaderLeft, HeaderCenter, HeaderRight } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<SubHeader class="mb-3">
          <HeaderLeft class="hidden md:flex">
            <SampleHeaderLeft is-sub-header/>
          </HeaderLeft>
          <HeaderCenter class="flex-1" :is-saved="true">
            <template #after><span class="text-oc-text-100 ml-3">---Slot After</span></template>
          </HeaderCenter>
          <HeaderRight :is-saved="true" :primary-props="{label: 'Update'}">
            <template #before><span class="text-oc-text-100 ml-3">Slot Before---</span></template>
          </HeaderRight>
        </SubHeader>
</template>
```

## Checklist

Checklist step item with index, label, and completion state.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-checklist-occhecklist--docs

kind: leaf · tags: checklist, onboarding

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| active | boolean | no | false |  |
| label | string | yes |  |  |
| index | number | yes |  |  |
| completed | boolean | no | false |  |
| actionButton | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Rules

- Required props: label, index

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Checklist } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col">
          <Checklist
            label="Account verifications"
            completed
            :index="1"
            :action-button="{ label: 'Completed' }"
          />
          <Checklist
            label="Add bank account"
            active
            :index="2"
            :action-button="{ label: 'Continue' }"
          />
          <Checklist
            label="Add bank account"
            index="3"
            :action-button="{ label: 'Setup' }"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## PageTitle

Page title bar with back button and primary/secondary actions.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-pagetitle-ocpagetitle--docs

kind: leaf · tags: page, title, header

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no | false |  |
| isCopy | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | yes |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| titleClass | string | no |  |  |
| copyValue | string | no |  |  |
| isBack | boolean | no | false |  |
| isMobileCombineButtons | boolean | no | false |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| primaryButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| secondaryButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| chipProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| title |  |
| description |  |
| right |  |
| mobile-amount |  |

### Rules

- Required props: title

### Examples

#### Default

123

```vue
<script setup>
import { PageTitle } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<PageTitle
  title="Page Title"
  description="123"
  :is-loading="false"
  :primary-button-props="{ leftIcon: 'plus', label: 'Primary', onClick: () => {
        console.log('click new payment link')
      } }"
  :secondary-button-props="{ isDropdownOpened: false, variant: 'secondary', label: 'Secondary', dropdownOptions: [{ name: 'bulk_create', icon: 'upload', text: 'Bulk create', onClick: () => {
            console.log('click bulk create')
          } }, { name: 'download', icon: 'download', text: 'Export', onClick: () => {
            console.log('click download')
          } }] }"
  :is-back="false"
  :is-copy="false" />
</template>
```

kind: leaf · tags: button, actions

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| primaryActions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

## Sidebar

Main application sidebar with expandable menus.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sidebar-ocsidebar--docs

kind: composite · tags: sidebar, navigation, layout

**Use for:**
- app navigation
- main sidebar menu
- side navigation with submenus

**Understand with:** SideBarMenu, SidebarSubmenu, SidebarFooter, SidebarFeatureBanners, AccountSetupProgress, Icon

**Related:** AccountSetupProgress, Avatar, Dropdown, DropdownItem, SidebarFeatureBanners

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isExpanded | boolean | no | true |  |
| sidebarMenu | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| displayName | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| before |  |
| after |  |
| banner |  |

### Examples

#### All Sidebar

```vue
<script setup>
import { Sidebar } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<Sidebar
          :title="args.title"
          :sidebar-menu="args.payment_sidebar_menu"
          :isExpanded="args.isExpanded"
          @changeExpanded="args.isExpanded = $event"
        >
          <template #before>
            <OcAccountSetup :isExpanded="args.isExpanded" :progress="args.progress"/>
            <OcAccountSetup
              :isExpanded="args.isExpanded"
              :progress="args.progress"
              is-pending
              :payout-status="{ label: 'Pending', variant: 'warning'}"
              :payment-status="{ label: 'Enabled', variant: 'success'}"
            />
          </template>
          <template v-slot:label="{menu}">
            <a href="#" class="whitespace-nowrap px-5 py-3">{{ menu.label }}</a>
          </template>
          <template v-slot:submenu_label="{submenu}">
            <a href="#" class="whitespace-nowrap px-5 py-3">{{ submenu.label }}</a>
          </template>
        </Sidebar>
      </Theme>

      <Theme class="layout-pos mb-8">
        <Sidebar
          :title="args.title"
          :sidebar-menu="args.pos_sidebar_menu"
          :isExpanded="args.isExpanded"
          @changeExpanded="args.isExpanded = $event"
        >
          <template v-slot:label="{menu}">
            <a href="#" class="px-5 py-3">{{ menu.label }}</a>
          </template>
          <template v-slot:submenu_label="{submenu}">
            <a href="#" class="px-5 py-3">{{ submenu.label }}</a>
          </template>
          <template v-slot:after="{isExpanded}">
            <div class="mt-4 mb-6 w-full border-b border-[var(--oc-sidebar-menu-title)] opacity-50"></div>
            <div class="rounded font-medium bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FCE82E] via-[#9531F9] to-[#F77618] p-1">
              <div class="flex gap-3 py-4 flex-wrap justify-center rounded bg-oc-bg-light">
                <a href="#">
                  <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                    <g clip-path="url(#clip0_1127_54645)">
                      <path d="M13.0642 6.68504L13.8087 6.37922C14.4141 6.13814 15.1955 5.8939 16.1192 6.04915C18.01 6.36695 19.3145 7.38793 20.0914 8.74213C20.3908 9.26401 20.1489 9.95146 19.5887 10.1709C18.6569 10.5358 17.9999 11.4424 17.9999 12.4999C17.9999 13.6076 18.7211 14.5496 19.7222 14.8768C20.2405 15.0463 20.5317 15.6216 20.3615 16.1396C19.9201 17.4823 19.2836 18.7212 18.5305 19.7212C17.7871 20.7085 16.879 21.5295 15.868 21.9297C15.2088 22.1906 14.5002 22.0932 13.8227 21.9251L13.4206 21.8181L12.8237 21.6446C12.5528 21.5663 12.2747 21.4982 11.9999 21.4982C11.7251 21.4982 11.447 21.5663 11.1761 21.6446L10.5793 21.8181L10.1772 21.9251C9.49961 22.0932 8.79107 22.1906 8.13188 21.9297C6.85861 21.4257 5.73553 20.2497 4.88738 18.8633C4.02419 17.4522 3.37005 15.7027 3.10335 13.8774C2.87624 12.3229 2.99884 10.5784 3.71813 9.10178C4.45891 7.58105 5.81382 6.39659 7.8806 6.04915C8.72039 5.90798 9.44255 6.09701 10.0218 6.31369L10.352 6.44459L10.9357 6.68504C11.3354 6.84166 11.6515 6.93389 11.9999 6.93389C12.3484 6.93389 12.6645 6.84166 13.0642 6.68504ZM11.7677 2.76766C12.744 1.79135 14.2426 1.707 14.5961 2.06056C14.9497 2.41411 14.8653 3.91267 13.889 4.88898C12.9127 5.86529 11.4141 5.94964 11.0606 5.59609C10.707 5.24254 10.7914 3.74397 11.7677 2.76766Z" fill="black"/>
                    </g>
                    <defs>
                      <clipPath id="clip0_1127_54645">
                        <rect width="24" height="24" fill="white"/>
                      </clipPath>
                    </defs>
                  </svg>
                </a>
                <a href="#">
                  <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                    <g clip-path="url(#clip0_1127_54649)">
                      <path d="M11.9999 13.4141L14.9467 16.3608L5.25 21.9592C4.72369 22.2631 4.12812 22.2071 3.68198 21.9175L3.57369 21.8403L11.9999 13.4141ZM3 4.41415L10.5857 11.9999L3 19.5856V4.41415ZM16.7398 8.67424L20.25 10.7009C21.25 11.2782 21.25 12.7216 20.25 13.2989L16.7398 15.3255L13.4142 11.9999L16.7398 8.67424ZM5.25 2.0406L14.9466 7.63896L11.9999 10.5857L3.57371 2.15944C4.02839 1.80454 4.67983 1.71141 5.25 2.0406Z" fill="black"/>
                    </g>
                    <defs>
                      <clipPath id="clip0_1127_54649">
                        <rect width="24" height="24" fill="white"/>
                      </clipPath>
                    </defs>
                  </svg>
                </a>
                <span v-if="isExpanded">Download App</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </template>
        </Sidebar>
      </Theme>

      <Theme class="layout-online-store mb-8">
        <Sidebar
          :title="args.title"
          :sidebar-menu="args.online_store_sidebar_menu"
          :isExpanded="args.isExpanded"
          @changeExpanded="args.isExpanded = $event"
        >
          <template v-slot:label="{menu}">
            <a href="#" class="px-5 py-3">{{ menu.label }}</a>
          </template>
          <template v-slot:submenu_label="{submenu}">
            <a href="#" class="px-5 py-3">{{ submenu.label }}</a>
          </template>
        </Sidebar>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Sidebar, AccountSetupProgress, SidebarFeatureBanners, Dropdown, Avatar, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const rightMenuDropdown = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Sidebar
          :title="args.title"
          :sidebar-menu="args.payment_sidebar_menu"
          :isExpanded="args.isExpanded"
          @changeExpanded="args.isExpanded = $event"
        >
          <template #banner>
            <AccountSetupProgress :value="args.progress" info-label="Add your bank account" />
            <SidebarFeatureBanners
              title="Late invoice fee"
              is-stacked
              description="You can now automate late fees on unpaid invoices by setting a fixed amount or percentage of the total, applied after a custom grace period."
            />
          </template>
          <template #before>
            <OcAccountSetup :isExpanded="args.isExpanded" :progress="args.progress"/>
          </template>
          <template #user>
            <Dropdown v-model="rightMenuDropdown" placement="bottom-end" :distance="10">
              <Avatar class="uppercase cursor-pointer" :size="32">
                J
              </Avatar>
              <template #menu>
                <div class="flex flex-col">
                  <div class="p-2 border-b border-gray-200">
                    <a href="#">
                      <DropdownItem text="userName" />
                    </a>
                    <a href="#">
                      <DropdownItem text="Security" />
                    </a>
                  </div>
                  <div class="p-2">
                    <DropdownItem @click="logout" text="Logout" variant="destructive" />
                  </div>
                </div>
              </template>
            </Dropdown>
          </template>
        </Sidebar>
</template>
```

## SidebarSubmenu

Expandable submenu inside Sidebar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sidebar-ocsidebarsubmenu--docs

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isExpanded | boolean | no | true |  |
| isExpandedSidebar | boolean | no | false |  |
| menu | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| label |  |

## AccountSetup

Account setup progress widget inside Sidebar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sidebar-ocaccountsetup--docs

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, onboarding, progress

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| progress | number | no | 0 |  |
| isExpanded | boolean | no |  |  |
| isPending | boolean | no |  |  |
| paymentStatus | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| payoutStatus | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

## SidebarHead

Header section of a Sidebar menu group.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sidebar-ocsidebarhead--docs

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isSidebarExpanded | boolean | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## SideBarMenu

Single menu item in Sidebar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sidebar-ocsidebarmenu--docs

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation, menu

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isExpanded | boolean | no |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | no |  |  |
| isMenuExpanded | boolean | no |  |  |
| isChildren | boolean | no |  |  |
| isBeta | boolean | no |  |  |
| isNew | boolean | no |  |  |
| isTryIt | boolean | no |  |  |
| isShowBadge | boolean | no | true |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| close-menu | (event: "close-menu", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## SidebarSubMenuItem

Child menu item inside SidebarSubmenu.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isExpanded | boolean | no |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | no |  |  |
| isBeta | boolean | no |  |  |
| isNew | boolean | no |  |  |
| isTryIt | boolean | no |  |  |
| isShowBadge | boolean | no | true |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |

## SidebarFooter

Footer section of the Sidebar.

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, layout

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isExpanded | boolean | no |  |  |
