| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## SidebarFeatureBanners

Feature promotion banners inside Sidebar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sidebar-ocsidebarfeaturebanners--docs

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, banner, promo

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| isStacked | boolean | no | false |  |

## AccountSetupProgress

Circular progress indicator for account setup in Sidebar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sidebar-ocaccountsetupprogress--docs

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, progress, onboarding

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| value | number | no | 0 |  |
| infoLabel | string | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| redirect | (event: "redirect", ...args: any[]): void |  |

## SubSidebar

Secondary sidebar for sub-navigation.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-subsidebar-ocsubsidebar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: sidebar, navigation

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| menu | unknown[] | no | [] |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SubSidebar } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref()
</script>

<template>
<SubSidebar v-model="modelValue" class="w-fit" :menu="[{ label: 'Sales summary', value: 'sales-summary' }, { label: 'Sales trends', value: 'sales-trends' }, { label: 'General settings', value: 'general-settings' }, { label: 'Analytics', value: 'analytics' }, { label: 'SEO', value: 'seo' }, { label: 'Multi-currency converter', value: 'multi-currency-converter' }, { label: 'Order form customisation', value: 'order-form-customisation' }]" :title="'Title'" @titleClick="() => null"/>
</template>
```

## EmptyPage

Placeholder shown when a section has no data.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-emptypage-ocemptypage--docs

kind: leaf · tags: empty, placeholder, state

**Use for:**
- empty state placeholder
- no data yet state
- zero state with call-to-action button
- search no results state
- feature upgrade prompt

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| size | string | no | default |  |
| icon | string | no | document |  |
| isButton | boolean | no | true |  |
| isUpgrade | boolean | no | false |  |
| upgradeLabel | string | no | Upgrade now |  |
| addButtonLabel | string | no | Add new |  |
| addButtonIcon | string | no | plus |  |
| hideBadge | boolean | no | false |  |
| containerClass | string | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| secondaryButton | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| click:button | (event: "click:button", ...args: any): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| icon |  |
| description |  |

### Examples

#### Custom Container Class

Override the icon ring colour with containerClass — useful when the default grey or warning colour does not fit the context.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    icon="star"
    title="No favourites yet"
    description="Items you star will appear here."
    add-button-label="Browse items"
    container-class="text-oc-primary-600 border-oc-primary-300 bg-oc-primary-50"
    hide-badge
  />
</template>
```

#### Custom Slots

Use the #icon and #description slots to inject arbitrary content in place of the default icon circle and description text.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    title="Nothing here yet"
    add-button-label="Get started"
  >
    <template #icon>
      <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-oc-primary-50 border border-oc-primary-200 flex items-center justify-center text-3xl">
        📭
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #description>
      <p class="text-oc-text-400 text-center text-sm">
        Add your first item or
        <a href="#" class="text-oc-primary-500 underline">import from CSV</a>.
      </p>
    </template>
  </EmptyPage>
</template>
```

#### Default

Basic empty state with icon, title, description, and a primary action button.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    icon="document"
    title="No data yet"
    description="Create your first item to get started."
    add-button-label="Create item"
    add-button-icon="plus"
    @click:button="console.log('clicked')"
  />
</template>
```

#### Large Size

Large variant with a bigger icon circle — suitable for full-page empty states.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    size="large"
    icon="document"
    title="No transactions yet"
    description="Your transactions will appear here once you start accepting payments."
    add-button-label="Create payment link"
  />
</template>
```

#### No Button

Read-only state with no action button — for situations where the user cannot take action.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    icon="clock"
    title="Pending review"
    description="Your submission is under review. You will be notified when it's approved."
    :is-button="false"
    hide-badge
  />
</template>
```

#### Small Size

Compact variant for inside cards or panels. hide-badge removes the exclamation overlay.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    size="small"
    icon="search"
    title="No results"
    description="Try a different search term."
    hide-badge
    :is-button="false"
  />
</template>
```

#### Upgrade Variant

Warning-coloured icon ring for upsell prompts. Uses upgradeLabel on the button instead of addButtonLabel.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    icon="star"
    title="Premium feature"
    description="Upgrade your plan to unlock this feature."
    is-upgrade
    upgrade-label="Upgrade now"
    @click:button="console.log('upgrade clicked')"
  />
</template>
```

#### With Secondary Button

Two-button layout: pass a Button props object to secondary-button to show a second action.

```vue
<script setup>
import { EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'

const secondary = { label: 'Learn more', variant: 'secondary' }
</script>

<template>
  <EmptyPage
    icon="document"
    title="No payments yet"
    description="Share your payment link to start receiving payments."
    add-button-label="Create link"
    :secondary-button="secondary"
    @click:button="console.log('primary clicked')"
  />
</template>
```

## AdditionalContent

Side panel with customer info, overview, and action buttons.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-additionalcontent-ocadditionalcontent--docs

kind: leaf · tags: panel, sidebar, content

**Related:** OverviewItem

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no | false |  |
| variant | enum | no | default | default, dynamic, balance |
| href | string | no |  |  |
| paymentMethods | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| dropdownProps | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| mainLink | string | no |  |  |
| balanceContainerClass | string | no |  |  |
| userId | string | no |  |  |
| chipVariant | enum | no |  | accent-1, accent-2, success, warning, error, gray |
| chipLabel | string | no |  |  |
| additionalTitle | string | no |  |  |
| overviewActiveTab | enum | no |  | hitpay, card |
| customerCardVariant | enum | no |  | small, big, float |
| customerIsHover | boolean | no | false |  |
| customerIsEdit | boolean | no | false |  |
| boxes | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| isCustomer | boolean | no | false |  |
| overviewItems | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| overviewTabs | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| dropdownItems | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| additionalStyling | string | no |  |  |
| customer | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| secondaryButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| primaryActions | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| moreButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: default, dynamic, balance
- "chipVariant" must be one of: accent-1, accent-2, success, warning, error, gray
- "overviewActiveTab" must be one of: hitpay, card
- "customerCardVariant" must be one of: small, big, float

### Examples

#### Balance

```vue
<script setup>
import { AdditionalContent } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<AdditionalContent
          :main-link="args.mainLink"
          :chip-label="args.chipLabel"
          :additional-title="args.additionalTitle"
          :chip-variant="args.chipVariant"
          :user-id="args.userId"
          :primary-actions="args.primaryActions"
          variant="balance"
          :boxes="args.boxes"
          :overview-items="args.overviewItems"
          :overview-tabs="args.overviewTabs"
          :customer-card-variant="args.customerCardVariant"
          :is-customer="args.isCustomer"
          :customer="args.customer"
          :overview-active-tab="args.overviewActiveTab"
          @change-tab="args.overviewActiveTab = $event"
        >
          <template #hitpay="{ tab }">
            Test block for hitpay slot
          </template>
          <template #footer>
            Test block for footer slot
          </template>
        </AdditionalContent>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { AdditionalContent } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<AdditionalContent
          :main-link="args.mainLink"
          :chip-label="args.chipLabel"
          :additional-title="args.additionalTitle"
          :chip-variant="args.chipVariant"
          :user-id="args.userId"
          :primary-actions="args.primaryActions"
          :variant="args.variant ?? 'default'"
          :boxes="args.boxes"
          :overview-items="args.overviewItems"
          :overview-tabs="args.overviewTabs"
          :customer-card-variant="args.customerCardVariant"
          :is-customer="args.isCustomer"
          :customer="args.customer"
          :overview-active-tab="args.overviewActiveTab"
          :is-loading="args.isLoading"
          @change-tab="args.overviewActiveTab = $event"
        />
</template>
```

#### Dynamic

```vue
<script setup>
import { AdditionalContent, OverviewItem } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<AdditionalContent
          :main-link="args.mainLink"
          :chip-label="args.chipLabel"
          :additional-title="args.additionalTitle"
          :chip-variant="args.chipVariant"
          :user-id="args.userId"
          :primary-actions="args.primaryActions"
          variant="dynamic"
          :boxes="argTypes['boxes'].options['5 Fields in 2 boxes']"
          :overview-items="args.overviewItems"
          :overview-tabs="args.overviewTabs"
          :customer-card-variant="args.customerCardVariant"
          :is-customer="args.isCustomer"
          :customer="args.customer"
          :overview-active-tab="args.overviewActiveTab"
          @change-tab="args.overviewActiveTab = $event"
        />
        <AdditionalContent
          :main-link="args.mainLink"
          :chip-label="args.chipLabel"
          :additional-title="args.additionalTitle"
          :chip-variant="args.chipVariant"
          :user-id="args.userId"
          :primary-actions="args.primaryActions"
          variant="dynamic"
          :boxes="argTypes['boxes'].options['4 Fields']"
          :overview-items="args.overviewItems"
          :overview-tabs="args.overviewTabs"
          :customer-card-variant="args.customerCardVariant"
          is-customer
          customer-is-hover
          customer-is-edit
          :customer="args.customer"
          :overview-active-tab="args.overviewActiveTab"
          @change-tab="args.overviewActiveTab = $event"
        >
          <template #Box="{ data, key }">
            <OverviewItem
              v-for="(field, index) in data.items"
              :key="data.key + '-' + index"
              is-transparent
              :title="field.title"
              :content="field.content"
            >
              <template #content>
                <div class="text-oc-success-500">{{field.content}}</div>
              </template>
            </OverviewItem>
          </template>
          <template #BoxInfoTooltip>
            <div class="p-4">
              <div class="text-oc-error">Tooltip</div>
            </div>
          </template>
          <template #customer-bottom>
            <div>Customer Bottom</div>
          </template>
        </AdditionalContent>
</template>
```

## InfoCardButton

Selectable card button with title and content.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-additionalcontent-balancetype-ocinfocardbutton--docs

kind: leaf · tags: card, button, select

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDropdown | boolean | no |  |  |
| chipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| content | string | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| dropdownOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| countryIso | string | no |  |  |

## Skeleton

Loading placeholder that mimics content shape.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-skeleton-ocskeleton--docs

kind: leaf · tags: loading, skeleton, placeholder

**Use for:**
- content loading placeholder
- table row loading state
- card loading skeleton
- form fields loading state
- dashboard stats loading

### Examples

#### Avatar With Text

Avatar + name/detail row loading state. rounded-full makes the circle avatar shape.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Skeleton } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex gap-3 items-center">
    <Skeleton class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full shrink-0" />
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-2 flex-1">
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[160px] rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-3 w-[100px] rounded" />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Card

Card loading state with image area, title, and description lines.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Skeleton } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[280px] rounded-lg border border-oc-gray-200 overflow-hidden">
    <!-- image area -->
    <Skeleton class="h-[160px] w-full" />

    <!-- content -->
    <div class="p-4 flex flex-col gap-3">
      <Skeleton class="h-5 w-3/4 rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-full rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-5/6 rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-8 w-24 rounded mt-2" />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Form Fields

Form loading state — label + input skeleton pairs for each field.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Skeleton } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-5 w-[360px]">
    <!-- Field 1 -->
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-24 rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-9 w-full rounded" />
    </div>
    <!-- Field 2 -->
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-16 rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-9 w-full rounded" />
    </div>
    <!-- Field 3 -->
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-20 rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-[80px] w-full rounded" />
    </div>
    <!-- Submit button -->
    <Skeleton class="h-9 w-24 rounded" />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Overview Cards

Dashboard overview/stats card row loading state.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Skeleton } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <div class="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4 w-full max-w-[600px]">
    <div
      v-for="i in 3"
      :key="i"
      class="p-4 border border-oc-gray-200 rounded-lg flex flex-col gap-3"
    >
      <Skeleton class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg" />
      <Skeleton class="h-6 w-1/2 rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-3/4 rounded" />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Table Row

Table row loading state. Repeat to fill the expected number of rows.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Skeleton } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-full border border-oc-gray-200 rounded overflow-hidden">
    <!-- header row -->
    <div class="flex gap-3 px-4 py-3 border-b border-oc-gray-200 bg-oc-bg-2">
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[40%] rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[30%] rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[20%] rounded" />
    </div>

    <!-- data rows -->
    <div
      v-for="i in 5"
      :key="i"
      class="flex gap-3 px-4 py-4 border-b border-oc-gray-200 last:border-0"
    >
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[40%] rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[30%] rounded" />
      <Skeleton class="h-4 w-[20%] rounded" />
    </div>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Text Lines

Paragraph loading state. Control width with Tailwind classes to simulate text of different lengths.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Skeleton } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-3 w-[300px]">
    <Skeleton class="h-5 w-full rounded" />
    <Skeleton class="h-5 w-5/6 rounded" />
    <Skeleton class="h-5 w-4/6 rounded" />
    <Skeleton class="h-5 w-2/6 rounded" />
  </div>
</template>
```

## FeatureOverviewCard

Card listing product features with icons.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-featureoverviewcard-ocfeatureoverviewcard--docs

kind: leaf · tags: card, features, overview

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | yes |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| features | unknown[] | no | [] |  |

### Rules

- Required props: title

### Examples

#### Default

Description

```vue
<script setup>
import { FeatureOverviewCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<FeatureOverviewCard
  title="Title"
  description="Description"
  :features="[{ title: 'Send Money Locally', icon: 'send' }, { title: 'International Payments', icon: 'world-money', comingSoon: true }, { title: 'Add Approvers', icon: 'stamp' }, { title: 'Try Now', icon: 'bitcoin-growth' }]"/>
</template>
```

## SandboxBanner

Top banner indicating sandbox/test mode.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-sandboxbanner-ocsandboxbanner--docs

kind: leaf · tags: banner, sandbox, alert

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |
| buttonProps | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| chipProps | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { SandboxBanner } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<SandboxBanner
  title="You are using test data. Real money won't be charged"
  :chip-props="{ label: 'Sandbox Banner', variant: 'light-red' }"
  :button-props="{ label: 'Read our docs', isTransparent: true, rightIcon: 'arrow-right', class: '[&>button]:!text-white !underline underline-offset-2' }" />
</template>
```

## TopBanner

Dismissible top-of-page announcement banner.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-topbanner-octopbanner--docs

kind: leaf · tags: banner, alert, notification

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |
| titleClass | string | no |  |  |
| chipProps | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| secondaryButton | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| rawHtml | string | no | null |  |
| buttonLabel | string | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| click:button | (event: "click:button", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Examples

#### Action Required

```vue
<script setup>
import { TopBanner } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<TopBanner
          class="gap-5 w-full pl-5"
          title-class="flex-1 font-normal"
          :chip-props="{ label: 'Action Required', variant: 'warning', class: 'shrink-0', icon: 'alert-fill' }"
          :raw-html="'We will stop using <span class='underline font-medium'>Cards (by Adyen)</span> soon. To prevent payment disruptions, complete your onboarding to the new payment method 'Cards' by 21 Nov \'25.'"
          :button-label="'Complete now'"
          :secondary-button="{
            label: 'View guide',
            class: 'underline'
          }"
          @click:button="onClick"
        />
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { TopBanner } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<TopBanner :title="'To start accepting recurring payments, please activate a payment method that supports it.'" :button-label="'Activate payment method'" @click:button="onClick" />
</template>
```

## Box

Clickable card with icon, title, and description.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-box-ocbox--docs

kind: leaf · tags: card, box, button

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isActive | boolean | no |  |  |
| variant | string | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| width | string | no |  |  |
| height | string | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

Last changed on Fri Mar 08 2024 14:43:39 GMT+0700 (Western Indonesia Time)

```vue
<script setup>
import { Box } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<Box
  title="Change password"
  description="Last changed on Fri Mar 08 2024 14:43:39 GMT+0700 (Western Indonesia Time)"
  icon="key"
  :is-active="true" />
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Box } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex gap-x-4">
          <Box
            title="Change password"
            description="Last changed on Fri Mar 08 2024 14:43:39 GMT+0700 (Western Indonesia Time)"
            icon="key"
            :is-active="true"
          />
          <Box
            title="Setup two-factor authentication"
            description="Log in with an authentication code from your phone as well as a password."
            icon="safe-lock"
            :is-active="false"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## OcSection

Content section wrapper with optional title.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-section-ocsection--docs

kind: leaf · tags: section, layout

**Related:** Button, Icon, ListItem, OcOnboardingListItem, OverviewIcon

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| header |  |
| header-right |  |
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcSection, ListItem, OverviewIcon, Button, OcOnboardingListItem } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<OcSection :title="'Get in touch'">
          <ListItem
            type="general"
            :is-dropdown-actions-visible="false"
            :is-disabled="true"
            class="!opacity-100"
          >
            <template #title>
              <OverviewIcon icon="chat" />
            </template>

            <div>
              <div class="font-medium">Live chat</div>
              <div class="mt-2 text-sm">Get instant help from our support team.</div>

              <div class="flex mt-4 text-sm">
                <div class="w-[16px] h-[16px] rounded-full bg-oc-accent-1-100 p-2 flex justify-center items-center">
                  <svg width="8" height="8" viewBox="0 0 8 8" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
                    <circle cx="4" cy="4" r="4" fill="#002771"/>
                  </svg>
                </div>

                <div class="ml-3">
                  <span class="text-oc-text-500 font-medium">Off-hours</span>
                  <span class="ml-2 text-oc-text-400">~1 hr response time</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="flex mt-5">
                <Button size="small" variant="secondary" label="Start chat"/>
              </div>
            </div>
          </ListItem>
        </OcSection>

        <OcSection title="Resource" class="mt-8">
          <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-5">
            <OcOnboardingListItem
              class="rounded border border-gray-200 max-w-[420px]"
              is-button-visible
              :number="null"
              title="Product Guides"
              description="Explore HitPay with our user-friendly docs."
              :button-options="{
                rightIcon: 'external-link',
                isTransparent: true,
                label: 'Learn more'
              }"
            />

            <OcOnboardingListItem
              class="rounded border border-gray-200 max-w-[420px]"
              is-button-visible
              :number="null"
              title="Pricing"
              description="Explore pricing – no fees, pay per transaction."
              :button-options="{
                rightIcon: 'external-link',
                isTransparent: true,
                label: 'Learn more'
              }"
            />
          </div>
        </OcSection>
</template>
```

## AuthenticationOption

Selectable authentication method card.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-authenticationoption-ocauthenticationoption--docs

kind: leaf · tags: auth, option, card

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isActive | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| width | string | no |  |  |
| height | string | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| iconClass | string | no |  |  |
| chipProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { AuthenticationOption } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex gap-x-4">
          <AuthenticationOption class="w-full" v-bind="{ title: 'Google Authenticator', icon: 'google-authenticator', isActive: false, chipProps: { label: 'Recommended' } }"/>
          <AuthenticationOption class="w-full" v-bind="{ title: 'SMS delivery', icon: 'cellphone', iconClass: 'text-oc-text-400', isActive: true }"/>
        </div>
</template>
```

## VerificationOption

Selectable verification method card.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-verificationoption-ocverificationoption--docs

kind: leaf · tags: verification, option, card

**Related:** RadioGroup

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no | Enter form manually |  |
| icon | string | no | check-2 |  |
| isActive | boolean | no | false |  |
| chipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| title |  |
| content |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { VerificationOption, RadioGroup } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-6">
          <VerificationOption
  title="Enter form manually"
  :chip-options="{ label: '2 days verification', variant: 'warning', icon: 'time' }">
            <template #content>
              <div class="flex flex-col gap-y-3">
                <div class="text-oc-text-400">Filling out the form may take some time. Verification needs
                  <span class="font-medium text-oc-text">2 working days.</span>
                </div>

                <div class="border-t border-oc-gray-100 pt-3">
                  <RadioGroup
                    :model-value="'yes'"
                    :radio="[
                      { label: 'Yes', value: 'yes' },
                      { label: 'No', value: 'no' }
                    ]"
                    label="Is your corporation with multiple layers of ownership?"
                    group-name="radio1"
                    alignment="horizontal"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
            </template>
          </VerificationOption>

          <VerificationOption
  title="Enter form manually"
  :chip-options="{ label: '2 days verification', variant: 'warning', icon: 'time' }" is-active>
            <template #title>
              <img src="/images/singpass.png" alt="singpass"/>
            </template>
            <template #content>
              <div class="text-oc-text-400">
                Singpass enables you to retrieve your personal data from relevant government agencies to pre-fill the
                relevant fields, making digital transaction faster and more convenient. <span
                  class="font-medium text-oc-text">Verification will be instant</span>.
              </div>
            </template>
          </VerificationOption>
        </div>
</template>
```

## Chip

Status or category badge with color and style variants.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/feedback-chip-occhip--docs

kind: leaf · tags: chip, badge, tag, status

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | enum | no | background | background, transparent, outlined |
| variant | enum | no |  | primary, accent-1, accent-2, accent-3, success, warning, error, gray, light-red, neutral, tosca |
| closable | boolean | no |  |  |
| truncate | boolean | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| iconProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| iconSize | string | no |  |  |
| iconTooltip | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Rules

- "type" must be one of: background, transparent, outlined
- "variant" must be one of: primary, accent-1, accent-2, accent-3, success, warning, error, gray, light-red, neutral, tosca

### Examples

#### All Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Chip } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-8">
        <div>
          <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Background</h3>
          <Theme class="flex flex-col gap-3">
            <Chip label="Primary" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 1" variant="accent-1" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 2" variant="accent-2" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 3" variant="accent-3" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Success" variant="success" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Warning" variant="warning" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Error" variant="error" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Gray" variant="gray" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Light Red" variant="light-red" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Neutral" variant="neutral" type="background" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Tosca" variant="tosca" type="background" class="w-fit" />
          </Theme>
        </div>

        <div>
          <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Transparent</h3>
          <Theme class="flex flex-col gap-3">
            <Chip label="Primary" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 1" variant="accent-1" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 2" variant="accent-2" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 3" variant="accent-3" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Success" variant="success" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Warning" variant="warning" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Error" variant="error" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Gray" variant="gray" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Light Red" variant="light-red" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Neutral" variant="neutral" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Tosca" variant="tosca" type="transparent" class="w-fit" />
          </Theme>
        </div>

        <div>
          <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Outlined</h3>
          <Theme class="flex flex-col gap-3">
            <Chip label="Primary" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 1" variant="accent-1" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 2" variant="accent-2" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 3" variant="accent-3" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Success" variant="success" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Warning" variant="warning" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Error" variant="error" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Gray" variant="gray" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Light Red" variant="light-red" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Neutral" variant="neutral" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Tosca" variant="tosca" type="outlined" class="w-fit" />
          </Theme>
        </div>

        <div>
          <h3 class="text-lg font-semibold mb-4">Background with Icons</h3>
          <Theme class="flex flex-col gap-3">
            <Chip label="Primary" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 1" variant="accent-1" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 2" variant="accent-2" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Accent 3" variant="accent-3" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Success" variant="success" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Warning" variant="warning" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Error" variant="error" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Gray" variant="gray" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Light Red" variant="light-red" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Neutral" variant="neutral" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
            <Chip label="Tosca" variant="tosca" type="background" icon="check" closable class="w-fit" />
          </Theme>
        </div>
      </div>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Chip } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<Chip
  label="Primary"
  variant="primary"
  type="background"
  :closable="false" class="w-fit" />
</template>
```

## Snackbar

Toast notification with icon and action buttons.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/feedback-snackbar-ocsnackbar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: toast, notification, alert

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| content | string | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| transitionName | string | no | slide-from-top |  |
| position | string | no | top-center |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no | true |  |
| size | enum | no | default | default, small, big |
| icon | enum | no | filled-check | filled-check, circle, plus, x |
| showIcon | boolean | no | true |  |
| color | enum | no | default | default, primary, error, warning, gray |
| dismissible | boolean | no | false |  |
| isFloating | boolean | no | false |  |
| isRawHtml | boolean | no | false |  |
| secondaryButton | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| primaryButton | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:modelValue | (event: "update:modelValue", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Rules

- "size" must be one of: default, small, big
- "icon" must be one of: filled-check, circle, plus, x
- "color" must be one of: default, primary, error, warning, gray

### Examples

#### Big Size

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Snackbar } from '@orchidui/core'

const visible1 = ref(true)
const visible2 = ref(true)
const visible3 = ref(true)
const visible4 = ref(true)
const visible5 = ref(true)
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-4">
          <Snackbar v-model="visible1" size="big" show-icon icon="filled-check" title="Snackbar title" description="Changes have been successfully saved" dismissible />
          <Snackbar v-model="visible2" size="big" color="primary" show-icon icon="filled-check" title="Snackbar title" description="Changes have been successfully saved" dismissible />
          <Snackbar v-model="visible3" size="big" color="error" show-icon icon="filled-check" title="Snackbar title" description="Changes have been successfully saved" dismissible />
          <Snackbar v-model="visible4" size="big" color="warning" show-icon icon="filled-check" title="Snackbar title" description="Changes have been successfully saved" dismissible />
          <Snackbar v-model="visible5" size="big" color="gray" show-icon icon="filled-check" title="Snackbar title" description="Changes have been successfully saved" dismissible />
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Default

Changes have been successfully saved

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Snackbar } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(true)
</script>

<template>
<Snackbar v-model="modelValue"
  color="default"
  size="default"
  icon="filled-check"
  title="Success"
  content="Changes have been successfully saved"
  description="Changes have been successfully saved"
  :show-icon="true"
  :is-floating="true"
  position="top-center"
  transition-name="slide-from-top"
  :dismissible="false"
  :secondary-button="{ label: 'Action' }"
  :primary-button="{ label: 'Action' }" />
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Snackbar } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-4">
          <Snackbar :model-value="true" show-icon icon="filled-check" content="Changes have been successfully saved" />
          <Snackbar :model-value="true" color="primary" show-icon icon="filled-check" content="Changes have been successfully saved" />
          <Snackbar :model-value="true" color="error" show-icon icon="filled-check" content="Changes have been successfully saved" />
          <Snackbar :model-value="true" color="warning" show-icon icon="filled-check" content="Changes have been successfully saved" />
          <Snackbar :model-value="true" color="gray" show-icon icon="filled-check" content="Changes have been successfully saved" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Banner

Inline notification banner with dismiss support.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/feedback-banner-ocbanner--docs

kind: leaf · tags: banner, notification, alert

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| content | string | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| transitionName | string | no | slide-from-top |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no | true |  |
| icon | enum | no | filled-check | filled-check, circle, plus, x |
| showIcon | boolean | no | true |  |
| color | enum | no | default | default, primary, error, warning, gray |
| dismissible | boolean | no | false |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:modelValue | (event: "update:modelValue", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| title |  |
| default |  |

### Rules

- "icon" must be one of: filled-check, circle, plus, x
- "color" must be one of: default, primary, error, warning, gray

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Banner } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(true)
</script>

<template>
<Banner v-model="modelValue"
  color="default"
  icon="filled-check"
  title="Title"
  content="Changes have been successfully saved"
  :show-icon="true"
  :dismissible="true"
  transition-name="slide-from-top" />
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Banner } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-4">
          <Banner :model-value="true" title="Title" content="Changes have been successfully saved" show-icon icon="filled-check" />
          <Banner :model-value="true" color="primary" title="Title" content="Changes have been successfully saved" show-icon icon="filled-check" />
          <Banner :model-value="true" color="error" title="Title" content="Changes have been successfully saved" show-icon icon="filled-check" />
          <Banner :model-value="true" color="warning" title="Title" content="Changes have been successfully saved" show-icon icon="filled-check" />
          <Banner :model-value="true" color="gray" title="Title" content="Changes have been successfully saved" show-icon icon="filled-check" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## ShareIcon

Icon button for sharing via a channel (e.g. WhatsApp).

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/feedback-shareicon-ocshareicon--docs

kind: leaf · tags: share, icon, social

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isOnlyIcon | boolean | no |  |  |
| text | string | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ShareIcon } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="h-[150px]">
          <ShareIcon
  text="Whatsapp"
  icon="whatsapp"
  :is-only-icon="true"
  :tooltip-options="{ position: 'bottom', distance: 9 }" />
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { ShareIcon } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex gap-4 h-[150px] items-start">
          <ShareIcon icon="whatsapp" text="Whatsapp" />
          <ShareIcon icon="facebook" text="Facebook" />
          <ShareIcon icon="telegram" text="Telegram" />
          <ShareIcon icon="email" text="Email" />
          <ShareIcon icon="tiktok" text="TikTok" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Tag

Small colored label for status annotation.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/feedback-tag-octag--docs

kind: leaf · tags: tag, badge, label, status

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | enum | no | warning | warning, primary, success, error, gray |
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: warning, primary, success, error, gray

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Tag } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<Tag
  label="BETA"
  variant="warning" />
</template>
```

## BaseInput

Form field wrapper with label, hint, and error slot.

kind: leaf · tags: form, input, field

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| ai | boolean | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| labelClass | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| tooltipText |  |
| right-label |  |
| default |  |
| hint |  |

## Button

Action button with primary/secondary/destructive variants.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-button-ocbutton--docs

kind: leaf · tags: button, action, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| variant | enum | no | primary | primary, secondary, destructive |
| size | enum | no | default | default, small, big |
| isTransparent | boolean | no |  |  |
| isActive | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isAdditionalArea | boolean | no |  |  |
| isRoundedFull | boolean | no |  |  |
| iconClass | string | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| leftIcon | enum | no |  | circle, x |
| additionalAreaIcon | enum | no |  | chevron-down, circle |
| rightIcon | enum | no |  | plus, circle |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| addition-click | (event: "addition-click", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |
| additional-content |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: primary, secondary, destructive
- "size" must be one of: default, small, big
- "leftIcon" must be one of: circle, x
- "additionalAreaIcon" must be one of: chevron-down, circle
- "rightIcon" must be one of: plus, circle

### Examples

#### Button Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Button } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <div class="flex gap-5 items-center">
            <Button left-icon="x" />
            <Button left-icon="x" right-icon="circle" label="Button Text" />
            <Button label="Button Text" is-disabled />
            <Button label="Button Text" is-loading />
            <Button label="Button Text" is-transparent />
            <Button label="Button Text" is-additional-area additional-area-icon="chevron-down" />
          </div>
          <div class="flex gap-5 items-center">
            <Button variant="secondary" left-icon="x" />
            <Button variant="secondary" left-icon="x" right-icon="circle" label="Button Text" />
            <Button variant="secondary" label="Button Text" is-disabled />
            <Button variant="secondary" label="Button Text" is-loading />
            <Button variant="secondary" label="Button Text" is-transparent />
            <Button variant="secondary" label="Button Text" is-additional-area additional-area-icon="chevron-down" />
          </div>
          <div class="flex gap-5 items-center">
            <Button variant="destructive" left-icon="x" />
            <Button variant="destructive" left-icon="x" right-icon="circle" label="Button Text" />
            <Button variant="destructive" label="Button Text" is-disabled />
            <Button variant="destructive" label="Button Text" is-loading />
            <Button variant="destructive" label="Button Text" is-transparent />
            <Button variant="destructive" label="Button Text" is-additional-area additional-area-icon="chevron-down" />
          </div>
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Button } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<Button
  label="Button Text"
  variant="primary"
  size="default"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :is-transparent="false"
  :is-rounded-full="false"
  :is-additional-area="false"
  additional-area-icon="chevron-down" />
</template>
```

#### Size Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Button } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
          <div class="flex gap-3 items-center">
            <Button size="small" label="Button Text" />
            <Button label="Button Text" />
            <Button size="big" label="Button Text" />
          </div>
          <div class="flex gap-3 items-center">
            <Button size="small" variant="secondary" label="Button Text" />
            <Button variant="secondary" label="Button Text" />
            <Button size="big" variant="secondary" label="Button Text" />
          </div>
          <div class="flex gap-3 items-center">
            <Button size="small" variant="destructive" label="Button Text" />
            <Button variant="destructive" label="Button Text" />
            <Button size="big" variant="destructive" label="Button Text" />
          </div>
        </div>
</template>
```

## CardInput

Credit card number input with card type detection.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-cardinput-occardinput--docs

kind: leaf · tags: input, payment, card, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | enum | no |  | question-mark |
| isInlineLabel | boolean | no |  |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| cardType | enum | no |  | mastercard, visa |

### Rules

- "labelIcon" must be one of: question-mark
- "cardType" must be one of: mastercard, visa

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { CardInput } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<CardInput v-model="modelValue"
  hint="This is a hint text to help user."
  placeholder="Placeholder"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-required="false"
  :is-inline-label="false"
  card-type="mastercard"
  tooltip-text="Tooltip text"
  :tooltip-options="{ position: 'top', distance: 10 }" />
</template>
```

## Checkbox

Single checkbox input.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-checkbox-occheckbox--docs

kind: leaf · tags: checkbox, form, input

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isPartial | boolean | no |  |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isButtonVariant | boolean | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| topLabel | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| after |  |

### Examples

#### Basic

Single checkbox with v-model, label, and hint.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Checkbox } from '@orchidui/core'

const agreed = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
    <Checkbox
      v-model="agreed"
      label="I agree to the Terms of Service"
      hint="Required to create an account."
    />
    <p class="text-sm text-oc-text-400">Agreed: {{ agreed }}</p>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Button Variant

isButtonVariant renders the checkbox as a full-width bordered card.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Checkbox } from '@orchidui/core'

const email = ref(false)
const sms = ref(true)
</script>

<template>
<Checkbox v-model="email" label="Email notifications" :is-button-variant="true" />
        <Checkbox v-model="sms"   label="SMS notifications"   :is-button-variant="true" />
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Checkbox } from '@orchidui/core'

const checked = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Checkbox v-model="checked"
  label="Accept terms and conditions"
  hint="You must accept before continuing."
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-partial="false"
  :is-button-variant="false" />
        <p class="mt-3 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Checked: {{ checked }}</p>
</template>
```

#### Select All

Partial/indeterminate state for 

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { Checkbox } from '@orchidui/core'

const items = ref([
  { id: 1, name: 'Alice',   selected: false },
  { id: 2, name: 'Bob',     selected: false },
  { id: 3, name: 'Charlie', selected: false }
])

const allSelected  = computed(() => items.value.every(i => i.selected))
const someSelected = computed(() => items.value.some(i => i.selected) && !allSelected.value)

const toggleAll = () => {
  const next = !allSelected.value
  items.value.forEach(i => i.selected = next)
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-2">
    <Checkbox
      :model-value="allSelected"
      :is-partial="someSelected"
      label="Select all"
      @update:model-value="toggleAll"
    />
    <Checkbox
      v-for="item in items"
      :key="item.id"
      v-model="item.selected"
      :label="item.name"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### States

All visual states: unchecked, checked, partial (indeterminate), disabled, and error.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Checkbox } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="grid grid-cols-4 gap-6 w-fit items-start">
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Checkbox />
            <span class="text-xs text-oc-text-300">Unchecked</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Checkbox :model-value="true" />
            <span class="text-xs text-oc-text-300">Checked</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Checkbox is-partial />
            <span class="text-xs text-oc-text-300">Partial</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Checkbox error-message="Required" />
            <span class="text-xs text-oc-text-300">Error</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Checkbox disabled />
            <span class="text-xs text-oc-text-300">Disabled</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Checkbox :model-value="true" disabled />
            <span class="text-xs text-oc-text-300">Disabled checked</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1">
            <Checkbox is-partial disabled />
            <span class="text-xs text-oc-text-300">Disabled partial</span>
          </div>
        </div>
</template>
```

## CheckboxesGroup

Group of checkboxes with select-all support.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-checkboxesgroup-occheckboxesgroup--docs

kind: leaf · tags: checkbox, form, group

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| alignment | enum | no | vertical | vertical, horizontal |
| isButtonVariant | boolean | no |  |  |
| isSelectAll | boolean | no |  |  |
| isBlock | boolean | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| checkboxes | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "alignment" must be one of: vertical, horizontal

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { CheckboxesGroup } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref([])
</script>

<template>
<CheckboxesGroup
          v-model="modelValue"
        />
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { CheckboxesGroup } from '@orchidui/core'

const vertical = ref([])
const horizontal = ref([])
const disabledValue = ref([])
const withError = ref([])
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-6">
          <CheckboxesGroup
            v-model="vertical"
            label="Vertical (default)"
            hint="Select one or more options."
            alignment="vertical"
            :checkboxes="[
              { label: 'Option 1', value: 1 },
              { label: 'Option 2', value: 2 },
              { label: 'Option 3', value: 3 }
            ]"
          />
          <CheckboxesGroup
            v-model="horizontal"
            label="Horizontal"
            alignment="horizontal"
            :checkboxes="[
              { label: 'Option 1', value: 1 },
              { label: 'Option 2', value: 2 },
              { label: 'Option 3', value: 3 }
            ]"
          />
          <CheckboxesGroup
            v-model="disabledValue"
            label="Disabled"
            :is-disabled="true"
            :checkboxes="[
              { label: 'Option 1', value: 1 },
              { label: 'Option 2', value: 2 },
              { label: 'Option 3', value: 3 }
            ]"
          />
          <CheckboxesGroup
            v-model="withError"
            label="With Error"
            error-message="Please select at least one option."
            :checkboxes="[
              { label: 'Option 1', value: 1 },
              { label: 'Option 2', value: 2 },
              { label: 'Option 3', value: 3 }
            ]"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Criteria

Read-only pass/fail criteria indicator.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-criteria-occriteria--docs

kind: leaf · tags: criteria, validation, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | boolean | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Criteria } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Criteria v-model="modelValue"
  :model-value="false"
  label="Text" />
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Criteria } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col w-fit gap-6">
          <Criteria label="Not met" :model-value="false" />
          <Criteria label="Met" :model-value="true" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Input

Text input with icon, prefix, and password toggle.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-input-ocinput--docs

kind: leaf · tags: input, text, form

**Use for:**
- text input field
- password input with toggle
- search input
- numeric or decimal input
- input with currency prefix
- input with prefix or suffix slot

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| placeholder | string | no | Placeholder |  |
| modelValue | string | number | no |  |  |
| disabled | boolean | no | false |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| iconProps | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| ai | boolean | no | false |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| labelClass | string | no |  |  |
| isInlineLabel | boolean | no | false |  |
| isReadonly | boolean | no | false |  |
| inputType | enum | no | text | text, password, email, number, tel, url |
| autocomplete | string | no | one-time-code |  |
| preFill | string | no |  |  |
| hasError | boolean | no | false |  |
| hasLeadingSeparator | boolean | no | true |  |
| inputMode | string | no | text |  |
| pattern | string | no |  |  |
| inputClass | string | no |  |  |
| trailingClass | string | no |  |  |
| leadingClass | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| trailing |  |
| icon |  |
| leading |  |
| hint |  |
| right-label |  |

### Rules

- "inputType" must be one of: text, password, email, number, tel, url

### Examples

#### Basic

Standard text input with label, hint, placeholder, and v-model.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Input } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <Input
    v-model="value"
    label="Full name"
    hint="Enter your legal full name."
    placeholder="Jane Doe"
  />
</template>
```

#### Numeric Input Modes

Use inputMode to control the virtual keyboard on mobile. Use inputType for number spinners.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Input } from '@orchidui/core'

const qty      = ref('')
const price    = ref('')
const phone    = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4 w-[320px]">
    <Input v-model="qty"   label="Quantity"  input-mode="numeric" placeholder="0" />
    <Input v-model="price" label="Price"     input-mode="decimal" placeholder="0.00" pre-fill="SGD" />
    <Input v-model="phone" label="Phone"     input-mode="tel"     icon="phone" placeholder="+65 9123 4567" />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Input } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<Input v-model="value"
  label="Full name"
  hint="Enter your legal full name."
  placeholder="Jane Doe"
  input-type="text"
  :disabled="false"
  :is-readonly="false"
  :is-required="false"
  :is-inline-label="false" />
        <p class="mt-3 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Value: {{ value || '—' }}</p>
</template>
```

#### States

All visual states: normal, disabled, error, readonly, and inline label.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Input } from '@orchidui/core'

const normal   = ref('Editable value')
const disabled = ref('Cannot edit this')
const error    = ref('invalid@')
const readonly = ref('Read-only content')
const inline   = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4 w-[320px]">
    <Input v-model="normal"   label="Normal" />
    <Input v-model="disabled" label="Disabled" :disabled="true" />
    <Input v-model="error"    label="Email" error-message="Please enter a valid email address." />
    <Input v-model="readonly" label="Reference ID" :is-readonly="true" />
    <Input v-model="inline"   label="Search" :is-inline-label="true" placeholder="Type..." />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### With Icon

Left-aligned icon inside the input box using the icon prop or #icon slot.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Input } from '@orchidui/core'

const email    = ref('')
const password = ref('')
const search   = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4 w-[320px]">
    <Input v-model="email"    icon="mail"   label="Email"    placeholder="you@example.com" />
    <Input v-model="search"   icon="search" label="Search"   placeholder="Type to search..." />
    <Input v-model="password" label="Password" input-type="password" placeholder="••••••••" />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### With Label Tooltip

Show a tooltip icon next to the label using labelIcon + tooltipText.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Input } from '@orchidui/core'

const apiKey = ref('')
const fee    = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4 w-[320px]">
    <Input
      v-model="apiKey"
      label="API Key"
      label-icon="info-circle"
      tooltip-text="Found in your developer settings."
      placeholder="sk-..."
      :is-required="true"
    />
    <Input
      v-model="fee"
      label="Platform fee"
      label-icon="info-circle"
      tooltip-text="Percentage charged on every transaction."
      pre-fill="%"
      placeholder="0.00"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### With Prefix Suffix

Trailing slot adds content before the text (left side with separator). Leading slot adds content after the text (right side).

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Input } from '@orchidui/core'

const amount   = ref('')
const username = ref('')
const domain   = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4 w-[320px]">
    <!-- preFill: static text prefix -->
    <Input
      v-model="amount"
      label="Amount"
      placeholder="0.00"
      pre-fill="SGD"
    />

    <!-- #trailing slot: select prefix -->
    <Input v-model="username" label="Username" placeholder="your-handle">
      <template #trailing>
        <span class="text-sm text-oc-text-300">@</span>
      </template>
    </Input>

    <!-- #leading slot: domain suffix -->
    <Input v-model="domain" label="Subdomain" placeholder="mystore">
      <template #leading>
        <span class="text-sm text-oc-text-300">.hitpayapp.com</span>
      </template>
    </Input>
  </div>
</template>
```

## InputOption

Tag-style input for adding multiple free-text values.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-input-ocinputoption--docs

kind: leaf · tags: input, tags, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| isInlineLabel | boolean | no |  |  |
| isReadonly | boolean | no |  |  |
| maxVisibleOptions | number | no | 2 |  |
| allowDuplicated | boolean | no | false |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## PhoneInput

Phone number input with country code selector.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-phoneinput-ocphoneinput--docs

kind: leaf · tags: input, phone, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | unknown[] | no | ["sg", ""] |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| ai | boolean | no | false |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| isInlineLabel | boolean | no |  |  |
| countryCodes | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| initialCountryCode | string | no | sg |  |
| shouldParseCountryCode | boolean | no |  |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { PhoneInput } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[400px]">
          <PhoneInput
            v-model="modelValue"
  label="Label"
  hint="This is a hint text to help user."
  placeholder="Placeholder"
  :disabled="false"
  :is-required="false"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Radio

Single radio button input.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-radio-ocradio--docs

kind: leaf · tags: radio, form, input

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isButtonVariant | boolean | no |  |  |
| checked | boolean | no |  |  |
| isButtonVariantWithRadio | boolean | no |  |  |
| id | string | number | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | boolean | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| groupName | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |
| tooltipText |  |

### Examples

#### Basic

Standard radio buttons grouped by groupName. Only one can be selected at a time.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Radio } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref('monthly')

const plans = [
  { label: 'Monthly billing', value: 'monthly' },
  { label: 'Yearly billing (save 20%)', value: 'yearly' },
  { label: 'Enterprise', value: 'enterprise' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-3">
    <Radio
      v-for="plan in plans"
      :key="plan.value"
      :model-value="plan.value"
      :label="plan.label"
      :checked="selected === plan.value"
      group-name="billing"
      @update:model-value="selected = $event"
    />
    <p class="text-sm text-oc-text-400">Selected: {{ selected }}</p>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Button Variant

Button-style radios render as bordered card options. Add icon for visual context.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Radio } from '@orchidui/core'

const channel = ref('email')

const channels = [
  { label: 'Email', value: 'email', icon: 'email' },
  { label: 'SMS', value: 'sms', icon: 'phone' },
  { label: 'Facebook', value: 'facebook', icon: 'facebook' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex gap-3">
    <Radio
      v-for="(c, i) in channels"
      :key="c.value"
      :id="i"
      :model-value="c.value"
      :label="c.label"
      :icon="c.icon"
      :checked="channel === c.value"
      group-name="channel"
      :is-button-variant="true"
      @update:model-value="channel = $event"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Radio } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref('a')
</script>

<template>
<Radio
  label="Option A"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-button-variant="false"
  :is-button-variant-with-radio="false" model-value="a" :checked="selected === 'a'" group-name="playground" :id="1" @update:model-value="selected = $event" />
        <Radio
  label="Option A"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-button-variant="false"
  :is-button-variant-with-radio="false" model-value="b" :checked="selected === 'b'" label="Option B" group-name="playground" :id="2" @update:model-value="selected = $event" />
        <p class="text-sm text-oc-text-400 mt-2">Selected: {{ selected }}</p>
</template>
```

#### States

All visual states: unchecked, checked, disabled unchecked, disabled checked, and error.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Radio } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="grid grid-cols-3 w-fit gap-6">
          <Radio :model-value="false" label="Unchecked" group-name="states" :id="1" />
          <Radio :model-value="true"  label="Checked"   group-name="states" :id="2" :checked="true" />
          <Radio :model-value="false" label="Error"     group-name="states" :id="3" error-message="Required" />
          <Radio :model-value="false" label="Disabled"       group-name="states" :id="4" is-disabled />
          <Radio :model-value="true"  label="Disabled checked" group-name="states" :id="5" is-disabled :checked="true" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## RadioGroup

Group of radio buttons.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-radiogroup-ocradiogroup--docs

kind: leaf · tags: radio, form, group

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| alignment | enum | no | vertical | vertical, horizontal |
| isButtonVariant | boolean | no |  |  |
| isBlock | boolean | no |  |  |
| isButtonVariantWithRadio | boolean | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| groupName | string | no |  |  |
| radio | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| wrapperClass | string | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "alignment" must be one of: vertical, horizontal

### Examples

#### Button Variants

Button-style radio group renders each option as a bordered card. Works best for short option lists.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { RadioGroup } from '@orchidui/core'

const channel = ref('email')

const channels = [
  { label: 'Email',    value: 'email',    icon: 'email' },
  { label: 'SMS',      value: 'sms',      icon: 'phone' },
  { label: 'Facebook', value: 'facebook', icon: 'facebook' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <RadioGroup
    v-model="channel"
    label="Notification channel"
    group-name="channel"
    :radio="channels"
    alignment="horizontal"
    :is-button-variant="true"
  />
</template>
```

#### Horizontal

Horizontal layout — options flow in a row. Useful for short option lists.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { RadioGroup } from '@orchidui/core'

const size = ref('medium')

const sizes = [
  { label: 'Small',  value: 'small' },
  { label: 'Medium', value: 'medium' },
  { label: 'Large',  value: 'large' },
  { label: 'XL',     value: 'xl' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <RadioGroup
    v-model="size"
    label="Size"
    group-name="size"
    :radio="sizes"
    alignment="horizontal"
  />
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { RadioGroup } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref('monthly')
</script>

<template>
<RadioGroup
          v-model="selected"
  alignment="vertical"
  label="Billing cycle"
  hint="Choose how you want to be billed."
  :is-button-variant="false"
  :is-button-variant-with-radio="false"
  :is-block="false"
          group-name="playground-billing"
          :radio="options"
        />
        <p class="mt-3 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Selected: {{ selected }}</p>
</template>
```

#### Vertical

Default vertical layout. Options are stacked in a column.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { RadioGroup } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref('card')

const paymentMethods = [
  { label: 'Credit / Debit card', value: 'card' },
  { label: 'PayNow',              value: 'paynow' },
  { label: 'Bank transfer',       value: 'bank' },
  { label: 'Cash on delivery',    value: 'cod', isDisabled: true }
]
</script>

<template>
  <RadioGroup
    v-model="selected"
    label="Payment method"
    hint="Select how the customer will pay."
    group-name="payment"
    :radio="paymentMethods"
    alignment="vertical"
  />
  <p class="mt-3 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Selected: {{ selected }}</p>
</template>
```

#### With Error

Error state applied to the whole group.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { RadioGroup } from '@orchidui/core'

const selected = ref()
</script>

<template>
<RadioGroup v-model="selected" label="Pick one" group-name="error-demo" :radio="options" error-message="Please select an option." />
</template>
```

## RangeInput

Dual numeric input for a min/max range.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-rangeinput-ocrangeinput--docs

kind: leaf · tags: input, range, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| label | string | no | Amount |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| maxLimit | string | number | no | 10000 |  |
| minLimit | string | number | no | 0 |  |
| minGap | string | number | no | 0 |  |
| onlyInput | boolean | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { RangeInput } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<RangeInput v-model="modelValue"
  :max-limit="100"
  :min-limit="0"
  :min-gap="0"
  :only-input="true" />
</template>
```

## Select

Dropdown with single/multi select, filtering, and async search.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-select-ocselect--docs

kind: leaf · tags: select, dropdown, form, filter

**Use for:**
- dropdown selection field
- single select input
- multi select with checkboxes
- async search dropdown
- grouped options select
- filter field in forms

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| popperOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| placeholder | string | no | Placeholder |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isTransparent | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| chipProps | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| ai | boolean | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| isInlineLabel | boolean | no |  |  |
| isSelectAll | boolean | no |  |  |
| isReadonly | boolean | no |  |  |
| maxVisibleOptions | number | no | 0 |  |
| defaultSearchPlaceholder | string | no | Search |  |
| inlineSearchPlaceholder | string | no | Search |  |
| isFilterable | boolean | no |  |  |
| isAsynchronousSearch | boolean | no |  |  |
| isCheckboxes | boolean | no |  |  |
| isAddNew | boolean | no |  |  |
| isSlim | boolean | no |  |  |
| hideChevron | boolean | no |  |  |
| multiple | boolean | no |  |  |
| isInlineSearch | boolean | no |  |  |
| isClearable | boolean | no |  |  |
| options | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | number | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| maxOptionAllowed | number | no |  |  |
| searchKeywords | string | no |  |  |
| menuClasses | string | no |  |  |
| dropdownClasses | string | no |  |  |
| selectTextClass | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| selection |  |
| default |  |
| empty |  |
| infinite-scrolling |  |
| selectTooltipText |  |
| hint |  |

### Examples

#### Async Search

Server-side search. Set is-asynchronous-search to disable client-side filtering. Listen to onSearchKeywords, debounce, then replace options with the server response.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const value   = ref(null)
const options = ref([])
const isLoading = ref(false)

let timer = null
function onSearch(query) {
  isLoading.value = true
  clearTimeout(timer)
  timer = setTimeout(async () => {
    // Replace with real API call
    options.value = [
      { label: \`Result for "\${query}" 1\`, value: '1' },
      { label: \`Result for "\${query}" 2\`, value: '2' }
    ]
    isLoading.value = false
  }, 400)
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[320px] h-[280px]">
    <Select
      v-model="value"
      label="Search users"
      placeholder="Type to search..."
      is-filterable
      is-asynchronous-search
      :is-loading="isLoading"
      :options="options"
      @on-search-keywords="onSearch"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Basic

Single-value select with label and hint. v-model receives the selected option value (not the option object).

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref(null)

const options = [
  { label: 'Indonesia', value: 'ID' },
  { label: 'Singapore', value: 'SG' },
  { label: 'Malaysia',  value: 'MY' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[300px] h-[250px]">
    <Select
      v-model="value"
      label="Country"
      hint="Select your country."
      placeholder="Select a country..."
      :options="options"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Filterable

Searchable dropdown — shows a search input inside the menu. For async search, set is-asynchronous-search and listen to onSearchKeywords.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref(null)

const options = [
  { label: 'Australia', value: 'AU' },
  { label: 'Canada',    value: 'CA' },
  { label: 'France',    value: 'FR' },
  { label: 'Germany',   value: 'DE' },
  { label: 'Indonesia', value: 'ID' },
```
