```vue
  { label: 'Japan',     value: 'JP' },
  { label: 'Singapore', value: 'SG' },
  { label: 'UK',        value: 'GB' },
  { label: 'USA',       value: 'US' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[300px] h-[350px]">
    <Select
      v-model="value"
      label="Country"
      placeholder="Search countries..."
      is-filterable
      :options="options"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Grouped Options

Options organized into labeled groups. Pass objects with { label, values: [...] } instead of flat options. Flat and grouped can be mixed.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref(null)

const options = [
  { label: 'Most Popular', value: 'popular' },
  {
    label: 'Southeast Asia',
    values: [
      { label: 'Indonesia', value: 'ID' },
      { label: 'Singapore', value: 'SG' },
      { label: 'Malaysia',  value: 'MY' }
    ]
  },
  {
    label: 'Europe',
    values: [
      { label: 'Germany', value: 'DE' },
      { label: 'France',  value: 'FR' },
      { label: 'UK',      value: 'GB' }
    ]
  }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[300px] h-[400px]">
    <Select
      v-model="value"
      label="Region"
      placeholder="Select region..."
      is-filterable
      :options="options"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Inline Label

Compact inline label inside the trigger — used in table toolbars (e.g. 

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const perPage = ref(10)

const options = [
  { label: '10', value: 10 },
  { label: '25', value: 25 },
  { label: '50', value: 50 },
  { label: '100', value: 100 }
]
</script>

<template>
  <Select
    v-model="perPage"
    label="Per page"
    is-inline-label
    is-slim
    :options="options"
  />
</template>
```

#### Multi Select

Multi-value select. v-model is an array. Selected values appear as Chip tags. is-checkboxes shows a checkbox per option.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref([])

const options = [
  { label: 'Design',      value: 'design' },
  { label: 'Engineering', value: 'eng' },
  { label: 'Marketing',   value: 'mkt' },
  { label: 'Sales',       value: 'sales' },
  { label: 'Support',     value: 'support' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[350px] h-[300px]">
    <Select
      v-model="values"
      label="Departments"
      placeholder="Select departments..."
      multiple
      is-filterable
      is-checkboxes
      is-select-all
      :options="options"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
<Select v-model="value"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-filterable="false"
  :is-clearable="false"
  :is-loading="false"
  :multiple="false"
  :is-checkboxes="false"
  label="Country"
  placeholder="Select a country..." :options="options" />
</template>
```

#### States

All interactive states: disabled, readonly, with error, and clearable.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const options = [
  { label: 'Singapore', value: 'SG' },
  { label: 'Malaysia',  value: 'MY' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-6 w-[300px] h-[600px]">
    <Select
      model-value="SG"
      label="Disabled"
      is-disabled
      :options="options"
    />
    <Select
      model-value="MY"
      label="Read-only"
      is-readonly
      :options="options"
    />
    <Select
      :model-value="null"
      label="With error"
      error-message="Please select a country."
      :options="options"
    />
    <Select
      model-value="SG"
      label="Clearable"
      is-clearable
      :options="options"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### With Add New

Shows an 

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Select } from '@orchidui/core'

const value   = ref(null)
const options = ref([
  { label: 'Category A', value: 'a' },
  { label: 'Category B', value: 'b' }
])

function onAddNew() {
  const n = options.value.length + 1
  options.value.push({ label: \`Category \${n}\`, value: \`cat\${n}\` })
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[300px] h-[300px]">
    <Select
      v-model="value"
      label="Category"
      placeholder="Select or create..."
      is-add-new
      :options="options"
      @add-new="onAddNew"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

## Option

Single option item inside Select.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-select-ocoption--docs

kind: leaf · tags: select, option, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isPartial | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isCheckboxes | boolean | no |  |  |
| hasChildren | boolean | no |  |  |
| showChildren | boolean | no |  |  |
| isSelected | number | boolean | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| subLabel | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| trailing |  |
| sub-label |  |
| leading |  |
| after |  |

## GroupOptions

Labeled group of options inside Select.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-select-ocgroupoptions--docs

kind: leaf · tags: select, group, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

## Toggle

On/off toggle switch.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-toggle-octoggle--docs

kind: leaf · tags: toggle, switch, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | boolean | no |  |  |
| size | enum | no | default | default, small |
| disabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "size" must be one of: default, small

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Toggle } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Toggle v-model="modelValue"
  size="default"
  :disabled="false"
  label="Label" />
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { Toggle } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 w-fit items-center gap-6">
          <Toggle :model-value="true" />
          <Toggle :model-value="true" size="small" />
          <Toggle :model-value="false" />
          <Toggle :model-value="false" size="small" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## LinkInput

Input for social or custom links with platform selector.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-linkinput-oclinkinput--docs

kind: leaf · tags: input, link, social, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isEdit | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | enum | no |  | question-mark |
| isInlineLabel | boolean | no |  |  |
| errorMessages | Record<string, any> | no | {
    link: "",
    title: ""
} |  |
| links | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| type | string | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "labelIcon" must be one of: question-mark

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { LinkInput } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('')
const linkType = ref('twitter')
const linkTitle = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[200px]">
          <LinkInput
            v-model="modelValue"
            v-model:type="linkType"
            v-model:title="linkTitle"
  label="Enter Username"
  placeholder="@username"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-required="false"
  :is-inline-label="false"
  tooltip-text="Tooltip text"
  :tooltip-options="{ position: 'top', distance: 10 }"
  :error-messages="{ link: 'error', title: 'error' }"
  :links="[{ value: 'facebook', placeholder: '@username', label: 'Facebook', icon: 'facebook', preFill: 'https://facebook.com/' }, { value: 'instagram', label: 'Instagram', icon: 'instagram', preFill: 'https://instagram.com/' }, { value: 'twitter', label: '(X) Twitter', icon: 'twitter', preFill: 'https://twitter.com/' }, { value: 'tiktok', label: 'Tiktok', icon: 'tiktok', preFill: 'https://tiktok.com/' }, { value: 'link', label: 'Other website', placeholder: 'website.com', icon: 'earth', preFill: 'https://' }]"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## TextArea

Multi-line text input with auto-resize.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-textarea-octextarea--docs

kind: leaf · tags: textarea, input, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| ai | boolean | no | false |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| autoResize | boolean | no | false |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| rows | number | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Basic

Standard textarea with label, hint, placeholder, and v-model.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TextArea } from '@orchidui/core'

const notes = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[400px]">
    <TextArea
      v-model="notes"
      label="Order notes"
      hint="Add any special instructions for this order."
      placeholder="e.g. Leave at the door."
      :rows="4"
    />
    <p class="mt-2 text-sm text-oc-text-400">{{ notes.length }} chars</p>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TextArea } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<TextArea v-model="modelValue"
  label="Label"
  hint="This is a hint text to help user."
  placeholder="Placeholder"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-required="false"
  :rows="5" />
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TextArea } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<TextArea v-model="value"
  label="Description"
  hint="Enter a detailed description."
  placeholder="Type here..."
  :rows="5"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-required="false"
  :auto-resize="false" />
        <p class="mt-3 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Length: {{ value.length }}</p>
</template>
```

#### States

Normal, disabled, and error states.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TextArea } from '@orchidui/core'

const normal   = ref('')
const disabled = ref('This field is locked.')
const error    = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-6 w-[400px]">
    <TextArea v-model="normal"   label="Normal"   placeholder="Type something..." :rows="3" />
    <TextArea v-model="disabled" label="Disabled" :is-disabled="true" :rows="3" />
    <TextArea v-model="error"    label="Notes"    error-message="This field is required." :rows="3" />
  </div>
</template>
```

## Calendar

Standalone date or date-range calendar picker.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-calendar-occalendar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: calendar, date, picker, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | enum | no | default | default, range |
| position | string | no | floating |  |
| disabledDate | Function | no | false |  |
| isIndefinite | boolean | no | false |  |
| inDefiniteLabel | string | no | Indefinite |  |
| modelValue | string | number | Date | unknown[] | no | null |  |
| minDate | string | number | Date | no | null |  |
| maxDate | string | number | Date | no | null |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| bottom |  |

### Rules

- "type" must be one of: default, range

### Examples

#### Date Range

Range calendar — select start and end date. v-model is [startDate, endDate].

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Calendar } from '@orchidui/core'

const range = ref([])
</script>

<template>
  <div>
    <Calendar v-model="range" type="range" />
    <p class="mt-3 text-sm text-oc-text-400">
      From: {{ range[0] || '—' }} · To: {{ range[1] || '—' }}
    </p>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Calendar } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<Calendar v-model="modelValue"
  :is-range="false"
  :is-multiple="false"
  :disabled-dates="[]" />
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Calendar } from '@orchidui/core'

const value = ref(args.type === 'range' ? [] : '')
</script>

<template>
<Calendar v-model="value"
  type="default" />
        <p class="mt-4 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Value: {{ Array.isArray(value) ? (value.join(' → ') || '—') : (value || '—') }}</p>
</template>
```

#### Single Date

Inline single-date calendar. v-model is a Date object or formatted string.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Calendar } from '@orchidui/core'

const date = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div>
    <Calendar v-model="date" />
    <p class="mt-3 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Selected: {{ date || '—' }}</p>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### With Constraints

Restrict selectable dates using minDate and maxDate.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Calendar } from '@orchidui/core'

const date = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<p class="text-sm text-oc-text-400 mb-3">Only next 30 days selectable</p>
        <Calendar v-model="date" :min-date="today" :max-date="in30Days" />
        <p class="mt-4 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Selected: {{ date || '—' }}</p>
</template>
```

## DatePicker

Date or range picker input with popover calendar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-datepicker-datepicker--docs

kind: leaf · tags: datepicker, date, form

**Use for:**
- date selection field
- date range picker
- report period filter
- delivery date with min/max constraints
- date field in FormBuilder

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | enum | no | default | default, range |
| placeholder | string | no | YYYY-MM-DD |  |
| disabled | boolean | no | false |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| ai | boolean | no | false |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| placement | string | no | bottom-start |  |
| disabledDate | Function | no | false |  |
| isIndefinite | boolean | no | false |  |
| dateFormat | enum | no | YYYY-MM-DD | YYYY-MM-DD, DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD MMM YYYY |
| isSplitInput | boolean | no | true |  |
| minLabel | string | no | From |  |
| maxLabel | string | no | To |  |
| disabledRange | Record<string, any> | no | {
    start: null,
    end: null
} |  |
| countCalendars | number | no | 2 |  |
| shortcuts | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| modelValue | string | number | Date | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| minDate | string | number | Date | no | null |  |
| maxDate | string | number | Date | no | null |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| menu |  |

### Rules

- "type" must be one of: default, range
- "dateFormat" must be one of: YYYY-MM-DD, DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD MMM YYYY

### Examples

#### Custom Format

Change the date format string. The same format is used for display, input parsing, and the v-model value.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const date = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[280px] h-[420px]">
    <DatePicker
      v-model="date"
      label="Date (DD/MM/YYYY)"
      placeholder="DD/MM/YYYY"
      date-format="DD/MM/YYYY"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Date Range

Range picker. v-model is an array [startDate, endDate]. isSplitInput shows two separate text inputs.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const range = ref([])
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[360px] h-[500px]">
    <DatePicker
      v-model="range"
      type="range"
      label="Date range"
      hint="Select start and end date."
      date-format="YYYY-MM-DD"
      min-label="From"
      max-label="To"
    />
    <p class="mt-4 text-sm text-oc-text-400">
      From: {{ range[0] || '—' }} · To: {{ range[1] || '—' }}
    </p>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Disabled State

Disabled date picker — non-interactive with reduced opacity.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const date = ref('2025-06-15')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[280px]">
    <DatePicker
      v-model="date"
      label="Locked date"
      :disabled="true"
      date-format="YYYY-MM-DD"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const date = ref(args.type === 'range' ? [] : '')
</script>

<template>
<DatePicker v-model="date"
  type="default"
  date-format="YYYY-MM-DD"
  label="Date"
  hint="Select a date."
  :disabled="false"
  :is-required="false"
  :is-indefinite="false" :placeholder="'YYYY-MM-DD'" />
        <p class="mt-4 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Value: {{ Array.isArray(date) ? (date.join(' → ') || '—') : (date || '—') }}</p>
</template>
```

#### Single Date

Single date picker. v-model is a formatted string (default YYYY-MM-DD).

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const date = ref('')
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[280px] h-[400px]">
    <DatePicker
      v-model="date"
      label="Date"
      hint="Select a date."
      placeholder="YYYY-MM-DD"
      date-format="YYYY-MM-DD"
    />
    <p class="mt-4 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Selected: {{ date || '—' }}</p>
  </div>
</template>
```

#### With Constraints

Disable dates outside a valid range using minDate and maxDate.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const date = ref('')

// Allow only the next 30 days
const today   = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10)
const in30Days = new Date(Date.now() + 30 * 86400000).toISOString().slice(0, 10)
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[280px] h-[420px]">
    <DatePicker
      v-model="date"
      label="Delivery date"
      hint="Only the next 30 days are available."
      :min-date="today"
      :max-date="in30Days"
      date-format="YYYY-MM-DD"
    />
  </div>
</template>
```

#### With Shortcuts

Quick-select shortcut buttons shown above the calendar for common date ranges.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const range = ref([])

const today = new Date()
const fmt = (d) => d.toISOString().slice(0, 10)

const shortcuts = [
  {
    label: 'Last 7 days',
    range: [fmt(new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 86400000)), fmt(today)]
  },
  {
    label: 'Last 30 days',
    range: [fmt(new Date(Date.now() - 29 * 86400000)), fmt(today)]
  },
  {
    label: 'This month',
    range: [
      fmt(new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth(), 1)),
      fmt(new Date(today.getFullYear(), today.getMonth() + 1, 0))
    ]
  }
]
</script>

<template>
  <div class="w-[360px] h-[520px]">
    <DatePicker
      v-model="range"
      type="range"
      label="Report period"
      date-format="YYYY-MM-DD"
      :shortcuts="shortcuts"
    />
    <p class="mt-4 text-sm text-oc-text-400">
      From: {{ range[0] || '—' }} · To: {{ range[1] || '—' }}
    </p>
  </div>
</template>
```

## Slider

Range or single value slider.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-slider-ocslider--docs

kind: leaf · tags: slider, range, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | enum | no | default | default, range |
| variant | string | no | default |  |
| modelValue | string | number | unknown[] | no | 0 |  |
| maxLimit | number | no | 100 |  |
| minLimit | number | no | 0 |  |
| minGap | number | no | 0 |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| min-limit-label |  |
| max-limit-label |  |

### Rules

- "type" must be one of: default, range

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Slider } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(20)
const rangeModelValue = ref([0, 50])
</script>

<template>
<div class="p-4 w-full">
          <Slider
            :model-value="'default' === 'range' ? rangeModelValue : modelValue"
            :min-gap="0"
            :min-limit="0"
            :max-limit="100"
            :type="'default'"
            @update:model-value="'default' === 'range' ? rangeModelValue = $event : modelValue = $event"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Variant Right Input

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Slider } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(20)
const rangeModelValue = ref([0, 50])
</script>

<template>
<div class="p-4 w-full flex flex-col gap-8">
          <div>
            <p class="mb-2 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Default with right input</p>
            <Slider
              v-model="modelValue"
              variant="right"
              :min-limit="0"
              :max-limit="100"
            />
          </div>
          <div>
            <p class="mb-2 text-sm text-oc-text-400">Range with right input</p>
            <Slider
              :model-value="rangeModelValue"
              type="range"
              variant="right"
              :min-limit="0"
              :max-limit="100"
              @update:model-value="rangeModelValue = $event"
            />
          </div>
        </div>
</template>
```

## SectionItem

Settings row with title, toggle, and action slot.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-sectionitem-ocsectionitem--docs

kind: leaf · tags: settings, form, toggle

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| description | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no | false |  |
| descriptionClass | string | no |  |  |
| isToggle | boolean | no |  |  |
| defaultValue | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| icon | enum | no |  | information, check, x |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| toggleProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| popperMessage | string | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:modelValue | (event: "update:modelValue", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| actions |  |

### Rules

- "icon" must be one of: information, check, x

### Examples

#### Default

Description

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SectionItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<SectionItem
          v-model="modelValue"
  title="Title"
  description="Description"
  :is-toggle="true"
  icon="check"
  popper-message="Information"
        />
</template>
```

#### Variants

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SectionItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const toggle1 = ref(false)
const toggle2 = ref(true)
const toggle3 = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-4 p-4">
          <SectionItem
            v-model="toggle1"
            title="Default"
            description="A section item with a toggle."
            :is-toggle="true"
            icon="check"
          />
          <SectionItem
            v-model="toggle2"
            title="Enabled by default"
            description="This section item is toggled on."
            :is-toggle="true"
            icon="check"
          />
          <SectionItem
            v-model="toggle3"
            title="With error"
            description="This section item has an error message."
            :is-toggle="true"
            icon="information"
            error-message="This setting is required."
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## SelectOptions

Visual option picker in grid or list layout.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-selectoptions-ocselectoptions--docs

kind: leaf · tags: select, options, form, grid

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | enum | no | grid | grid, list, list2 |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| isSmallImage | boolean | no |  |  |
| optionType | enum | no | "text" // text, icon, image
 | text, icon, image |
| borderless | boolean | no |  |  |
| options | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | number | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| option |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: grid, list, list2
- "optionType" must be one of: text, icon, image

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SelectOptions } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
<SelectOptions
          v-model="modelValue"
        />
</template>
```

#### Variants

Description for option 1

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SelectOptions } from '@orchidui/core'

const grid = ref(null)
const list = ref(null)
const list2 = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-6">
          <SelectOptions
            v-model="grid"
            label="Grid (default)"
            hint="Select one of the options below."
            variant="grid"
            :options="[
              { label: 'Option 1', value: 1 },
              { label: 'Option 2', value: 2 },
              { label: 'Option 3', value: 3 }
            ]"
          />
          <SelectOptions
            v-model="list"
            label="List"
            hint="Select one of the options below."
            variant="list"
            :options="[
              { label: 'Option 1', value: 1, description: 'Description for option 1' },
              { label: 'Option 2', value: 2, description: 'Description for option 2' },
              { label: 'Option 3', value: 3, description: 'Description for option 3' }
            ]"
          />
          <SelectOptions
            v-model="list2"
            label="List 2"
            hint="Select one of the options below."
            variant="list2"
            :options="[
              { label: 'Option 1', value: 1, description: 'Smaller height, fits screen width' },
              { label: 'Option 2', value: 2, description: 'Smaller height, fits screen width' }
            ]"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## SingleFileUpload

Single file upload with preview and size limit.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-singlefileupload-ocsinglefileupload--docs

kind: leaf · tags: upload, file, form

**Use for:**
- file upload field
- image upload with preview
- document attachment in form
- avatar or logo upload
- CSV import button

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | string | no | upload |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| format | string | no | array |  |
| isPreview | boolean | no |  |  |
| confirmToRemove | boolean | no |  |  |
| showErrorStyleOnly | boolean | no |  |  |
| isImageOnly | boolean | no |  |  |
| showUploadImageArea | boolean | no |  |  |
| validateAcceptFileType | boolean | no |  |  |
| allowToEdit | boolean | no | true |  |
| shouldTruncateFileName | boolean | no |  |  |
| isButtonOnly | boolean | no |  |  |
| buttonUploadProps | Record<string, any> | no | {
    label: "Upload"
} |  |
| modelValue | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| labelClass | string | no |  |  |
| maxSize | number | no |  |  |
| accept | string | no |  |  |
| imageClasses | string | no |  |  |
| uploadButtonOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| progress |  |
| hint |  |

### Examples

#### Button Only

Renders just an upload button — no drag area. Useful when the upload action is one step in a larger form.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SingleFileUpload } from '@orchidui/core'

const file = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
  <SingleFileUpload
    v-model="file"
    is-button-only
    accept=".csv"
    :button-upload-props="{
      label: 'Import CSV',
      leftIcon: 'upload',
      variant: 'secondary'
    }"
  />
</template>
```

#### Default

Drag-and-drop file upload area. Shows file name + progress bar after selection. Emits update:modelValue with the file object.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SingleFileUpload } from '@orchidui/core'

const file = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
  <SingleFileUpload
    v-model="file"
    label="Attachment"
    hint="PDF, PNG, or JPG up to 5 MB."
    accept=".pdf,.png,.jpg"
    :max-size="5"
    @on-exceed-max-file-size="alert('File exceeds 5 MB')"
    @on-remove-file="file = null"
  />
</template>
```

#### Disabled

Disabled state — upload area is non-interactive. Use when a prerequisite step must be completed first.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SingleFileUpload } from '@orchidui/core'

const file = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
  <SingleFileUpload
    v-model="file"
    label="Upload (disabled)"
    hint="Complete the previous step to enable upload."
    is-disabled
  />
</template>
```

#### Image Only

Compact image-only upload. Shows a square preview area with edit/delete overlay. Ideal for avatars and cover photos.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SingleFileUpload } from '@orchidui/core'

const image = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
  <SingleFileUpload
    v-model="image"
    label="Profile photo"
    hint="JPG or PNG. Recommended: 400×400px."
    accept="image/*"
    :max-size="2"
    is-image-only
    show-upload-image-area
    :allow-to-edit="true"
  />
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SingleFileUpload } from '@orchidui/core'

const file = ref(null)
</script>

<template>
<SingleFileUpload v-model="file"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :is-image-only="false"
  :show-upload-image-area="false"
  :is-button-only="false"
  :is-preview="true"
  :confirm-to-remove="false"
  label="Attachment"
  hint="PDF, PNG, or JPG up to 5 MB."
  accept=".pdf,.png,.jpg"
  :max-size="5" />
</template>
```

#### With Error

Pass errorMessage to show validation errors below the upload area. Clear on file selection. Use showErrorStyleOnly for red border without text.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SingleFileUpload } from '@orchidui/core'

const file  = ref(null)
const error = ref('A file is required to continue.')
</script>

<template>
  <SingleFileUpload
    v-model="file"
    label="Contract"
    accept=".pdf"
    :error-message="error"
    @update:model-value="error = ''"
  />
</template>
```

## MultipleUploadFile

Multiple file upload with preview grid.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-multipleuploadfile-ocmultipleuploadfile--docs

kind: leaf · tags: upload, file, form, gallery

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| confirmToRemove | boolean | no |  |  |
| showErrorStyleOnly | boolean | no |  |  |
| isImageOnly | boolean | no |  |  |
| accept | string | no |  |  |
| validateAcceptFileType | boolean | no |  |  |
| isButtonOnly | boolean | no |  |  |
| buttonUploadProps | Record<string, any> | no | {
    label: "Upload"
} |  |
| selectedImage | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| maxSize | number | no |  |  |
| inputOptions | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| maxImages | number | no |  |  |
| columnsCount | number | no |  |  |
| labelUploadArea | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| action |  |
| button |  |
| progress |  |
| hint |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { MultipleUploadFile } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref([])
</script>

<template>
<MultipleUploadFile v-model="modelValue"
  :max-size="5"
  :is-image-only="false"
  :columns-count="3"
  :is-button-only="true"
  :button-upload-props="{ label: 'Upload', leftIcon: 'upload' }" />
</template>
```

#### Multiple Images

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { MultipleUploadFile } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref([
        {
          current: {
            id: 'image_1',
            path: 'https://hitpay-staging-public.s3.ap-southeast-1.amazonaws.com/covers/small/99d696e564ba45fbaa0fb2e3b43d0e27.jpg',
            caption: 'Image 1'
          }
        }
      ])
</script>

<template>
<MultipleUploadFile
          v-model="modelValue"
          is-image-only
          label="Product Images"
          hint="The optimal product image size is at least 800x800 px. PNG and JPG format is supported."
          :max-images="4"
          :columns-count="3"
          :input-options="['caption', 'link', 'lightbox', 'new_tab']"
        />
</template>
```

## NumberInput

Numeric input with increment/decrement buttons.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-numberinput-ocnumberinput--docs

kind: leaf · tags: input, number, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no |  |  |
| minValue | number | no | 1 |  |
| modelValue | string | number | no | null |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| inputClass | string | Record<string, any> | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:modelValue | (event: "update:modelValue", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { NumberInput } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref(0)
</script>

<template>
<NumberInput
          v-model="modelValue"
  label="Label"
  hint="This is a hint text to help user."
  placeholder="Placeholder"
  :disabled="false"
  :step="1"
        />
</template>
```

## Avatar

User or business avatar in multiple sizes.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/mediaandicons-avatar-ocavatar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: avatar, image, user

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | enum | no | default | default, business, image |
| size | enum | no | 32 | 24, 32, 40, 48, 64 |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Rules

- "type" must be one of: default, business, image
- "size" must be one of: 24, 32, 40, 48, 64

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Avatar } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[400px] flex items-center justify-center">
          <Avatar
  :size="32"
  type="default" />
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Sizes

```vue
<script setup>
import { Avatar } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full flex gap-x-6">
          <div class="flex flex-col gap-y-4">
            <Avatar v-for="size in [64, 48, 40, 32, 24]" :key="size" :size="size" />
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col gap-y-4">
            <Avatar v-for="size in [64, 48, 40, 32, 24]" :key="size" :size="size" type="business" />
          </div>
          <div class="flex flex-col gap-y-4">
            <Avatar v-for="size in [64, 48, 40, 32, 24]" :key="size" :size="size" type="image" />
          </div>
        </div>
</template>
```

## Icon

SVG icon by name from the OrchidUI icon set.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/mediaandicons-icon-ocicon--docs

kind: leaf · tags: icon, svg, media

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| name | string | yes |  |  |
| path | string | no | /icons/orchidui |  |
| width | string | number | no | 24 |  |
| height | string | number | no | 24 |  |

### Rules

- Required props: name

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Icon } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[400px] flex items-center justify-center">
          <Icon
  name="flags/SG"
  width="22"
  height="16" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Dropdown

Popover dropdown menu attached to a trigger.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-dropdown-ocdropdown--docs

kind: composite · tags: dropdown, menu, overlay

**Use for:**
- context menu
- row actions menu
- options dropdown
- action menu trigger

**Understand with:** DropdownItem, Button, Icon

**Related:** Button, DropdownItem, Icon

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| distance | number | no | 4 |  |
| skidding | number | no | 0 |  |
| popperOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isAttachToBody | boolean | no |  |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no |  |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| placement | enum | no | bottom-start | bottom-start, bottom-end, top-start, top-end, right, left |
| preventClickOutside | boolean | no |  |  |
| popperClass | string | Record<string, any> | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| menuClasses | string | no |  |  |
| maxMenuHeight | number | no |  |  |
| popperStyle | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |
| menu |  |

### Rules

- "placement" must be one of: bottom-start, bottom-end, top-start, top-end, right, left

### Examples

#### Basic

Standard action menu with grouped DropdownItems. Destructive actions go in a separate section.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Dropdown, DropdownItem, Button } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)

const onEdit    = () => { /* ... */ isOpen.value = false }
const onDelete  = () => { /* ... */ isOpen.value = false }
</script>

<template>
  <Dropdown v-model="isOpen" placement="bottom-end">
    <Button label="Actions" variant="secondary" />

    <template #menu>
      <div class="flex flex-col p-2">
        <DropdownItem text="Edit"      icon="pencil"  @click="onEdit" />
        <DropdownItem text="Duplicate" icon="copy" />
        <DropdownItem text="Archive"   icon="archive" />
      </div>
      <div class="p-2 border-t border-oc-gray-100">
        <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" @click="onDelete" />
      </div>
    </template>
  </Dropdown>
</template>
```

#### Custom Menu Content

The #menu slot accepts any content — not just DropdownItems. Use for custom panels like user profile menus.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Dropdown, Button, Icon } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Dropdown v-model="isOpen" placement="bottom-end">
          <Button label="Account" variant="secondary" left-icon="user" />
          <template #menu>
            <div class="min-w-[220px]">
              <div class="p-4 border-b border-oc-gray-100">
                <p class="font-medium text-sm">Alice Smith</p>
                <p class="text-xs text-oc-text-400">alice@example.com</p>
              </div>
              <div class="p-2 flex flex-col">
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-oc-accent-1-50 text-sm">
                  <Icon name="settings" class="w-5 h-5 text-oc-text-400" />
                  <span>Settings</span>
                </div>
                <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded cursor-pointer hover:bg-oc-accent-1-50 text-sm text-oc-error">
                  <Icon name="logout" class="w-5 h-5" />
                  <span>Sign out</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </template>
        </Dropdown>
</template>
```

#### Dropdown Item Variants

DropdownItem variants — icon, subText, badges (NEW, BETA, TRY IT), and destructive.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Dropdown, Button, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(true)
</script>

<template>
<Dropdown v-model="isOpen">
          <Button label="Menu" variant="secondary" />
          <template #menu>
            <div class="flex flex-col p-2 min-w-[220px]">
              <DropdownItem text="Standard item"  icon="check" />
              <DropdownItem text="With sub text"  icon="info-circle" sub-text="More details here" />
              <DropdownItem text="New feature"    icon="star" is-new />
              <DropdownItem text="Beta feature"   icon="zap" is-beta />
              <DropdownItem text="Try it"         icon="play" is-try-it />
            </div>
            <div class="p-2 border-t border-oc-gray-100">
              <DropdownItem text="Destructive action" icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
            </div>
          </template>
        </Dropdown>
</template>
```

#### Icon Trigger

Use a three-dot icon as the trigger — common in table action cells.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Dropdown, DropdownItem, Icon } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
  <Dropdown v-model="isOpen" placement="bottom-end">
    <Icon name="dots-vertical" class="cursor-pointer text-oc-text-400" />

    <template #menu>
      <div class="flex flex-col p-2">
        <DropdownItem text="View details" icon="eye" />
        <DropdownItem text="Edit"         icon="pencil" />
        <DropdownItem text="Delete"       icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
      </div>
    </template>
  </Dropdown>
</template>
```

#### Playground

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Dropdown, Button, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<Dropdown v-model="isOpen"
  placement="bottom-start"
  :distance="4"
  :is-disabled="false">
          <Button label="Open menu" variant="secondary" />
          <template #menu>
            <div class="flex flex-col p-2">
              <DropdownItem text="Edit" icon="pencil" @click="isOpen = false" />
              <DropdownItem text="Duplicate" icon="copy" @click="isOpen = false" />
              <DropdownItem text="Archive" icon="archive" @click="isOpen = false" />
            </div>
            <div class="p-2 border-t border-oc-gray-100">
              <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" @click="isOpen = false" />
            </div>
          </template>
        </Dropdown>
</template>
```

## DropdownItem

Single item row inside a Dropdown.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-dropdown-ocdropdownitem--docs

kind: leaf · tags: dropdown, menu, item

**Related:** Dropdown

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | string | no | default |  |
| isBeta | boolean | no |  |  |
| isNew | boolean | no |  |  |
| isTryIt | boolean | no |  |  |
| text | string | no |  |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| iconProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| iconClasses | string | no |  |  |
| subText | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| badge |  |

### Examples

#### Badge Variants

Show a badge label on the right side of an item to highlight new, beta, or try-it features.

```vue
<template>
  <Dropdown>
    <template #menu-content>
      <DropdownItem text="AI Writer"    icon="magic"  isNew />
      <DropdownItem text="CSV Import"   icon="upload" isBeta />
      <DropdownItem text="Dark mode"    icon="moon"   isTryIt />
    </template>
  </Dropdown>
</template>
```

#### Basic

A clickable menu item with an optional icon on the left. Place inside a Dropdown default slot.

```vue
<template>
  <Dropdown>
    <template #menu-content>
      <DropdownItem text="Edit"   icon="pencil" />
      <DropdownItem text="Duplicate" icon="copy" />
      <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
    </template>
  </Dropdown>
</template>
```

#### Variants

The destructive variant renders the item in red — use it for irreversible actions like delete or remove.

```vue
<template>
  <Dropdown>
    <template #menu-content>
      <DropdownItem text="Rename"  icon="pencil" variant="default" />
      <DropdownItem text="Archive" icon="folder" variant="default" />
      <DropdownItem text="Delete"  icon="bin"    variant="destructive" />
    </template>
  </Dropdown>
</template>
```

#### With Sub Text

Add a secondary description line below the item label with subText.

```vue
<template>
  <Dropdown>
    <template #menu-content>
      <DropdownItem
        text="Export as CSV"
        icon="download"
        subText="Download all records as a spreadsheet"
      />
      <DropdownItem
        text="Delete account"
        icon="bin"
        variant="destructive"
        subText="This action cannot be undone"
      />
    </template>
  </Dropdown>
</template>
```

## Tooltip

Hover or click tooltip/popover.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-tooltip-octooltip--docs

kind: leaf · tags: tooltip, popover, overlay

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| popperClass | string | no | bg-oc-bg-light |  |
| distance | string | number | no | 5 |  |
| skidding | number | no | 0 |  |
| transitionName | string | no | fade |  |
| trigger | enum | no | hover | hover, click |
| position | enum | no | bottom | top-start, top, top-end, right-start, right, right-end, bottom-start, bottom, bottom-end, left-start, left, left-end |
| arrowHidden | boolean | no | false |  |
| isPopover | boolean | no | false |  |
| isAttachToBody | boolean | no | false |  |
| hideAfter | number | no |  |  |
| popperOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |
| popper |  |

### Rules

- "trigger" must be one of: hover, click
- "position" must be one of: top-start, top, top-end, right-start, right, right-end, bottom-start, bottom, bottom-end, left-start, left, left-end

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Tooltip } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[400px] flex items-center justify-center">
          <Tooltip
  position="bottom"
  trigger="hover"
  :distance="10"
  :skidding="0"
  :is-attach-to-body="false">
            <button class="px-4 py-2 bg-oc-gray-100 rounded">Hover me</button>

            <template #popper>
              <div class="flex w-[300px] flex-col gap-y-3 p-4">
                <div class="font-medium">Tooltip title</div>
                <div class="text-sm">Tooltips are used to describe or identify an element. In most scenarios, tooltips help the user understand the meaning, function or alt-text of an element.</div>
              </div>
            </template>
          </Tooltip>
        </div>
</template>
```

## Modal

Dialog modal with header, body, and footer.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-modal-ocmodal--docs

kind: composite · tags: modal, dialog, overlay

**Use for:**
- create dialog
- edit dialog
- detail overlay
- confirmation prompt
- form inside a modal

**Understand with:** FormBuilder, Button, ConfirmationModal, FloatContent

**Related:** Button

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isBorderless | boolean | no |  |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no | false |  |
| size | enum | no | default | small, medium, default |
| cancelButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no | {
    label: "Cancel",
    variant: "secondary"
} |  |
| persistent | boolean | no | false |  |
| confirmButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no | {
    label: "OK",
    class: "min-w-[112px]"
} |  |
| footerClass | string | no | justify-end |  |
| isCloseIcon | boolean | no | true |  |
| preventClose | boolean | no | false |  |
| isHeaderVisible | boolean | no | true |  |
| isFooterVisible | boolean | no | true |  |
| modalId | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| header |  |
| description |  |
| default |  |
| footer |  |

### Rules

- "size" must be one of: small, medium, default

### Examples

#### Default

Modal Description

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Button, Modal } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<div class="h-[500px]">
          <Button label="Open Modal" @click="isOpen = true" />

          <Modal v-model="isOpen"
  title="Modal Title"
  description="Modal Description"
  :is-close-icon="true"
  :cancel-button-props="{ label: 'Cancel', variant: 'secondary' }"
  :confirm-button-props="{ label: 'OK' }"
  size="medium">
            Lorem ipsum, dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Unde nesciunt vitae, quis maxime explicabo numquam molestias natus dolores quidem. Provident eligendi rem perferendis tempora ex magnam officia fugiat quae?
          </Modal>
        </div>
</template>
```

## OcModalPage

Full-screen modal page with back button.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-modal-ocmodalpage--docs

kind: leaf · tags: modal, page, overlay

**Related:** Button, Icon

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | boolean | no | false |  |
| persistent | boolean | no | false |  |
| contentClass | string | no |  |  |
| preventClose | boolean | no | false |  |
| isCloseIconVisible | boolean | no | true |  |
| isBackButtonVisible | boolean | no | false |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| top |  |
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Button, OcModalPage, Icon } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<div class="h-full">
          <Button label="Open Modal Page" @click="isOpen = true" />

          <OcModalPage v-model="isOpen"
  :is-close-icon-visible="true"
  :is-back-button-visible="true">
            <template #top>
              <div class="flex relative">
                <div>
                  <Icon name="hitPay" width="24" height="24" />
                </div>
                <div class="ml-auto relative">
                  <Icon name="pencil" width="18" height="18" />
                </div>
              </div>
            </template>

            <div class="max-w-[980px] mx-auto">
              Lorem ipsum, dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Unde nesciunt vitae, quis maxime explicabo numquam molestias natus dolores quidem. Provident eligendi rem perferendis tempora ex magnam officia fugiat quae? Ex!
              Lorem ipsum, dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Unde nesciunt vitae, quis maxime explicabo numquam molestias natus dolores quidem. Provident eligendi rem perferendis tempora ex magnam officia fugiat quae? Ex!
            </div>
          </OcModalPage>
        </div>
</template>
```

## ConfirmationModal

Pre-styled confirm/delete/warning dialog.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-confirmationmodal-occonfirmationmodal--docs

kind: leaf · tags: modal, confirm, dialog, overlay

**Related:** Button

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isLoading | boolean | no | false |  |
| variant | enum | no | delete | delete, success, warning, question |
| title | string | no | Are you sure? |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no | false |  |
| iconClass | string | no |  |  |
| hideIcon | boolean | no | false |  |
| persistent | boolean | no | false |  |
| icon | string | no |  |  |
| labelConfirm | string | no |  |  |
| labelCancel | string | no |  |  |
| contentClass | string | no |  |  |
| confirmButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| description |  |

### Rules

- "variant" must be one of: delete, success, warning, question

### Examples

#### Default

Do you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Button, ConfirmationModal } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<div class="h-screen">
          <Button label="Open Confirmation" @click="isOpen = true" />

          <ConfirmationModal v-model="isOpen"
  variant="delete"
  title="Are you sure?"
  description="Do you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone."
  label-confirm="Confirm"
  label-cancel="Cancel"
  :is-loading="false" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Popper

Low-level Popper.js positioning wrapper.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-popper-ocpopper--docs

kind: leaf · tags: overlay, popper, positioning

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| popperClass | string | Record<string, any> | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| distance | string | number | no | 5 |  |
| skidding | number | no | 0 |  |
| isAttachToBody | boolean | no | false |  |
| placement | enum | yes |  | top-start, top, top-end, right-start, right, right-end, bottom-start, bottom, bottom-end, left-start, left, left-end |
| isFlipEnabled | boolean | no | true |  |
| popperOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| popperStyle | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |
| popper |  |

### Rules

- Required props: placement
- "placement" must be one of: top-start, top, top-end, right-start, right, right-end, bottom-start, bottom, bottom-end, left-start, left, left-end

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { Popper } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[700px] gap-y-7 flex-col flex items-center pt-[200px]">
          <div class="w-full">Red border block is with overflow-hidden</div>
          <div class="w-full h-[200px] border border-oc-error overflow-hidden flex items-center justify-center">
            <Popper
  placement="top"
  :skidding="0"
  :distance="5"
  :is-flip-enabled="true">
              <div class="bg-oc-gray-100 rounded border border-oc-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center py-2 px-4">
                Reference block
              </div>

              <template #popper>
                <div class="bg-oc-gray-100 max-w-[300px] p-3 rounded border border-oc-gray-200">
                  Popper
                  <div class="text-oc-text-300">
                    Lorem Ipsum is simply dummy text of the printing and typesetting industry. Lorem Ipsum has been the industry's standard dummy text ever since the 1500s.
                  </div>
                </div>
              </template>
            </Popper>
          </div>
        </div>
</template>
```

## SupportMenu

Floating help/support menu with grouped links.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-supportmenu-ocsupportmenu--docs

kind: leaf · tags: support, help, menu, overlay

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| title | string | no | Have a question? |  |
| modelValue | boolean | no | false |  |
| info | string | no | We're ready to guide you through anything you need! |  |
| confirmButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| topMenu | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| bottomMenu | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| questionBtnProps | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isPointed | boolean | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:modelValue | (event: "update:modelValue", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| badge |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { SupportMenu } from '@orchidui/core'

const isOpen = ref(false)
</script>

<template>
<SupportMenu v-model="isOpen"
  :top-menu="[{ title: 'Support', items: [{ text: 'Whatsapp', icon: 'whatsapp-colored' }, { text: 'Email Us', icon: 'email' }, { text: 'Record a Bug', icon: 'bug' }] }, { title: 'Resources', items: [{ text: 'User Guides', icon: 'document' }, { text: 'Blog', icon: 'news' }] }]"
  :bottom-menu="[{ text: 'What\'s new', icon: 'sparkle-2', pointed: true }, { text: 'Feedback', icon: 'chat-2' }, { text: 'Changelog', icon: 'list-check' }]" />
</template>
```

## CopyTooltip

Wrap any element to copy its value to clipboard.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-copytooltip-occopytooltip--docs

kind: leaf · tags: copy, clipboard, tooltip

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| tooltipText | string | no | Copied! |  |
| value | string | Blob | no |  |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { CopyTooltip } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full pt-8">
          <CopyTooltip
  value="Text to copy"
  tooltip-text="Copied!" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## WhiteList

Feature gate card shown when plan does not include a feature.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/overlay-whitelist-ocwhitelist--docs

kind: leaf · tags: upgrade, gate, plan

**Related:** Button

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| buttonProps | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| tagOptions | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| imagePath | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| logo |  |
| bottom |  |
| footer |  |

### Examples

#### Default

This feature is not available for your current plan.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Button, WhiteList } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="relative h-[500px] flex flex-col gap-y-5 px-10">
          content behind some text to show the overlay effect of the whitelist component
          <Button label="Test Button" />
          <Button label="Test Button" variant="destructive" />
          <WhiteList
  title="Feature Unavailable"
  description="This feature is not available for your current plan." class="w-full top-0 left-0 h-full absolute" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## Theme

Wrap app to apply light/dark color mode.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/theme-octheme--docs

kind: leaf · tags: theme, dark-mode, layout

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| colorMode | string | no | light |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Color Mode

```vue
<template>
<div class="flex gap-3 items-center light-mode mb-3">
        <Theme colorMode="light">
          Light Mode
        </Theme>
        <Theme colorMode="dark">
          Dark Mode
        </Theme>
      </div>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<template>
<div class="flex gap-3 items-center mb-3">
          <span>Light Mode (default)</span>
        </div>
</template>
```

## FormBuilder

Dynamic form renderer from a JSON schema.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/formbuilder-ocformbuilder--docs

kind: composite · tags: form, builder, dynamic, schema

**Use for:**
- dynamic form rendering
- create and edit forms
- settings form
- schema-driven form fields
- filter form inside DataTable

**Understand with:** Input, Select, TextArea, Checkbox, Toggle, PhoneInput, DatePicker, Button, Modal, FloatContent

**Related:** Button, Input

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| values | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |
| id | string | yes |  |  |
| grid | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| jsonForm | FormField[] | no |  |  |
| errors | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| logicValues | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| previewMode | string | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| onUpdate | (form: FormField, value: any) => void | Emitted when any field value changes. The parent component must update values[form.name] = value externally. For range fields (name is an array), each key in form.name corresponds to the matching index in value. |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [type] | Dynamic slot for any field type not in the built-in list. The slot name equals the field's type string (e.g. use <template #MyWidget> for a field with type: "MyWidget"). Bindings: form (field config object from jsonForm), value (current field value), error (error message string), onUpdate (function(form, value) to emit the change). |

### Rules

- Required props: values, id

### Examples

#### All Field Types

Reference for every built-in type string. Each entry shows which type value maps to which component.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { FormBuilder } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref({ range: [0, 100], slider: 50, toggle: false, checkbox: false })
const errors = ref({})

const jsonForm = [
  { name: 'input',       type: 'Input',          props: { label: 'Input',          placeholder: 'Text' } },
  { name: 'number',      type: 'NumberInput',     props: { label: 'NumberInput' } },
  { name: 'textarea',    type: 'TextArea',        props: { label: 'TextArea',       placeholder: 'Multi-line text' } },
  { name: 'phone',       type: 'PhoneInput',      props: { label: 'PhoneInput' } },
  { name: 'card',        type: 'CardInput',       props: { label: 'CardInput',      placeholder: '•••• •••• •••• ••••' } },
  { name: 'link',        type: 'LinkInput',       props: { label: 'LinkInput',      placeholder: 'https://example.com' } },
  { name: 'select',      type: 'Select',          props: { label: 'Select',         options: [{ label: 'Option A', value: 'a' }, { label: 'Option B', value: 'b' }] } },
  { name: 'multiselect', type: 'Select',          props: { label: 'Select (multiple)', multiple: true, isFilterable: true, options: [{ label: 'A', value: 'a' }, { label: 'B', value: 'b' }] } },
  { name: 'selopts',     type: 'SelectOptions',   props: { label: 'SelectOptions',  options: [{ label: 'X', value: 'x' }, { label: 'Y', value: 'y' }] } },
  { name: 'checkbox',    type: 'Checkbox',        props: { label: 'Checkbox' } },
  { name: 'checkboxes',  type: 'CheckboxesGroup', props: { label: 'CheckboxesGroup', checkboxes: [{ label: 'A', value: 'a' }, { label: 'B', value: 'b' }] } },
  { name: 'radio',       type: 'RadioGroup',      props: { label: 'RadioGroup (vertical)',   groupName: 'rg1', radio: [{ label: 'A', value: 'a' }, { label: 'B', value: 'b' }] } },
  { name: 'radio_h',     type: 'RadioGroup',      props: { label: 'RadioGroup (horizontal)', groupName: 'rg2', alignment: 'horizontal', radio: [{ label: 'Yes', value: 'yes' }, { label: 'No', value: 'no' }] } },
  { name: 'toggle',      type: 'Toggle',          props: { label: 'Toggle' } },
  { name: 'date',        type: 'DatePicker',      props: { label: 'DatePicker (single)' } },
  { name: 'time',        type: 'TimePicker',      props: { label: 'TimePicker' } },
  { name: 'range',       type: 'RangeInput',      props: { label: 'RangeInput' } },
  { name: 'slider',      type: 'Slider',          props: { label: 'Slider', minLimit: 0, maxLimit: 100 } },
  { name: 'editor',      type: 'TextEditor',      props: { label: 'TextEditor' } },
  { name: 'divider',     type: 'SectionItem',     props: { title: 'SectionItem — static divider' } },
  { name: 'toggle_row',  type: 'SectionItem',     props: { title: 'SectionItem — toggle row', isToggle: true } }
]

function onUpdate(formItem, value) {
  values.value[formItem.name] = value
}
</script>

<template>
  <FormBuilder
    id="all-types-form"
    class="flex flex-col gap-4"
    :json-form="jsonForm"
    :values="values"
    :errors="errors"
    @on-update="onUpdate"
  />
</template>
```

#### Basic

Minimal form with common field types. Shows the core pattern: jsonForm config array, external values ref, and onUpdate handler.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { FormBuilder } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref({
  full_name: '',
  country: '',
  newsletter: false
})

const errors = ref({})

const jsonForm = [
  {
    name: 'full_name',
    type: 'Input',
    props: { label: 'Full name', placeholder: 'Jane Doe' }
  },
  {
    name: 'country',
    type: 'Select',
    props: {
      label: 'Country',
      options: [
        { label: 'Indonesia', value: 'ID' },
        { label: 'Singapore', value: 'SG' },
        { label: 'Malaysia', value: 'MY' }
      ]
    }
  },
  {
    name: 'newsletter',
    type: 'Toggle',
    props: { label: 'Subscribe to newsletter' }
  }
]

function onUpdate(formItem, value) {
  values.value[formItem.name] = value
}
</script>

<template>
  <FormBuilder
    id="basic-form"
    class="flex flex-col gap-4"
    :json-form="jsonForm"
    :values="values"
    :errors="errors"
    @on-update="onUpdate"
  />
</template>
```

#### Conditional Fields

Fields shown/hidden based on another field

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { FormBuilder } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref({ delivery_method: 'pickup', express: false, column_count: '1' })
const errors = ref({})

const jsonForm = [
  // Trigger field
  {
    name: 'delivery_method',
    type: 'Select',
    props: { label: 'Delivery method', options: [{ label: 'Pickup', value: 'pickup' }, { label: 'Delivery', value: 'delivery' }] }
  },
  // show_if_value: visible only when delivery_method === 'delivery'
  {
    name: 'address',
    type: 'Input',
    show_if: 'delivery_method',
    show_if_value: 'delivery',
    props: { label: 'Delivery address', placeholder: '123 Main St' }
  },
  // show_if_not: visible when delivery_method !== 'delivery'
  {
    name: 'pickup_note',
    type: 'Input',
    show_if: 'delivery_method',
    show_if_not: 'delivery',
    props: { label: 'Pickup note' }
  },
  { name: 'express', type: 'SectionItem', props: { title: 'Express delivery', isToggle: true } },
  // Multiple conditions (AND): delivery === 'delivery' AND express === true
  {
    name: 'express_note',
    type: 'Input',
    show_if: ['delivery_method', 'express'],
    show_if_value: ['delivery', true],
    props: { label: 'Express note' }
  },
  // show_if_min: visible when column_count >= 2
  {
    name: 'column_count',
    type: 'Select',
    props: { label: 'Columns', options: [{ label: '1', value: '1' }, { label: '2', value: '2' }, { label: '3', value: '3' }] }
  },
  {
    name: 'col2_title',
    type: 'Input',
    show_if: 'column_count',
    show_if_min: '2',
    props: { label: 'Column 2 title (visible when columns >= 2)' }
  }
]

function onUpdate(formItem, value) {
  values.value[formItem.name] = value
}
</script>

<template>
  <FormBuilder
    id="conditional-form"
    class="flex flex-col gap-4"
    :json-form="jsonForm"
    :values="values"
    :errors="errors"
    @on-update="onUpdate"
  />
</template>
```

#### Custom Slot

Unknown type strings fall through to a named slot. The slot name equals the type string. Slot receives: form (config), value, error, and on-update function.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { FormBuilder, Button } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref({ username: '', avatar_url: '' })
const errors = ref({})

// 'AvatarPicker' is not a built-in type — rendered via the #AvatarPicker slot
const jsonForm = [
  { name: 'username',   type: 'Input',       props: { label: 'Username', placeholder: 'john_doe' } },
  { name: 'avatar_url', type: 'AvatarPicker' }
]

function onUpdate(formItem, value) {
  values.value[formItem.name] = value
}
</script>

<template>
  <FormBuilder
    id="custom-slot-form"
    class="flex flex-col gap-4"
    :json-form="jsonForm"
    :values="values"
    :errors="errors"
    @on-update="onUpdate"
  >
    <!-- slot name = type string ('AvatarPicker') -->
    <template #AvatarPicker="{ form: field, value, error, onUpdate: emit }">
      <div class="flex flex-col gap-1">
        <label class="text-sm font-medium text-oc-text">Avatar</label>
        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
          <img v-if="value" :src="value" class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full object-cover" />
          <div v-else class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-oc-bg-2" />
          <Button variant="secondary" size="small" @click="emit(field, 'https://i.pravatar.cc/80')">
            Choose avatar
          </Button>
        </div>
        <span v-if="error" class="text-xs text-oc-error">{{ error }}</span>
      </div>
    </template>
  </FormBuilder>
</template>
```

#### Playground

Form layout — controls the CSS grid columns

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { FormBuilder } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref({
        full_name:    '',
        email:        '',
        country:      '',
        plan:         '',
        newsletter:   false,
        description:  ''
      })
const grid = computed(()
</script>

<template>
<FormBuilder
          id="playground-form"
          :class="grid ? 'gap-4' : 'flex flex-col gap-4'"
          :json-form="jsonForm"
          :values="values"
          :errors="errors"
          :grid="grid"
          @on-update="onUpdate"
        />
        <div v-if="true" class="rounded border border-oc-gray-200 bg-oc-bg-2 p-4 text-xs text-oc-text-400 font-mono whitespace-pre-wrap">{{ JSON.stringify(values, null, 2) }}</div>
</template>
```

#### Two Column Grid

Responsive 2-column layout via the grid prop. Field names must match the area names in grid.lg.area. Single column on mobile, two columns on desktop.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { FormBuilder } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref({ first_name: '', last_name: '', email: '', phone: '' })
const errors = ref({})

// Area names must exactly match the field name strings
const grid = {
  xs: {
    area: \`first_name
last_name
email
phone\`,
    rows: 'auto',
    columns: '100%'
  },
  lg: {
    area: \`first_name last_name
email      phone\`,
    rows: 'auto',
    columns: '50% 50%'
  }
}

const jsonForm = [
  { name: 'first_name', type: 'Input',     props: { label: 'First name', placeholder: 'Jane' } },
  { name: 'last_name',  type: 'Input',     props: { label: 'Last name',  placeholder: 'Doe' } },
  { name: 'email',      type: 'Input',     props: { label: 'Email',      placeholder: 'jane@example.com' } },
  { name: 'phone',      type: 'PhoneInput', props: { label: 'Phone' } }
]

function onUpdate(formItem, value) {
  values.value[formItem.name] = value
}
</script>

<template>
  <FormBuilder
    id="grid-form"
    class="gap-4"
    :json-form="jsonForm"
    :values="values"
    :errors="errors"
    :grid="grid"
    @on-update="onUpdate"
  />
</template>
```

#### With Validation

Pass an errors object keyed by field name to show validation errors. Clear errors per-field as the user edits.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { FormBuilder, Button } from '@orchidui/core'

const values = ref({ email: '', password: '' })
const errors = ref({ email: '', password: '' })

const jsonForm = [
  { name: 'email',    type: 'Input', props: { label: 'Email',    placeholder: 'jane@example.com' } },
  { name: 'password', type: 'Input', props: { label: 'Password', isPassword: true } }
]

function onUpdate(formItem, value) {
  values.value[formItem.name] = value
  errors.value[formItem.name] = '' // clear error on edit
}

function submit() {
  errors.value = {
    email:    values.value.email    ? '' : 'Email is required',
    password: values.value.password ? '' : 'Password is required'
  }
  if (!errors.value.email && !errors.value.password) {
    alert('Submitted!')
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4">
    <FormBuilder
      id="validation-form"
      class="flex flex-col gap-4"
      :json-form="jsonForm"
      :values="values"
      :errors="errors"
      @on-update="onUpdate"
    />
    <Button @click="submit">Submit</Button>
  </div>
</template>
```

## DataTable

Data table with filtering, pagination, search, and bulk actions.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datatable-ocdatatable--docs

kind: composite · tags: table, data, filter, pagination, crud

**Use for:**
- resource list
- CRUD table
- data grid with search and filter
- paginated data display
- manage records with bulk actions

**Understand with:** NewTable, FormBuilder, Modal, ConfirmationModal, PageTitle, EmptyPage, Chip, Button, Dropdown, DropdownItem

**Related:** Button, Chip, Dropdown, DropdownItem, EmptyPage, Toggle

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| filter | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| options | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |
| isLoading | boolean | no |  |  |
| rowKey | string | Function | no | id |  |
| id | string | yes |  |  |
| selectedIndex | number | no | -1 |  |
| isNewTable | boolean | no | false |  |
| selected | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| rowClass | string | no |  |  |
| rowLink | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| before |  |
| bulk-actions |  |
| filter-options |  |
| custom-filter-form |  |
| after |  |
| empty |  |
| table-header |  |
| table-body |  |
| after-rows |  |
| before-pagination |  |

### Rules

- Required props: options, id

### Examples

#### Basic

Minimal DataTable with search, status tabs, pagination, and items-per-page. Listen to update:filter to re-fetch data.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 10, tab: '', keywords: '' })

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 100, last_page: 10 },
  filterOptions: {
    per_page: { key: 'per_page' },
    search: { key: 'keywords' },
    tabs: {
      key: 'tab',
      options: [
        { label: 'All', value: '' },
        { label: 'Active', value: 'active' },
        { label: 'Inactive', value: 'inactive' }
      ]
    }
  },
  tableOptions: {
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[40%]' },
      { key: 'email',  label: 'Email',  class: 'w-[40%]' },
      { key: 'status', label: 'Status', class: 'w-[20%]' }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com',   status: 'Active' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com',     status: 'Inactive' },
      { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com', status: 'Active' }
    ]
  }
}

function onFilterChange(newFilter) {
  filter.value = newFilter
  // fetch data with newFilter params here
  console.log('fetch with:', newFilter)
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="users-table"
    is-new-table
    :filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    @update:filter="onFilterChange"
  />
</template>
```

#### Column Edit

Column show/hide and reorder editor. Pass filterOptions.columnEdit with a key (filter field name) and localStorageKey (persistence namespace). Persists column order to localStorage.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter = ref({
  page: 1,
  per_page: 10,
  columnEdit: {}
})

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 3, last_page: 1 },
  filterOptions: {
    per_page: { key: 'per_page' },
    columnEdit: {
      key: 'columnEdit',
      localStorageKey: 'my-table-columns'
    }
  },
  tableOptions: {
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',    label: 'Name',    class: 'w-[25%]', isSortable: false },
      { key: 'email',   label: 'Email',   class: 'w-[35%]' },
      { key: 'role',    label: 'Role',    class: 'w-[20%]' },
      { key: 'status',  label: 'Status',  class: 'w-[20%]' }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com',   role: 'Admin',  status: 'Active' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com',     role: 'Editor', status: 'Inactive' },
      { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com', role: 'Viewer', status: 'Active' }
    ]
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="column-edit-table"
    is-new-table
    v-model:filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    @columns-changed="console.log('columns changed:', $event)"
  />
</template>
```

#### Cursor Pagination

Cursor-based pagination — pass options.cursor instead of options.pagination. The component emits update:filter with the new cursor value.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

// Simulate cursor pages
const pages = {
  '': {
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice', email: 'alice@example.com' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',   email: 'bob@example.com' }
    ],
    cursor: { prev: null, next: 'cursor_page2' }
  },
  cursor_page2: {
    fields: [
      { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com' },
      { id: '4', name: 'Dana',    email: 'dana@example.com' }
    ],
    cursor: { prev: 'cursor_page1', next: null }
  }
}

const filter  = ref({ cursor: '' })
const current = ref(pages[''])

const options = computed(() => ({
  cursor: current.value.cursor,
  tableOptions: {
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',  label: 'Name',  class: 'w-[50%]' },
      { key: 'email', label: 'Email', class: 'w-[50%]' }
    ],
    fields: current.value.fields
  }
}))

function onFilterChange(newFilter) {
  filter.value = newFilter
  current.value = pages[newFilter.cursor ?? ''] ?? pages['']
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="cursor-table"
    is-new-table
    :filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    @update:filter="onFilterChange"
  />
</template>
```

#### Custom Empty State

The #empty slot replaces the default empty state when fields is an empty array.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable, EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'
```
