```vue
const filter = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 10 })

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 0, last_page: 1 },
  filterOptions: { search: { key: 'keywords' } },
  tableOptions: {
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',  label: 'Name',  class: 'w-[50%]' },
      { key: 'email', label: 'Email', class: 'w-[50%]' }
    ],
    fields: []
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable id="empty-table" is-new-table :filter="filter" :options="options" @update:filter="filter = $event">
    <template #empty>
      <div class="flex justify-center py-16">
        <EmptyPage
          icon="document"
          title="No records found"
          description="Try adjusting your search or filters."
          :is-button="false"
          hide-badge
        />
      </div>
    </template>
  </DataTable>
</template>
```

#### Loading State

Pass is-loading to show skeleton rows while data is being fetched. The number of skeleton rows matches the current per_page value.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter   = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 5 })
const isLoading = ref(true)

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 50, last_page: 10 },
  filterOptions: { per_page: { key: 'per_page' }, search: { key: 'keywords' } },
  tableOptions: {
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[40%]' },
      { key: 'email',  label: 'Email',  class: 'w-[40%]' },
      { key: 'status', label: 'Status', class: 'w-[20%]' }
    ],
    fields: []
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="loading-table"
    is-new-table
    :filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    :is-loading="isLoading"
    @update:filter="filter = $event"
  />
</template>
```

#### New Table Design

The is-new-table prop switches to the NewTable component — the updated visual design used across most pages. Combine with is-sticky, cursor pagination, and columnEdit as needed.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable, Chip, EmptyPage } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter = ref({
  page: 1,
  per_page: 10,
  tab: '',
  keywords: ''
})

const CHIP_STATUS = {
  active:   { label: 'Active',   variant: 'success' },
  inactive: { label: 'Inactive', variant: 'error' },
  pending:  { label: 'Pending',  variant: 'warning' }
}

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 3, last_page: 1 },
  filterOptions: {
    per_page: { key: 'per_page' },
    search: { key: 'keywords' },
    tabs: {
      key: 'tab',
      options: [
        { label: 'All',      value: '' },
        { label: 'Active',   value: 'active' },
        { label: 'Inactive', value: 'inactive' }
      ]
    }
  },
  tableOptions: {
    isCursorPointer: true,
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[35%]' },
      { key: 'email',  label: 'Email',  class: 'w-[35%]' },
      {
        key: 'status', label: 'Status', class: 'w-[20%]',
        variant: 'chip', chipOptions: CHIP_STATUS
      },
      { key: 'actions', label: '', class: 'w-[10%]', variant: 'icon', headerVariant: 'text' }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com',   status: 'active' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com',     status: 'inactive' },
      { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com', status: 'pending' }
    ]
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="new-table-demo"
    is-new-table
    v-model:filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    @click:row="console.log('row clicked:', $event.item)"
  >
    <template #actions="{ item }">
      <button class="opacity-0 group-hover/row:opacity-100 text-oc-text-400 hover:text-oc-text-500">
        <Icon name="dots-vertical" width="20" height="20" />
      </button>
    </template>

    <template #empty>
      <div class="flex justify-center py-12">
        <EmptyPage title="No records found" description="Try adjusting your search." :is-button="false" />
      </div>
    </template>
  </DataTable>
</template>
```

#### Row Click And Link

click:row fires with the row data object. row-link sets the field whose value is used as a navigation URL per row. selectedIndex highlights a specific row.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter        = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 10 })
const selectedIndex = ref(-1)

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 3, last_page: 1 },
  tableOptions: {
    isCursorPointer: true,
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[40%]' },
      { key: 'email',  label: 'Email',  class: 'w-[40%]' },
      { key: 'status', label: 'Status', class: 'w-[20%]' }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com',   status: 'Active',   href: '/users/1' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com',     status: 'Inactive', href: '/users/2' },
      { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com', status: 'Active',   href: '/users/3' }
    ]
  }
}

function onRowClick({ item, index }) {
  selectedIndex.value = index
  console.log('clicked row:', item)
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="row-click-table"
    is-new-table
    :filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    :selected-index="selectedIndex"
    row-link="href"
    @click:row="onRowClick"
    @update:filter="filter = $event"
  />
</template>
```

#### Search With Options

When filterOptions.search has an options array, a dropdown lets the user choose which field to search by. The active choice is stored in filter.selectedSearchOption.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 10, selectedSearchOption: 'name' })

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 3, last_page: 1 },
  filterOptions: {
    per_page: { key: 'per_page' },
    search: {
      key: 'keywords',
      options: [
        { label: 'Name',  value: 'name' },
        { label: 'Email', value: 'email' },
        { label: 'ID',    value: 'id' }
      ]
    }
  },
  tableOptions: {
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',  label: 'Name',  class: 'w-[33%]' },
      { key: 'email', label: 'Email', class: 'w-[33%]' },
      { key: 'id',    label: 'ID',    class: 'w-[33%]' }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com' },
      { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', email: 'charlie@example.com' }
    ]
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="search-options-table"
    is-new-table
    v-model:filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    @search-query-changed="console.log('search:', $event)"
  />
</template>
```

#### Sticky Columns

Horizontal scrolling table with a sticky first column. Set isSticky on tableOptions and add stickyLeft / stickyRight on individual headers.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 10 })

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 2, last_page: 1 },
  tableOptions: {
    isSticky: true,
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',    label: 'Name',    class: 'w-[180px]', stickyLeft: true },
      { key: 'email',   label: 'Email',   class: 'w-[220px]' },
      { key: 'country', label: 'Country', class: 'w-[160px]' },
      { key: 'plan',    label: 'Plan',    class: 'w-[160px]' },
      { key: 'created', label: 'Created', class: 'w-[160px]' },
      { key: 'actions', label: '',        class: 'w-[80px]',  stickyRight: true }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   email: 'alice@example.com',   country: 'SG', plan: 'Pro',   created: '2024-01-10', actions: '' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     email: 'bob@example.com',     country: 'MY', plan: 'Basic', created: '2024-02-15', actions: '' }
    ]
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="sticky-table"
    is-new-table
    :filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    @update:filter="filter = $event"
  />
</template>
```

#### With Custom Cells

Custom column slots override the default cell renderer. The #bulk-actions slot renders when rows are selected.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable, Chip, Toggle, Button, Dropdown, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter    = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 10 })
const selected  = ref([])
const dropdowns = ref({})

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 3, last_page: 1 },
  filterOptions: { per_page: { key: 'per_page' } },
  tableOptions: {
    isSelectable: true,
    isCursorPointer: true,
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',    label: 'Name',    class: 'w-[30%]' },
      { key: 'status',  label: 'Status',  class: 'w-[20%]', variant: 'chip',
        chipOptions: {
          active:   { label: 'Active',   variant: 'success' },
          inactive: { label: 'Inactive', variant: 'error' }
        }
      },
      { key: 'enabled', label: 'Enabled', class: 'w-[20%]', disableClickRow: true },
      { key: 'actions', label: '',        class: 'w-[10%]', variant: 'icon', headerVariant: 'text' }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice',   status: 'active',   enabled: true },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',     status: 'inactive', enabled: false },
      { id: '3', name: 'Charlie', status: 'active',   enabled: true }
    ]
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="custom-cells-table"
    is-new-table
    v-model:selected="selected"
    v-model:filter="filter"
    row-key="id"
    :options="options"
  >
    <!-- Bulk action bar shown when rows are selected -->
    <template #bulk-actions>
      <Button size="small" is-transparent left-icon="eye-open"  label="Enable" />
      <Button size="small" is-transparent left-icon="bin"       label="Delete" variant="destructive" />
    </template>

    <!-- Custom Enabled cell — Toggle component -->
    <template #enabled="{ item }">
      <Toggle size="small" :model-value="item.enabled" />
    </template>

    <!-- Custom Actions cell — Dropdown menu per row -->
    <template #actions="{ item }">
      <Dropdown v-model="dropdowns[item.id]" :distance="10">
        <Icon class="w-6 h-6 cursor-pointer mx-auto" name="dots-vertical" />
        <template #menu>
          <div class="p-2">
            <DropdownItem text="Edit"   icon="pencil" />
            <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin"    variant="destructive" />
          </div>
        </template>
      </Dropdown>
    </template>
  </DataTable>
</template>
```

#### With Filter Form

Filter dropdown with a form rendered inside. Emit apply-filter to receive the selected filter values.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DataTable } from '@orchidui/core'

const filter = ref({ page: 1, per_page: 10, status: null })

const options = {
  pagination: { total: 50, last_page: 5 },
  filterOptions: {
    per_page: { key: 'per_page' },
    search: { key: 'keywords' },
    form: [
      {
        name: 'status',
        type: 'Select',
        props: {
          label: 'Status',
          options: [
            { label: 'Active',   value: 'active' },
            { label: 'Inactive', value: 'inactive' }
          ]
        }
      },
      {
        name: ['created_from', 'created_to'],
        type: 'DatePicker',
        props: { label: 'Created date', type: 'range' }
      }
    ],
    actions: { applyButton: { label: 'Apply filters' } }
  },
  tableOptions: {
    headers: [
      { key: 'name',   label: 'Name',   class: 'w-[50%]' },
      { key: 'status', label: 'Status', class: 'w-[50%]' }
    ],
    fields: [
      { id: '1', name: 'Alice', status: 'active' },
      { id: '2', name: 'Bob',   status: 'inactive' }
    ]
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <DataTable
    id="filter-form-table"
    is-new-table
    v-model:filter="filter"
    :options="options"
    @apply-filter="console.log('filter applied:', $event)"
  />
</template>
```

## FilterSearch

Search input inside DataTable filter toolbar.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datatable-ocfiltersearch--docs

kind: leaf · tags: filter, search, table

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isSearchOnly | boolean | no |  |  |
| searchOptions | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| selectedOption | string | no |  |  |

## FilterSearchFor

Active filter chips with remove controls.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datatable-ocfiltersearchfor--docs

kind: leaf · tags: filter, search, table

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| filters | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| queries | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |

## FilterForm

Filter form panel driven by JSON schema, used inside DataTable.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/datatable-ocfilterform--docs

kind: leaf · tags: filter, form, table

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| id | string | yes |  |  |
| values | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| grid | Record<string, any> | no | null |  |
| jsonForm | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| actions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Rules

- Required props: id

## ComplexCalendar

Full calendar panel with range selection and shortcuts.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-complexcalendar-occomplexcalendar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: calendar, date, range, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | Record<string, any> | no | {
    start: new Date(),
    end: new Date()
} |  |
| countCalendars | number | no | 2 |  |
| withFooter | boolean | no | true |  |
| isRange | boolean | no | true |  |
| minDate | string | number | Date | no |  |  |
| maxDate | string | number | Date | no |  |  |
| shortcuts | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| cancelButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| submitButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { ComplexCalendar } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref([])
</script>

<template>
<ComplexCalendar v-model="modelValue" />
</template>
```

#### Single Calendar

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { ComplexCalendar } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('')
const masks = ref({ modelValue: 'DD/MM/YYYY' })
</script>

<template>
<ComplexCalendar
          v-model.string="modelValue"
          :count-calendars="1"
          :is-range="false"
          :with-footer="false"
          :masks="masks"
        />
</template>
```

## ComplexDatePicker

Date range picker input with label and format options.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-complexdatepicker-occomplexdatepicker--docs

kind: leaf · tags: datepicker, date, range, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | Record<string, any> | no | {
    start: new Date(),
    end: new Date()
} |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no |  |  |
| countCalendars | number | no | 2 |  |
| shortcuts | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| withFooter | boolean | no | true |  |
| formatDate | enum | no | DD/MM/YYYY | DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| cancelButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| submitButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| calendarProps | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Rules

- "formatDate" must be one of: DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { ComplexDatePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref()
</script>

<template>
<ComplexDatePicker v-model="modelValue" />
</template>
```

## ModalCropper

Modal-based image cropper.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-modalcropper-ocmodalcropper--docs

kind: leaf · tags: upload, image, crop, modal

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| maxSize | string | number | no |  |  |
| inputOptions | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| inputOptionValues | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| img | string | no |  |  |

## Cropper

Inline image cropper.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-cropper-occropper--docs

kind: leaf · tags: upload, image, crop

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isReplaceImage | boolean | no | true |  |
| maxSize | string | number | no |  |  |
| inputOptions | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| inputOptionValues | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |
| img | string | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Cropper } from '@orchidui/core'

const inputOptionValues = ref({
        caption: '',
        caption_variant: 'hover'
      })
</script>

<template>
<Cropper
  img="/images/image.jpg"
  :is-replace-image="true"
          :input-options="['description', 'link', 'caption', 'lightbox', 'new_tab']"
          :input-option-values="inputOptionValues"
          @update:input-options="inputOptionValues = $event"
        />
</template>
```

## Draggable

Drag-and-drop wrapper for reorderable lists.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-draggable-ocdraggable--docs

kind: leaf · tags: drag, drop, sort, list

**Related:** DraggableList, DropdownItem, Icon, Toggle

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| default |  |

### Examples

#### Basic

Simple reorderable list with DraggableList. Each item shows a drag handle on hover, an optional icon, and a three-dot action menu.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DraggableList, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const items = ref([
  { id: '1', icon: 'home',     title: 'Home page' },
  { id: '2', icon: 'shopping', title: 'Products' },
  { id: '3', icon: 'tag',      title: 'Pricing' },
  { id: '4', icon: 'mail',     title: 'Contact' }
])
</script>

<template>
  <DraggableList v-model="items">
    <template #action-item="{ item }">
      <DropdownItem text="Edit"   icon="pencil" />
      <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
    </template>
  </DraggableList>
</template>
```

#### Custom Draggable

Low-level Draggable component for fully custom drag-and-drop UIs. Add class `drag-el` to the element that acts as the drag handle.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Draggable, Icon } from '@orchidui/core'

const items = ref([
  { id: 1, name: 'Task A', priority: 'High' },
  { id: 2, name: 'Task B', priority: 'Medium' },
  { id: 3, name: 'Task C', priority: 'Low' }
])
</script>

<template>
  <Draggable v-model="items" v-slot="{ list }">
    <div
      v-for="item in list"
      :key="item.id"
      class="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 mb-2 rounded border border-oc-gray-200 bg-white"
    >
      <!-- drag handle — add drag-el class -->
      <Icon name="draggable" class="drag-el text-oc-text-300 cursor-grab" />
      <span class="flex-1">{{ item.name }}</span>
      <span class="text-sm text-oc-text-400">{{ item.priority }}</span>
    </div>
  </Draggable>
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DraggableList, DropdownItem, Toggle } from '@orchidui/core'

const model = ref([
        {
          id: '123',
          icon: 'banner',
          title: '123 Label ',
          isToggle: true,
          isDisable: true,
          active: true
        },
        {
          id: '234',
          title: '234 Label ',
          beforeAction: true,
          link: 'https://orchidui.vercel.app'
        },
        {
          id: '456',
          icon: 'top-banner',
          title: '456 Label ',
          isToggle: true,
          children: [
            {
              id: '123',
              icon: 'banner',
              title: '123 Label ',
              active: true
            },
            {
              id: '234',
              icon: 'banner',
              title: '234 Label '
            }
          ]
        }
      ])
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full min-h-[200px]">
          <DraggableList v-model="model" is-link :classes="'hover:shadow bg-oc-bg-light hover:bg-oc-accent-1-50'">
            <template #title="{item}">
              <div class="flex w-full">
                <div class="flex justify-between w-full">
                  <div class="flex flex-col">
                    <span class="mb-2">{{ item.title }}</span>
                    <span> {{ item.link }} </span>
                  </div>
                  <div class="flex items-center">
                    <span>{{ item.id }} </span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </template>
            <template #action-item="{item}">
              <DropdownItem text="Menu" icon="pencil" />
              <DropdownItem text="Menu" icon="pencil" />
            </template>
            <template #action="{item}"><span v-if="item.isToggle"><Toggle size="small" /></span></template>
            <template #content="{item}">
              <div v-if="item.children" class="flex w-full my-5">
                <DraggableList class="w-full" v-model="item.children" is-children is-link>
                  <template #action-item="{item}">
                    <DropdownItem text="Menu" icon="pencil" />
                    <DropdownItem text="Menu" icon="pencil" />
                  </template>
                  <template #action="{item}"><span v-if="item.isToggle"><Toggle size="small" /></span></template>
                </DraggableList>
              </div>
            </template>
          </DraggableList>
        </div>
</template>
```

#### With Toggle

Replace the three-dot dropdown with a toggle switch using the #action slot.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DraggableList, Toggle } from '@orchidui/core'

const items = ref([
  { id: '1', title: 'Email notifications', icon: 'mail',  active: true },
  { id: '2', title: 'SMS notifications',   icon: 'phone', active: false },
  { id: '3', title: 'Push notifications',  icon: 'bell',  active: true }
])
</script>

<template>
  <DraggableList v-model="items" enable-status-variant>
    <template #action="{ item }">
      <Toggle v-model="item.active" size="small" />
    </template>
  </DraggableList>
</template>
```

## DraggableList

Styled draggable list with icon and action slots.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/elements-draggable-ocdraggablelist--docs

kind: leaf · tags: drag, drop, sort, list

**Related:** DropdownItem, Toggle

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| isChildren | boolean | no |  |  |
| iconKey | string | no | icon |  |
| childrenKey | string | no | children |  |
| isLink | boolean | no |  |  |
| linkKey | string | no | link |  |
| unmovable | boolean | no |  |  |
| enableStatusVariant | boolean | no |  |  |
| classes | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| titleWidth | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| title |  |
| before-action |  |
| action |  |
| action-item |  |
| content |  |

### Examples

#### Basic

Reorderable list where each row has a drag handle, an optional icon, and a three-dot action menu. v-model is updated when items are reordered.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DraggableList, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const items = ref([
  { id: '1', icon: 'home',     title: 'Home page' },
  { id: '2', icon: 'tag',      title: 'Products' },
  { id: '3', icon: 'mail',     title: 'Contact' },
  { id: '4', icon: 'settings', title: 'Settings', isDisable: true }
])
</script>

<template>
  <DraggableList v-model="items">
    <template #action-item="{ item }">
      <DropdownItem text="Edit"   icon="pencil" />
      <DropdownItem text="Delete" icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
    </template>
  </DraggableList>
</template>
```

#### Unmovable

Disable drag-and-drop entirely with unmovable, or per-item with item.isDisable or item.unmovable.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DraggableList } from '@orchidui/core'

// Per-item: first item locked, others draggable
const items = ref([
  { id: '1', title: 'Default page (locked)', icon: 'lock', unmovable: true },
  { id: '2', title: 'About',    icon: 'info-circle' },
  { id: '3', title: 'Contact',  icon: 'mail' }
])
</script>

<template>
  <DraggableList v-model="items" />
</template>
```

#### With Custom Title

Use the #title slot to render a custom multi-line title area with secondary text.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DraggableList, DropdownItem } from '@orchidui/core'

const pages = ref([
  { id: '1', title: 'Home',     url: '/home',     icon: 'home' },
  { id: '2', title: 'Products', url: '/products', icon: 'tag' },
  { id: '3', title: 'Blog',     url: '/blog',     icon: 'file' }
])
</script>

<template>
  <DraggableList v-model="pages">
    <template #title="{ item }">
      <div class="flex flex-col">
        <span class="font-medium">{{ item.title }}</span>
        <span class="text-sm text-oc-text-400">{{ item.url }}</span>
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #action-item="{ item }">
      <DropdownItem text="Edit page" icon="pencil" />
      <DropdownItem text="Remove"    icon="bin" variant="destructive" />
    </template>
  </DraggableList>
</template>
```

#### With Toggle

Replace the three-dot dropdown with a toggle switch using the #action slot. Enable-status-variant grays out inactive rows.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { DraggableList, Toggle } from '@orchidui/core'

const items = ref([
  { id: '1', title: 'Email notifications', icon: 'mail',  active: true },
  { id: '2', title: 'SMS notifications',   icon: 'phone', active: false },
  { id: '3', title: 'Push notifications',  icon: 'bell',  active: true }
])
</script>

<template>
  <DraggableList v-model="items" :enable-status-variant="true">
    <template #action="{ item }">
      <Toggle v-model="item.active" size="small" />
    </template>
  </DraggableList>
</template>
```

Emoji selector popover input.

kind: leaf · tags: emoji, input, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no |  |  |
| popperOptions | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { EmojiPicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<div class="h-[500px] w-full">
          <EmojiPicker v-model="modelValue"
  :is-disabled="false"
  :popper-options="{  }" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## ThumbnailTheme

Theme selection card with preview and activate/publish actions.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/storedesign-thumbnailtheme-thumbnailtheme--docs

kind: leaf · tags: theme, store, design

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| activating | boolean | no |  |  |
| isProAccount | boolean | no |  |  |
| theme | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

Description of theme will be here, of theme will be here

```vue
<script setup>
import { ThumbnailTheme } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-5">
          <ThumbnailTheme
            if-pro-account
            v-for="(theme, idx) in [{ id: 1, thumbnail: '/images/theme1.png', title: 'Theme Title 1', description: 'Description of theme will be here, of theme will be here', active: true, installed: true }, { id: 2, thumbnail: '/images/theme1.png', title: 'Theme Title 2', description: 'Description of theme will be here, of theme will be here', active: true, installed: true }, { id: 3, thumbnail: '/images/theme1.png', title: 'Theme Title 3', description: 'Description of theme will be here, of theme will be here', active: false, installed: true }, { id: 4, thumbnail: '/images/theme1.png', title: 'Theme Title 4', description: 'Description of theme will be here, of theme will be here', active: false, installed: false }, { id: 5, thumbnail: '/images/theme1.png', title: 'Theme Title 5', description: 'Description of theme will be here, of theme will be here', active: false, installed: false, pro: true }]"
            :theme="theme"
            :activating="idx === 0"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## ThumbnailSection

Section template card with preview and add action.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/storedesign-thumbnailsection-thumbnailsection--docs

kind: leaf · tags: section, store, design

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| section | Record<string, any> | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ThumbnailSection } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-5 w-[535px]">
          <ThumbnailSection v-for="section in [{ name: 'section_1', preview: '/images/section.png', title: 'Section 1' }, { name: 'section_2', preview: '/images/section.png', title: 'Section 2' }, { name: 'section_3', preview: '/images/section.png', title: 'Section 3' }]" :section="section" />
        </div>
</template>
```

## SubPlanCard

Subscription plan tier card listing features.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/storedesign-subplancard-subplancard--docs

kind: leaf · tags: plan, subscription, pricing

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| planTier | Record<string, any> | yes |  |  |
| isPlanActive | boolean | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| select | (event: "select", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Rules

- Required props: planTier

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { SubPlanCard } from '@orchidui/core'
</script>

<template>
<div class="grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 gap-5">
          <SubPlanCard
            v-for="(plan, index) in [{ id: '9c44a225-444b-40ff-8707-f2f7aa3c82d0', parent_type: 'tier', billing_frequency: 'monthly', hierarchy: 0, currency: 'sgd', price: 0, name: 'Free', features: [{ id: '9c44a225-28bf-41bf-92ff-1f5c30173d6c', code: 'store.feature_test_a', name: 'Test Store Feature A - Free', hierarchy: 64 }, { id: '9c44a225-294f-48fc-8663-f2a12029e8f4', code: 'store.feature_test_b', name: 'Test Store Feature B - Pro', hierarchy: 92 }] }, { id: '9c44a225-60eb-40d6-86e2-a36bb0494ff8', parent_type: 'tier', billing_frequency: 'monthly', hierarchy: 20, currency: 'sgd', price: 60, name: 'Pro', features: [{ id: '9c44a225-2632-4dfa-9c97-9931582ddf17', code: 'store.whatsapp_form', name: 'Store WhatsApp Form', hierarchy: 78 }, { id: '9c44a225-2820-4f95-bab3-9190d5050222', code: 'pos.save_orders', name: 'POS Save Orders', hierarchy: 38 }, { id: '9c44a225-29d9-4d32-a597-2b6f57de95fe', code: 'store.feature_test_c', name: 'Test Store Feature C - Pro', hierarchy: 4 }] }, { id: '9c44a225-88b1-422d-a23b-40cd7576d390', parent_type: 'tier', billing_frequency: 'monthly', hierarchy: 40, currency: 'sgd', price: 120, name: 'Plus', features: [{ id: '9c44a225-2a6e-4076-92df-622d836543ba', code: 'store.feature_test_d', name: 'Test Store Feature D - Plus', hierarchy: 43 }, { id: '9c44a225-2aff-4f8e-b486-2c30f09363fe', code: 'store.feature_test_e', name: 'Test Store Feature E - Plus', hierarchy: 85 }] }]"
            :planTier="plan"
            :is-plan-active="index === 1"
          />
        </div>
</template>
```

## TimePicker

Time picker input with popover clock.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/form-timepicker-octimepicker--docs

kind: leaf · tags: time, picker, form

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| icon | string | no | time |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| isDisabled | boolean | no | false |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | Date | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| preFill | string | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TimePicker } from '@orchidui/core'

const modelValue = ref('09:30')
</script>

<template>
<div class="w-full h-[200px]">
          <TimePicker v-model="modelValue"
  :disabled="false"
  :is24-hours="false" />
        </div>
</template>
```


---

# @orchidui/dashboard

## LineChart

Time-series line chart for trend visualization.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-charts-linechart-oclinechart--docs

kind: leaf · tags: chart, line, analytics, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| showTooltip | boolean | no |  |  |
| showLegend | boolean | no |  |  |
| showGrid | boolean | no |  |  |
| chartData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| labelData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| tooltipFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| tooltipValueFormatter | Function | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { LineChart } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<LineChart class="h-[300px]"
  :show-grid="false"
  :show-tooltip="true"
  :show-legend="false"
  :chart-data="[{ value: 500, percent: 0 }, { value: 730, percent: 0 }, { value: 824, percent: 10 }, { value: 1218, percent: -50 }, { value: 2135 }, { value: 1147, percent: -32 }, { value: 760, percent: 0 }, { value: 1150, percent: -3 }, { value: 2130, percent: 4 }, { value: 2324, percent: -5 }, { value: 1218, percent: 6 }, { value: 2135, percent: -34 }, { value: 1147, percent: 7 }]"
  :label-data="['NOV\'22', 'DEC\'22', 'JAN\'23', 'FEB\'23', 'MAR\'23', 'MAY\'23', 'JUN\'23', 'JUL\'23', 'AUG\'23', 'SEP\'23', 'OCT\'23', 'NOV\'23']"
  :tooltip-value-formatter="(value) => {
      const currency = new Intl.NumberFormat('en-US', {
        style: 'currency',
        currency: 'sgd',
        maximumFractionDigits: 2
      })
      return currency.format(value)
    }" />
</template>
```

## PieChart

Pie or donut chart for proportional data.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-charts-piechart-ocpiechart--docs

kind: leaf · tags: chart, pie, analytics, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| showTooltip | boolean | no |  |  |
| showLegend | boolean | no |  |  |
| showGrid | boolean | no |  |  |
| additionalOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| chartData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| tooltipFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| tooltipValueFormatter | Function | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { PieChart } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<PieChart class="h-[300px]"
  :show-grid="false"
  :show-tooltip="true"
  :show-legend="true"
  :chart-data="[{ value: 3900.64, name: 'Shopify', icon: 'plugins/api_shopify', itemStyle: { color: '#9BC34B' } }, { value: 2200.21, name: 'Link', icon: 'plugins/link', itemStyle: { color: '#2465DE' } }, { value: 1700.44, name: 'Invoice', icon: 'plugins/invoice', itemStyle: { color: '#B14AED' } }, { value: 1500.78, name: 'Recurring billing', icon: 'plugins/recurring_billing', itemStyle: { color: '#F4B840' } }, { value: 400.93, name: 'Others', legendTooltip: ['Online Store (1.5%)', 'Google Form (0.3%)'], itemStyle: { color: '#E5E6EA' } }]"
  tooltip-currency="SGD" />
</template>
```

## BarChart

Bar chart for comparing values across categories.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-charts-barchart-ocbarchart--docs

kind: leaf · tags: chart, bar, analytics, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| showTooltip | boolean | no |  |  |
| showLegend | boolean | no |  |  |
| showGrid | boolean | no |  |  |
| chartData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| labelData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| tooltipFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| tooltipValueFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| variant | string | no |  |  |
| yAxisFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| xAxisFormatter | Function | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { BarChart } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<BarChart class="h-[300px]"
  variant="primary"
  :show-grid="false"
  :show-tooltip="true"
  :show-legend="true"
  :chart-data="[500, 730, 824, 1218.88, 2135, 1147, 760, 1150, 2130, 2324, 1218, 2135, 1147]"
  :label-data="['NOV\'22', 'DEC\'22', 'JAN\'23', 'FEB\'23', 'MAR\'23', 'MAY\'23', 'JUN\'23', 'JUL\'23', 'AUG\'23', 'SEP\'23', 'OCT\'23', 'NOV\'23']"
  :y-axis-formatter="(value) => {
      return (value / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'K'
    }"
  tooltip-currency="SGD" />
</template>
```

## BarRaceChart

Animated bar race chart for changing rankings.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-charts-barracechart-ocbarracechart--docs

kind: leaf · tags: chart, animated, analytics, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| showTooltip | boolean | no |  |  |
| showLegend | boolean | no |  |  |
| showGrid | boolean | no |  |  |
| chartData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| labelData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| tooltipFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| tooltipValueFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| variant | string | no |  |  |
| yAxisFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| legendData | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| legend-item |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { BarRaceChart } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<BarRaceChart class="h-[300px]"
  variant="primary"
  :show-grid="false"
  :show-tooltip="true"
  :show-legend="true"
  :chart-data="[62, 11, 8, 6, 5, 2]"
  :label-data="['50%', '23%', '12%', '10%', '8%', '8%']"
  :legend-data="['Running shoes', 'Women\'s ribbed top', 'Fleece sweatshirt', 'Sportswear Tech Fleece', 'Joggers', 'Joggers']" />
</template>
```

## Card

Dashboard card container with title and content.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-card-occard--docs

kind: leaf · tags: card, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | string | no | education |  |
| isFull | boolean | no | false |  |
| version | string | no | v2 |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |
| fullButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no | () => { } |  |
| hideButtonProps | Record<string, any> | no | () => { } |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| logo |  |
| title |  |
| description |  |

### Examples

#### Default

You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link.

```vue
<script setup>
import { Card } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<div class="flex flex-col gap-y-5 max-w-[552px]">
          <Card type="education"
  title="Beginner guide for Payment Links"
  description="You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link." />
          <Card type="cross_feature"
  title="Beginner guide for Payment Links"
  description="You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link." />
          <Card type="cross_sell_pos"
  title="Beginner guide for Payment Links"
  description="You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link." />
          <Card type="cross_sell_os"
  title="Beginner guide for Payment Links"
  description="You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link." />
          <Card type="video"
  title="Beginner guide for Payment Links"
  description="You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link." />
        </div>
        <div class="mt-5 gap-y-5 flex flex-col">
          <Card type="cross_sell_pos" is-full
  title="Beginner guide for Payment Links"
  description="You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link." />
          <Card type="cross_sell_os" is-full
  title="Beginner guide for Payment Links"
  description="You will learn how to manage (create, update, view) your payment link." />
        </div>
</template>
```

## OcOverviewPieChart

Pie chart for overview/summary widgets.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-charts-overviewpiechart-ocoverviewpiechart--docs

kind: leaf · tags: chart, pie, overview, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| additionalOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| tooltip | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| chartData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| currency | string | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OcOverviewPieChart } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<OcOverviewPieChart
  currency="SGD"
  :chart-data="[{ value: 1048, name: 'Cards', itemStyle: { color: '#356DFF' } }, { value: 200, name: 'Paynow', itemStyle: { color: '#AEC5FF' } }, { value: 100, name: 'Others', itemStyle: { color: '#86FFCC' } }]" />
</template>
```

## OverviewMonthlyBarChart

Monthly bar chart for overview reporting.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-charts-overviewmonthlybarchart-ocoverviewmonthlybarchart--docs

kind: leaf · tags: chart, bar, overview, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| showTooltip | boolean | no |  |  |
| showLegend | boolean | no |  |  |
| showGrid | boolean | no |  |  |
| chartData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| labelData | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| tooltipFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| tooltipValueFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| variant | string | no |  |  |
| yAxisFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| xAxisFormatter | Function | no |  |  |
| currency | string | no |  |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OverviewMonthlyBarChart } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<OverviewMonthlyBarChart class="h-[300px] w-[530px]"
  variant="primary"
  :show-grid="false"
  :show-tooltip="true"
  :show-legend="true"
  :chart-data="[1240, 980, 1750, 2100, 1630, 890, 2340, 1870, 1450, 2680, 1920, 760, 1580, 2230, 1340, 1090, 1960, 2410, 1720, 830, 2560, 1480, 1150, 1890, 2070, 1320, 940, 2180, 1660, 1430]"
  :label-data="['2025-09-01', '2025-09-02', '2025-09-03', '2025-09-04', '2025-09-05', '2025-09-06', '2025-09-07', '2025-09-08', '2025-09-09', '2025-09-10', '2025-09-11', '2025-09-12', '2025-09-13', '2025-09-14', '2025-09-15', '2025-09-16', '2025-09-17', '2025-09-18', '2025-09-19', '2025-09-20', '2025-09-21', '2025-09-22', '2025-09-23', '2025-09-24', '2025-09-25', '2025-09-26', '2025-09-27', '2025-09-28', '2025-09-29', '2025-09-30']"
  :y-axis-formatter="(value) => {
      return (value / 1000).toFixed(1) + 'K'
    }"
  tooltip-currency="SGD"
  currency="SGD" />
</template>
```

## ColorPicker

Color picker input with hex/rgb support.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-colorpicker-occolorpicker--docs

kind: leaf · tags: color, picker, input

**Related:** Icon

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | string | no | solid |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| hideOpacity | boolean | no |  |  |
| hideInputColor | boolean | no |  |  |
| placement | string | no | auto |  |
| presetColors | unknown[] | no |  |  |

### Events

| Event | Type | Description |
|-------|------|-------------|
| update:model-value | (event: "update:model-value", ...args: any[]): void |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| leading |  |
| picker-icon |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { Icon } from '@orchidui/core'
import { ColorPicker } from '@orchidui/dashboard'

const modelValue = ref(args.modelValue)
</script>

<template>
<div class="h-[400px]">
          <div class="mb-2 text-sm">modelValue: {{ modelValue }}</div>
          <ColorPicker v-model="modelValue" :show-opacity="false">
            <template #leading>
              <Icon name="paint" />
            </template>
          </ColorPicker>
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Gradient

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref, computed } from 'vue'
import { ColorPicker } from '@orchidui/dashboard'

const modelValue = ref(args.modelValue)
const styleBg = computed(()
</script>

<template>
<ColorPicker v-model="modelValue" variant="gradient" />
        <div class="h-[400px] w-full mt-3" :style="styleBg" />
</template>
```

## TextEditor

Rich text (WYSIWYG) editor.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-texteditor-octexteditor--docs

kind: leaf · tags: editor, richtext, wysiwyg, input

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| variant | string | no | default |  |
| fontSizes | unknown[] | yes |  |  |
| errorMessage | string | no |  |  |
| label | string | no |  |  |
| hint | string | no |  |  |
| isRequired | boolean | no | false |  |
| labelIcon | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipText | string | no |  |  |
| tooltipOptions | Record<string, any> | no | {} |  |
| placeholder | string | no |  |  |
| isCustomImageUpload | boolean | no |  |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| initialFontSize | string | no |  |  |
| image | string | no |  |  |

### Rules

- Required props: fontSizes

### Examples

#### Basic

Full rich text editor with formatting toolbar. v-model is an HTML string.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TextEditor } from '@orchidui/dashboard'

const content = ref('')

const fontSizes = [
  { label: 'Default', value: '14px' },
  { label: 'Medium',  value: '16px' },
  { label: 'Large',   value: '18px' },
  { label: 'XL',      value: '20px' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <TextEditor
    id="editor"
    v-model="content"
    label="Product description"
    placeholder="Start typing..."
    :font-sizes="fontSizes"
    initial-font-size="14px"
  />

  <!-- Render the HTML output -->
  <div class="mt-6 p-4 border rounded" v-html="content" />
</template>
```

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TextEditor } from '@orchidui/dashboard'

const modelValue = ref('')
const modelValue2 = ref('')
</script>

<template>
<div @click="modelValue = ''" class="cursor-pointer mb-1">Clear</div>
        <div @click="modelValue = 'default model value'" class="cursor-pointer mb-4">Reset</div>

        <div class="mb-2">Full Editor</div>
        <TextEditor id="quill-example" v-model="modelValue" @update:image="onUpdateImage" />
        <div class="flex gap-y-6 flex-col mt-8">
          <div>Preview</div>
          <div v-html="modelValue" />
        </div>

        <div class="mt-8 mb-2">Text Only Editor</div>
        <TextEditor id="quill-example-text-only" variant="text-only" v-model="modelValue2" />
        <div class="flex gap-y-6 flex-col mt-8">
          <div>Preview</div>
          <div v-html="modelValue2" />
        </div>
</template>
```

#### Text Only Variant

Text-only variant hides image and media toolbar buttons — useful for plain formatted text fields.

```vue
<script setup>
import { ref } from 'vue'
import { TextEditor } from '@orchidui/dashboard'

const content = ref('')

const fontSizes = [
  { label: 'Default', value: '14px' },
  { label: 'Medium',  value: '16px' }
]
</script>

<template>
  <TextEditor
    id="editor-text"
    v-model="content"
    variant="text-only"
    label="Notes"
    :font-sizes="fontSizes"
  />
</template>
```

## ColorPickerPopup

Popover color picker for inline color selection.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-colorpicker-components-occolorpickerpopup--docs

kind: leaf · tags: color, picker, popover

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| type | string | no | HEX8 |  |
| variant | string | no | solid |  |
| modelValue | string | no |  |  |
| inputType | string | no | HEX |  |
| theme | string | no | light |  |
| showColorList | boolean | no | true |  |
| showEyeDrop | boolean | no | true |  |
| showAlpha | boolean | no | true |  |
| showInputMenu | boolean | no | true |  |
| showInputSet | boolean | no | true |  |
| disabled | boolean | no | false |  |
| iconClasses | Record<string, any> | no | () => {
    return {
        linear: "",
        radial: "",
        ruler: "",
        eyeDroper: "",
        inputMenu: "",
        save: "",
        delete: ""
    };
} |  |
| presetColors | unknown[] | no |  |  |
| lastUsedColors | unknown[] | no |  |  |

## OnboardingProgressbar

Progress bar for onboarding completion.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-onboardingprogressbar-oconboardingprogressbar--docs

kind: leaf · tags: progress, onboarding, dashboard

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| value | string | number | no | 0 |  |
| chartData | unknown[] | no | [] |  |
| title | string | no |  |  |
| description | string | no |  |  |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| description |  |

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { OnboardingProgressbar } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<OnboardingProgressbar
  :value="50"
  title="We are verifying your account!"
  :chart-data="[{ value: 60, name: 'Primary', itemStyle: { color: '#2465DE' } }, { value: 20, name: 'Warning', itemStyle: { color: '#FFD47D' } }, { value: 20, name: 'Empty', itemStyle: { color: '#F8F9FC' } }]">
          <template #description>
            <span class="text-sm text-oc-text-400">
              It usually takes
              <span class="font-medium text-oc-text">2 work days</span>
              . We will let you know once it's done.
            </span>
          </template>
        </OnboardingProgressbar>
</template>
```

## CodeBlock

Syntax-highlighted code block.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-codeblock-occodeblock--docs

kind: leaf · tags: code, syntax, display

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| jsonObject | string | yes |  |  |
| lang | string | no | json |  |

### Rules

- Required props: jsonObject

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { CodeBlock } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<CodeBlock :json-object="'{
  'widget': {
    'debug': 'on',
    'window': {
      'title': 'Sample Konfabulator Widget',
      'name': 'main_window',
      'width': 500,
      'height': 500
    },
    'image': {
      'src': 'Images/Sun.png',
      'name': 'sun1',
      'hOffset': 250,
      'vOffset': 250,
      'alignment': 'center'
    },
    'text': {
      'data': 'Click Here',
      'size': 36,
      'style': 'bold',
      'name': 'text1',
      'hOffset': 250,
      'vOffset': 100,
      'alignment': 'center',
      'onMouseUp': 'sun1.opacity = (sun1.opacity / 100) * 90;'
    }
  }
}'" :lang="'json'" :key="'json'" />
</template>
```

## LottieAnimation

Renders a Lottie JSON animation.

Storybook: https://orchidui.vercel.app/storybook/?path=/docs/dashboard-lottieanimation-oclottieanimation--docs

kind: leaf · tags: animation, lottie, media

### Props

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Values |
|------|------|----------|---------|--------|
| path | string | yes |  |  |
| width | string | yes |  |  |
| height | string | yes |  |  |
| speed | number | no | 1 |  |
| loop | boolean | no | false |  |
| autoplay | boolean | no | true |  |

### Rules

- Required props: path, width, height

### Examples

#### Default

```vue
<script setup>
import { LottieAnimation } from '@orchidui/dashboard'
</script>

<template>
<LottieAnimation
  path="/json/lottie-animation/success_report.json"
  width="200"
  height="200"
  :auto-play="true" />
</template>
```
